Name: Casualty Vitals
Description:
[size=5]Casualty Vitals
[/size]
Casualty Vitals replaces the vanilla Casualties Unknown ECG panel with a richer patient monitor powered by a BepInEx 5 plugin. It adds multi-channel waveform viewing, progressive clinical-ish complications, alarm tinting, manual defibrillator support, and a few strange but medically flavored edge cases.

This is an experimental gameplay/immersion mod. It is not medical advice, a diagnosis tool, or a realistic clinical simulator.

[size=4]Requirements[/size]

- Casualties Unknown Demo
- [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/32]RshLib[/url]
- BepInEx 5 for Unity Mono
- Windows x64 game install

RSHLib is required for the custom medical solution items. Casualty Vitals declares it as a hard dependency, so BepInEx will refuse to load this mod if RSHLib is missing.

[size=4]Installation[/size]

1. Install BepInEx 5 into the Casualties Unknown game folder.
2. Launch the game once so BepInEx creates its folders.
3. Install `RshLib.dll` and
4. Copy `CasualtyVitals.dll` into:


<Game Folder>\BepInEx\plugins\



5. Launch the game.
6. Check `BepInEx\LogOutput.log` for:

[code]
Plugin CasualtyVitals is loaded.
[/code]

The mod keeps normal runtime logging quiet. If the log grows rapidly, look for warnings/errors rather than routine status spam.

[size=4]What It Does[/size]

- Replaces the vanilla health-panel ECG display with a custom monitor overlay.
- Adds selectable waveform channels:
  - HEART
  - SPO2
  - RESP
  - ABP
  - ETCO2
- Lets channels be previewed by hovering and pinned by clicking.
- Adds fast channel blending to reduce flicker when the vanilla UI changes rapidly.
- Adds monitor alarm tinting instead of large alarm text covering the trace.
- Pulses affected channel buttons during alarms.
- Supports a photosensitive alarm mode with slower, softer flashing.
- Hides the custom health monitor during unchipped mode so the vanilla behavior can show through.
- Adds a manual pulse check for unchipped or low-information playthroughs.
- Adds custom electrolyte treatment items through RSHLib.
- Adds elder thornback dread effects with moodles, heartbeat audio, panic HR, and post-fight adrenaline crash.
- Adds optional gameplay complications that can push vanilla Body fields when enabled.

[size=4]Manual Defibrillator Support[/size]

The manual defibrillator minigame receives its own limited monitor overlay.

It shows:

- HEART
- SPO2
- ABP

It does not show:

- RESP
- ETCO2

AED/manual defib shocks create a short noisy electrical artifact on the heart trace. Higher manual defib charge, or AED shocks, make the artifact slightly more erratic and last a little longer. In unchipped mode, the manual defib monitor can still show the shock artifact while the normal health monitor stays hidden.

Manual defibrillators can also be made rarer in generic loot/trader pools, or made more fragile after each shock, through config. This does not intentionally nerf AEDs.

[size=4]Physiology Layer[/size]

Casualty Vitals reads the current Body state and turns it into monitor behavior instead of only drawing the raw vanilla ECG.

Supported/estimated complication patterns include:

- Hypovolemia
- Hypoxia
- Respiratory failure
- Shock
- Angina/chest discomfort
- Ventricular instability
- Waterlogging/drowning-like respiratory stress
- Hyperkalemia from banana overload
- Hypercalcemia from electrolyte medication overdose
- Electrolyte medication toxicity
- Elder thornback panic/adrenaline states
- EtCO2 changes from ventilation, obstruction, waterlogging, perfusion, shock, and external API modifiers

These conditions are progressive. The monitor should often show deterioration before the raw numbers look completely catastrophic.

[size=4]Waveform Changes[/size]

The monitor can display:

- Sinus rhythm
- Bradycardia
- Tachycardia
- SVT-like fast rhythm
- VTach (now explicitly organized, monomorphic wide-complex)
- VFib (now fades in continuously instead of snapping)
- PEA-like electrical activity with poor/no perfusion
- Asystole (now decays gradually instead of snapping flat)
- Defib shock artifacts
- Hyperkalemia morphology with reduced P waves and tall peaked T waves
- Respiratory distress, apnea, waterlogged, and agonal-like patterns
- Pleth quality loss with poor oxygen/perfusion
- ABP loss with low pressure, low blood volume, arrest, or severe ventricular instability
- Synthetic/robotic ABP morphology when a charged autopump appears to be actively supporting low pressure
- EtCO2 plateau changes, including higher/waterlogged patterns

[size=4]Manual Pulse Checks[/size]

Holding left click with an empty cursor on the head, wrist, hand, or forearm in the health panel reveals a faint manual pulse trace after a short hold. This is mainly for unchipped playthroughs, but it can also be used in normal runs if you want a rough second opinion without relying fully on the monitor (for some reason?).

The manual trace is intentionally approximate. Higher intelligence improves interpretation: estimates appear with fewer beats, the BPM number tightens faster, and the trace is a little cleaner. Low intelligence takes longer and produces a rougher read.

During or near fibrillation, the manual pulse check becomes hard to interpret instead of giving a clean diagnostic VFib strip. If the patient is crashing that badly, the pulse check should feel like a warning sign, not a perfect monitor.

[size=4]Mod API[/size]

Casualty Vitals v1.0.0+ exposes `CasualtyVitalsApi` for other BepInEx mods. This allows other mods to safely read `VitalsSnapshot` without touching vanilla fields, inject additive condition burdens (`ExternalConditionSignal`), or apply custom waveform modifiers.

[size=4]Gameplay Effects[/size]

The mod can be used as a mostly visual monitor upgrade, or as a gameplay-affecting complication layer.

When `EnableGameplayEffects` is enabled, developing conditions can nudge vanilla Body fields. This can affect stamina, shock, chest pain, abdomen pain, hemothorax pressure, oxygen, respiratory behavior, blood pressure behavior, and fibrillation risk.

The goal is not instant punishment. The goal is to make subtle monitor deterioration matter.

Major gameplay-facing additions include:

- Hyperkalemia can progress from repeated banana eating and can contribute to chest pain, ECG changes, ventricular instability, and fibrillation risk if ignored.
- Hypercalcemia can occur from calcium gluconate overdose and can push angina/rhythm burden.
- Calcium gluconate and calcitonin solution are real custom items, not renamed vanilla saline.
- Both solutions can be consumed orally from the radial menu or injected through the health panel.
- Oral use takes about 14 mL and acts slowly with lower overdose risk.
- Injection uses the syringe minigame and can deliver much more at once, so overdose is easier.
- Each bottle holds 100 mL; injecting more than about 30 mL of either medication is the danger zone.
- Electrolyte medication overdose adds its own chipped-only moodle instead of pretending to be opiate overdose.
- Elder thornbacks can trigger Sense of Impending Doom, Horrified, and Focused moodles, boost heartbeat audio, and push panic heart rate toward a configurable maximum.
- After a thornback encounter ends, the heartbeat fades down over time and the adrenaline crash can lightly drain stamina.
- Thornback panic suppresses the monitor's hypertensive crisis reaction so dread HR spikes do not immediately become a hypertensive crisis by themselves.

For multiplayer, host-driven gameplay effects are the safest setup. Client-only monitor display is much safer than multiple clients writing vanilla Body fields at the same time (but it does work in a multiplayer setup, or well shouldn't break anything).

[size=4]Custom Medical Items[/size]

RSHLib registers two electrolyte solution items:

- `Calcium Gluconate Solution`
- `Calcitonin Solution`

Both use embedded sprites, spawn in medical loot pools, and can occasionally appear at traders. They are liquid containers with 100 mL of solution, custom liquid colors, custom locale text, and health-panel injection support.

Calcium gluconate stabilizes dangerous hyperkalemia. Calcitonin counteracts hypercalcemia after electrolyte treatment overdose. They are meant to be dosed carefully: partial oral doses are safer and slower, while health-panel injection is faster but can overdose hard if you dump too much.

[size=4]Banana Hyperkalemia[/size]

Because someone had to make potassium a gameplay mechanic:

- Eating more than about 1.5 bananas inside roughly 3 minutes starts the risk.
- Each extra half-banana step after that rolls a 50% chance.
- Each failed roll adds hyperkalemia progress.
- A very unlucky binge can max out the condition.
- Hyperkalemia decays by itself, but very slowly.
- Hyperkalemia contributes to angina burden, chest discomfort, abdomen discomfort, ventricular instability, ECG changes, and fibrillation risk (if enabled).

[size=4]Configuration[/size]

After first launch, BepInEx creates:

[code]
<Game Folder>\BepInEx\config\CasualtyVitals.cfg
[/code]
Useful settings:

[code]
[Complications]
EnableGameplayEffects = false
EnableAutoPumpDiscomfort = false
EnableThornbackDread = true

[Accessibility]
PhotosensitiveAlarmMode = false

[Monitor]
ProcessingDelayMs = 120
WaveformTimeScale = 0.85

[Thornback Dread]
AuraDistance = 28
PanicDistance = 9.5
MaxHeartRate = 200
PeakHoldSeconds = 4.5
CrashStaminaDrain = 0.18

[Manual Pulse ECG]
EnableManualPulseEcg = true
HoldSeconds = 3.5
HistoryScale = 1.4
HeadOffsetX = 0
HeadOffsetY = 0
LeftHandOffsetX = 0
LeftHandOffsetY = 0
RightHandOffsetX = 0
RightHandOffsetY = 0

[Manual Defibrillator]
LootChanceMultiplier = 1
ShockConditionLoss = 0

[Debug]
EnableDebugHotkeys = false
[/code]
EnableGameplayEffects = false keeps the monitor behavior without letting the complication layer push vanilla Body fields.

EnableThornbackDread` is separate from `EnableGameplayEffects; turn it off if you only want the monitor/items/API without thornback panic physiology.

PhotosensitiveAlarmMode = true uses slower, softer alarm pulses.

ProcessingDelayMs tunes visual delay against the game's heartbeat/audio feel.

WaveformTimeScale slows or speeds the monitor trace without changing the actual physiology.

Manual pulse ECG offsets are in screen pixels. The config comments include rough presets such as next-to-body, under-limb, and above-limb. The probe also nudges away if it would cover the limb being checked.

LootChanceMultiplier = 0 removes manual defibrillators from generic loot/trader pools. Values above `1` make them more common there. Direct special-case world spawns may still be controlled by the base game.

ShockConditionLoss only applies to the manual defibrillator. The AED is not intentionally affected.

[size=4]Debug Hotkeys[/size]

Debug hotkeys are disabled by default. Enable them in the config if you want to test the monitor quickly.

- F7 - hemorrhage / hypovolemia
- F8 - hypoxia
- F9 - ventricular instability
- F10 - thoracic / respiratory complication
- F11 - PEA-like state
[size=1]These hotkeys intentionally alter the current patient.[/size]

This mod also adds console commands for testing internal values:

[code]
cvlistbodyfields
cvsetbodyfield <field> <value> [seconds]
cvgetbodyfield <field>
[/code]
[size=4]Compatibility[/size]

This mod is a BepInEx plugin that overlays and disables specific vanilla ECG UI components while active. It may conflict with mods that replace the same health-panel ECG, wound panel, or manual defibrillator minigame UI.

It should be compatible with unrelated item, world, audio, and quality-of-life mods unless they heavily alter the same UI or Body fields.

(as should be noted that this mod looks for "WoundView" so if any mod alters it in ways that CasualtyVitals can't see it properly, it might break, but by itself does not alter this class.)

[size=4]Known Limitations[/size]

- The mod estimates some hidden game states because not every useful Body/device detail is exposed cleanly.
- Autopump activity is inferred from pressure behavior and wearable/battery state.
- The monitor is stylized for Casualties Unknown rather than a strict medical simulator.
- Some severe or nonsensical vanilla states can still produce odd combinations, because Casualties Unknown allows odd physiology.
- The manual defib monitor is intentionally limited and not perfectly accurate.
- Manual pulse checks are approximate and intentionally affected by intelligence.
- Gameplay-affecting complications should generally be host-driven in multiplayer.
- RSHLib must load before the custom solution items can register.
- Setting the heartRate too high may lead to a game crash (but this is usually in the billions so it's fine in NORMAL gameplay.)

[size=4]Troubleshooting[/size]

If the monitor does not appear:

- Confirm BepInEx 5 loads.
- Confirm CasualtyVitals.dll is in BepInEx\plugins.
- Confirm RshLib.dll is in BepInEx\plugins`.
- Confirm LogOutput.log contains Plugin CasualtyVitals is loaded.
- Open the health/wound panel; the overlay attaches to the game's ECG UI.
- If using other UI mods, try disabling anything that changes the health panel or defibrillator UI.

If the log file gets noisy:

- Check for repeated warnings or errors from Casualty Vitals.
- Routine status messages are intentionally suppressed.
- Debug hotkey messages only appear when debug hotkeys are enabled and pressed.

If alarm flashing is uncomfortable:

- Set PhotosensitiveAlarmMode = true.

[size=4]Uninstall[/size]

Delete:

[code]
<Game Folder>\BepInEx\plugins\CasualtyVitals.dll
[/code]
Optional:

[code]
<Game Folder>\BepInEx\config\CasualtyVitals.cfg
[/code]
[size=1]If no other mod requires RshLib.dll you can also delete it.[/size]

[size=4]Credits[/size]

- Built with BepInEx 5.
- Inspired by the [url=https://github.com/ThatOneFBIAgent/VitalSignSimulator]StatPatMon/VitalSign Monitor[/url] simulation work (outside app of mine).
- Developed for experimental Casualties Unknown medical-monitor modding.
[size=4]
Version[/size]

Current workspace version: 1.0.0

This build is experimental and may change as the underlying game and mod hooks are better understood.
Author: yzaCarlos

Name: Axivorn's Experiment NPCs
Description:
[b][size=4][font=Arial Black]Description[/font][/size][/b]
Experiment NPCs that eat, drink, exercise, wander, bleed, heal, patch themselves up, and fight with melee or guns.
You can spawn them, provoke them or make them hostile, fight back, open their health panel, give them fent, treat their wounds, and turn them into allies who follow and protect you. Full wound, bleed, and medical systems — same as your character.

[b]Got Issues talk here: [url=https://discord.gg/vDjyqbVX8y]https://discord.gg/vDjyqbVX8y[/url][/b]

[line]
[heading]Installation instructions[/heading]
[list=1]
[*]Install [url=https://docs.bepinex.dev/]BepInEx[/url] for Casualties Unknown (if you don’t already have it).[/*]
[*]Download and extract the mod zip.[/*]
[*]Copy the contents into:
Casualties Unknown/BepInEx/plugins/ [/*]
[*]Your folder should look like:
ExpieNPCMod/
├── AxivornsExpieNPCMod.dll
├── infectedsprites/
└── sounds/[/*]
[*]Remove any old 
[code]ExpieNPCMod.dll[/code] from that folder if you’re updating.[/*]
[*]Launch the game and load into the Sandbox[/*]
[/list][line]
[heading][b]Requirements[/b]
[list]

[*]BepInEx 5.x[/*]
[/list]
[b]Quick reference[/b]
[list]

[*][b]Spawn armed:[/b]

Name: Choose Quit Type
Description:

Author: IAmLeftie

Name: Manual Breathing
Description:
[size=6][b]Manual Breathing Mod — Technical Overview & Design[/b][/size]

This mod introduces a high-fidelity, immersive, and tactile [b]Manual Respiration System[/b] to [i]Casualties Unknown[/i], completely transforming the gameplay loop by requiring the player to actively manage their inhalation and exhalation cycle to maintain cellular oxygenation.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
[size=5][b]🧬 RESPIRATION MECHANICS & LUNG SIMULATION[/b][/size]
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Rather than treating breathing as a binary state, the mod implements an organic, physical model of the human respiratory tract:

[size=4][b]1. The Respiratory State Model[/b][/size]
Each conscious local player's body tracks two continuous properties:
[*][b]Lung Volume ([color=#f1c40f]lungAir[/color]) [0.0 - 1.0]:[/b] The physical volume of gas currently occupying the lungs.[/*]
[*][b]Oxygen Freshness ([color=#f1c40f]lungFreshness[/color]) [0.0 - 1.0]:[/b] The concentration of fresh, absorbable oxygen vs. accumulated, stale carbon dioxide.

[size=4][b]2. Anatomical Dead Space Simulation (Capped Freshness)[/b][/size]
To prevent a single inhale from magically "fully charging" the respiratory system to 100% capacity from an empty state, the mod models [b]Anatomical Dead Space[/b] (the residual volume of stale air trapped in non-exchanging airways).

During inhalation, incoming ambient air is mixed with a maximum fresh efficiency of [b]0.85[/b] instead of a perfect 1.0:

[code]lungFreshness_new = ((lungFreshness * lungAir_prev) + (0.85 * addedAir)) / lungAir_new[/code]
This means your lungs always maintain a realistic residual mixing of gases, preventing instantaneous maximum charges and forcing a consistent ventilatory rhythm.

[size=4][b]3. Deep Inhale Alveolar Boost (Low-Volume Efficiency)[/b][/size]
Gas exchange is most efficient at low lung volumes where the partial pressure gradient of oxygen is steepest. The mod rewards realistic deep breathing cycles by introducing the [b]Deep Inhale Alveolar Boost[/b]:[/*]
[*][b]Inhaling at low lung volumes[/b] ([color=#f1c40f]lungAir[/color] close to 0) directly adds a substantial amount of oxygen to your blood ([color=#f1c40f]bloodOxygen[/color]).[/*]
[*][b]Inhaling at high lung volumes[/b] (shallow breathing/panting at the top, e.g., from 0.8 to 1.0) provides [b]virtually zero[/b] direct blood oxygen gain.

[code]ΔbloodOxygen = addedAir * (1.0 - lungAir_prev)^2 * 32.0[/code]
This makes shallow, rapid inhalations highly ineffective, forcing the player to fully empty their lungs ([color=#f1c40f]lungAir[/color] to 0.0) before taking deep breaths to maximize oxygen absorption!

[size=4][b]4. Metabolic Oxygen Depletion[/b][/size]
Oxygen is constantly consumed from the lungs. The rate of depletion scales dynamically with the character's physical state:[/*]
[*][b]Baseline Consumption:[/b] It takes approximately 22 seconds of breath-holding to fully deplete oxygen under quiet conditions.[/*]
[*][b]Cardiovascular Scale:[/b] High heart rate ([color=#e74c3c]body.respiratoryRate[/color]) increases oxygen consumption.[/*]
[*][b]Exertion Scale:[/b] Low stamina ([color=#e74c3c]body.stamina[/color]) indicates high fatigue, compounding oxygen consumption up to [b]2.2x faster[/b].

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
[size=5][b]🫁 VENTILATION RATE RISKS (NEW PHYSIOLOGY)[/b][/size]
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The mod features a sophisticated, real-time [b]Ventilation Rate and Rhythm Tracker[/b] that monitors the duration and frequency of your breathing phases. Deviations from a steady, natural cycle introduce severe physiological and visual penalties.

[size=4][b]1. Hyperventilation (Breathing Too Fast)[/b][/size]
Triggered by rapid, shallow tapping (breathing phase duration less than [b]0.85s[/b]), which simulates hypocapnia (extreme depletion of blood carbon dioxide leading to respiratory alkalosis):[/*]
[*][b]Lightheadedness & Drowsiness:[/b] Your consciousness ([color=#e74c3c]body.consciousness[/color]) is continuously drained. If it falls below 30%, you pass out.[/*]
[*][b]Dizziness Camera Sway:[/b] The camera sways gently in a circular sinusoidal motion, mimicking a spinning head.[/*]
[*][b]Muscle Twitches & Jitter:[/b] Under extreme hyperventilation (level > 50%), the player experiences high-frequency tremors (muscles spasming due to alkalosis), making the camera shake rapidly.[/*]
[*][b]Staggering Slowdown:[/b] Lightheadedness saps coordination, slowing down character movement speed up to [b]36%[/b].[/*]
[*][b]Peripheral Glare Vignette:[/b] A vibrant, flickering white-blue glare border vibrates at 20Hz around the screen edges, blinding peripheral vision.

[size=4][b]2. Hypoventilation (Breathing Too Slow / Holding Breath)[/b][/size]
Triggered by prolonged inactivity, holding breath, or holding a single key down without cycling (duration greater than [b]5.5s[/b]), which simulates hypercapnia (severe CO2 retention and respiratory acidosis):[/*]
[*][b]CO2 Retention Fatigue:[/b] Blood oxygen ([color=#f1c40f]bloodOxygen[/color]) is actively destroyed by hypercapnia.[/*]
[*][b]Anoxic Exhaustion:[/b] Stamina ([color=#e74c3c]stamina[/color]) rapidly drains due to toxic lactic acid build-up in muscles.[/*]
[*][b]Severe Tachycardia:[/b] Heart rate surges up to 195 bpm to compensate for oxygen deprivation.[/*]
[*][b]Cardiac Throb Camera Shake:[/b] The screen physically throbs and shakes in [b]perfect synchronization[/b] with your actual heart rate ([color=#e74c3c]body.heartRate[/color]), simulating high-pressure pulsing blood.[/*]
[*][b]Sluggish Exhaustion:[/b] Movement speed is slowed by up to 30%.[/*]
[*][b]Claustrophobic Tunnel Vision:[/b] A dark, heavy charcoal vignette starts closing in from the screen boundaries, squeezing your field of view down to a narrow slit.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
[size=5][b]🌊 UNDERWATER ASPHYXIATION HAZARDS[/b][/size]
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

If the player submerges in water without a Scuba Gear accessory:[/*]
[*]Inhaling draws in water instead of air, instantly dropping [color=#f1c40f]lungFreshness[/color] to [b]0.0[/b].[/*]
[*]Water inhalation induces [b]alveolar trauma[/b], dealing steady, direct damage to [color=#e74c3c]body.brainHealth[/color].[/*]
[*]Choking and coughing sounds are triggered at random, short intervals to communicate panic.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
[size=5][b]🎛️ PROCEDURAL RESPIRATION AUDIO SYNTHESIZER[/b][/size]
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The mod synthesizes breathing audio [b]procedurally in real-time[/b] on startup. This completely eliminates loading lag and guarantees high portability.

[size=4][b]The DSP Filter Pipeline[/b][/size][/*]
[*][b]Noise Source:[/b] Generates uniform white noise samples.[/*]
[*][b]RC Lowpass Filter:[/b] Airway geometry shifts during breathing. The synthesizer uses an RC lowpass filter with a dynamic coefficient (alpha):
    * [b]Inhaling:[/b] Air passages dilate, allowing higher-frequency transmission. Alpha ramps up dynamically to widen the filter.
    * [b]Exhaling:[/b] Air passages relax and constrict. Alpha ramps down to produce a warm, deep, muffled wind sound.[/*]
[*][b]Volume Envelope:[/b] Smooth sinusoidal contours with click-softening boundaries on the edges to simulate realistic lung expansion and contraction.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
[size=5][b]🖥️ DYNAMIC GLASSMORPHIC HUD & VIGNETTES[/b][/size]
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The HUD is designed to feel cohesive, luxurious, and completely integrated into the game's atmosphere:

[size=4][b]1. Organic Fading (Dynamic Visibility)[/b][/size]
The HUD remains completely hidden while the player is healthy and resting to maximize screen space. It smoothly fades into view (alpha transitions via [i]Time.deltaTime * 3.5f[/i]) only when:
1. The player is actively pressing Inhale/Exhale keys.
2. Blood oxygen falls below 88%, lung freshness drops below 35%, or ventilation rates become unstable.
3. The character is submerged underwater.

[size=4][b]2. Progressive Blackouts[/b][/size]
As consciousness drops below 55% due to hyperventilation or hypoxia, the screen gradually fades out to complete black, perfectly simulating passing out right before the character collapses into a limp ragdoll.

[size=4][b]3. Beautiful Interface Aesthetics[/b][/size][/*]
[*][b]Glassmorphic backing panel:[/b] A semi-transparent dark charcoal panel with crisp slate borders.[/*]
[*][b]Dual Micro-Progress Bars:[/b]
    * [b]Lungs Bar:[/b] Changes color organically from [b][color=#9b59b6]deep magenta-purple[/color][/b] (stale/carbon dioxide) to [b][color=#1abc9c]vibrant electric-teal[/color][/b] (fresh oxygen).
    * [b]Blood Oxygen Bar:[/b] Transitions from emerald green to amber orange, culminating in an [b][color=#e74c3c]urgent flashing crimson[/color][/b] during extreme hypoxia.[/*]
[*][b]Hypoxia Vignette:[/b] When blood oxygen drops below 50%, the entire screen starts thumping with a glowing, pulse-modulated full-screen crimson warning vignette.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
[size=5][b]⚙️ CONFIGURATION & MODSETTINGSLIB INTEGRATION[/b][/size]
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The mod features [b]seamless native integration[/b] with [b]ModSettingsLib[/b] (the official, standard menu configuration library for [i]Casualties Unknown[/i]).

[size=4][b]1. Robust Soft Dependency Architecture[/b][/size]
The mod is built using a resilient soft-dependency pattern:[/*]
[*][b]If ModSettingsLib is installed:[/b] The mod automatically registers a beautifully designed, native configuration tab under the game's "Mod Settings" menu. The player can adjust and rebind all breathing settings in-game with real-time feedback.[/*]
[*][b]If ModSettingsLib is missing:[/b] The mod gracefully falls back to using the standard BepInEx .cfg configuration file without throwing any assembly load errors or crashing.

[size=4][b]2. Localization & Description Registration[/b][/size]
The mod plugs into the game's native localization system ([i]Locale.currentLang.other[/i]) to inject highly descriptive titles, keybind labels, and interactive hover tips:[/*]
[*][b]Tab Title:[/b] Manual Breathing[/*]
[*][b]Enable Mod:[/b] Manual Breathing Mod — [i]Enable or disable all manual breathing mechanics and HUD features.[/i][/*]
[*][b]Inhale Key:[/b] Inhale Key — [i]The key you hold down to draw fresh air into your lungs.[/i][/*]
[*][b]Exhale Key:[/b] Exhale Key — [i]The key you hold down to push stale carbon dioxide out of your lungs.[/i][/*]
[*][b]Autonomic Respiration:[/b] Autonomic Respiration (Sleep) — [i]If true, your character will breathe automatically (slowly/shallowly) while unconscious. If false, you will suffocate.[/i]

[size=4][b]3. Real-Time Dynamic Synchronization[/b][/size]
No restarts required! Any changes made in the in-game "Mod Settings" tab are:
1. Instantly updated in the game's runtime memory.
2. Dynamically picked up by the BreathingController in real-time.
3. Automatically saved to disk back into the BepInEx config file.
[/*]
Author: Kalambarintoso

Name: Manual Blinking
Description:
[size=6][b]Manual Blinking & Focus Mod 👁️[/b][/size]

An immersive, high-stakes physiological simulation mod for [b]Casualties Unknown[/b]. This mod replaces passive visual clarity with a manual ocular regulation loop. Players must periodically blink to moisten their eyes, manage ocular dryness under harsh environmental conditions, and survive high-tension involuntary squinting or forced blinking during critical gameplay moments.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
[size=5][b]CORE MECHANICS[/b][/size]
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

[size=4][b]1. The Dryness Loop (drynessLevel)[/b][/size]
[*]Your eyes dry out naturally over time.[/*]
[*][b]Base Dryness Rate:[/b] Takes roughly [i]0.8 seconds[/i] (with default [color=#f1c40f]BaseDrySpeed = 1.25f[/color]) to go from fully hydrated to dangerously dry. This ensures players must blink regularly and keep watch of ocular state.[/*]
[*][b]Environmental & Physical Scaling:[/b]
    * [b]Wind / Movement Velocity:[/b] Movement speed (retrieved via [color=#e74c3c]body.rb.velocity[/color]) pushes air into your eyes, increasing dry-out speed by up to [b]2.2x[/b] at terminal velocities.
    * [b]Submersion (inWater):[/b] Opening eyes underwater or getting splashed increases irritation and salt/chlorine drying by [b]3.0x[/b].
    * [b]Severe Injury / Pain:[/b] Ocular fatigue increases under intense pain or high heart rate.

[size=4][b]2. Manual Blinking & Eye Closure[/b][/size][/*]
[*][b]Manual Blink Key:[/b] Pressing a single key (default: [b]CapsLock[/b]) triggers a quick blink cycle, resetting [color=#f1c40f]drynessLevel[/color] back to [color=#f1c40f]0.0f[/color].[/*]
[*][b]Ocular Focus (Holding closed):[/b] Keeping the blink key held down closes your eyelids permanently.
    * [b]Smooth Cinematic Fading:[/b] Instead of instantly snapping dark, the eyelids fade to dark [b]really fast[/b] (~0.06 seconds) when closed, and fade back to normal [b]slightly slower[/b] (~0.25 seconds) when released, providing a smooth visual transition.
    * [b]Benefits:[/b] Rapidly relieves dryness, aids in recovering from temporary blindness (e.g., flashes/glare), and dampens intense camera shakes.
    * [b]Consequence:[/b] Complete blackout—you are blind to your surroundings while your eyes are closed.

[size=4][b]3. The Threat: Dry Eye Penalties[/b][/size]
As [i]drynessLevel[/i] passes certain thresholds, your ocular control degrades progressively:[/*]
[*][b]Stage 1: Cinematic Squint (> 40% Dryness):[/b] Two dark cinematic eyelid bands close in from the top and bottom of the screen, physically narrowing your vertical field of view to simulate squinting through dry irritation.[/*]
[*][b]Stage 2: Stinging Red Vignette & Violent Spasms (> 50% Dryness):[/b]
    * A custom, procedurally generated red vignette crawls onto the edges of your screen and pulsates, simulating throbbing eyeball irritation.
    * Visual camera twitches and muscle spasms increase in frequency and violence as dryness reaches 100%.[/*]
[*][b]Stage 3: Stamina Drain, Slowdown & Pain Groans (> 70% Dryness):[/b]
    * [i]No Automatic Blinking:[/i] You will [b]never[/b] automatically blink when it is too late. You must manage eye closure manually.
    * [i]Stamina Exhaustion (> 70% Dryness):[/i] Eye strain drains body stamina ([i]body.stamina[/i]) steadily over time.
    * [i]Slowdown (> 85% Dryness):[/i] Movement velocity slows down as severe eye irritation disrupts spatial coordination.
    * [i]Agony Vocalizations (100% Dryness):[/i] Stinging eye pain triggers periodic choking or gasping vocalizations from your player character.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
[size=5][b]TECHNICAL ARCHITECTURE[/b][/size]
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

[size=4][b]Plugin.cs[/b][/size][/*]
[*]Initializes the BepInEx plugin and hooks into [i]Body.HandleCirculation[/i] to dynamically inject the [i]BlinkingController[/i] component onto the player character.[/*]
[*]Handles native configuration bindings ([i]ConfigEntry[/i]) for blink keybinds, dry-out speed multipliers, and visual scales.[/*]
[*]Registers with [b]ModSettingsLib[/b] (soft dependency) to add an [b]"Ocular Care / Manual Blinking"[/b] settings tab directly inside the game's native options screen, allowing toggleable configurations and custom keys.

[size=4][b]BlinkingController.cs[/b][/size][/*]
[*]Maintains the state variables ([i]drynessLevel, blinkProgress, isBlinking[/i], etc.).[/*]
[*]Monitors physical speed via [i]body.rb.velocity.magnitude[/i] and environmental factors.[/*]
[*]Features a custom [i]OnGUI()[/i] HUD layer that draws:
    * [b]The Cinematic Eyelid Squint:[/b] Dual horizontal black boxes expanding towards the center as dryness rises.
    * [b]The Complete Blackout:[/b] Fullscreen fade-to-black when eyes are closed or blinking.
    * [b]Ocular Tension Indicators:[/b] Optional small icon/warning prompts under extreme strain.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
[size=5][b]PROPOSED INTEGRATION FLOW[/b][/size]
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

[code]
Player Body --> Injects Component --> BlinkingController
                                          |
    +--------------------------------------+------------------------------------+
    |                                      |                                    |
Checks Physics                        Checks Environment                  Reads Controls
(body.rb.velocity.magnitude)          (body.inWater)                      (Plugin.ConfigBlinkKey)
    |                                      |                                    |
    +--------------------------------------+------------------------------------+
                                          |
                                  Calculates State
                                    (drynessLevel)
                                          |
          +--------------------------------+--------------------------------+
          |                                |                                |
    Dryness > 40%                    Dryness > 65%                    Dryness = 100%
          |                                |                                |
Draw Cinematic Squint OnGUI      Induce Camera Jitter & Blur      Trigger Forced 0.9s Blackout

* Note: Holding or pressing the ConfigBlinkKey triggers the Blink Cycle & resets dryness.[/code]
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
[size=5][b]CONFIGURATION PARAMETERS[/b][/size]
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
[/*]
[*][b]BlinkingEnabled[/b] (Default: [color=#f1c40f]true[/color])
Enable/disable all manual blinking mechanics.
[/*]
[*][b]BlinkKey[/b] (Default: [color=#f1c40f]KeyCode.CapsLock[/color])
The key held down to close eyes / tapped to blink.
[/*]
[*][b]BaseDrySpeed[/b] (Default: [color=#f1c40f]1.25f[/color])
Base rate of eye drying per second (~0.8 seconds total).
[/*]
[*][b]WindDryFactor[/b] (Default: [color=#f1c40f]true[/color])
Scales dry-out rate based on movement speed.
[/*]
[*][b]EnableCinematicSquint[/b] (Default: [color=#f1c40f]true[/color])
Draws realistic top/bottom eyelid closing when dry.

[/*]

Description:

Name: ExpSneeze
Description:
Adds a sneezing mechanic to Casualties: Unknown.

Sneezes build up slowly over the course of 5 minutes on their own, but are accelerated by digging (getting dust in your nose!). When you're ready to sneeze, you'll start sneezing a random number of times, briefly losing consciousness, receiving mild knockback, and losing 1% of your stamina for each sneeze. There is also a 1 in 10 chance for you to drop whatever you're holding in your mouth each sneeze. You will never sneeze if you're wearing a dust mask!

[size=5][b]Requires BepInEx and CUCoreLib![/b][/size]

Banner art by me :3
Author: IAmLeftie

Name: UniRuPatch
Description:
[size=4][b]Описание[/b][/size]
UniRuPatch - универсальный руссификатор для работы в паре с Ru-r_Extended++. Фиксит пробел который появляется из-за тэгов. Фиксит проблему отображения рецептов - когда не отображаются все необходимые для крафта ингридиенты. И переводит часть модов. Полный список поддерживаемых модов на данный момент в конце.

[size=4][b]Инструкция по установке[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]1. Иметь установленный BepInEx, он и даёт модам работать.

2. Скачать мод UniRuPatch

3. Распаковать содержимое архива в корень игры

4. Выбрать в настройках языка "Русский Extended++"

5. Вы ещё более прекрасны чем раньше![/color]

Name: Dont Press Wrong Number
Description:
[b][color=#ff7700][size=4]Description [/size][/color][/b]
This mod improves the Lifepod keypad minigame by adding a Backspace (<) button, allowing you to delete the last entered digit instead of clearing the entire code.
It also adds real-time color feedback:
[b]• [color=#1e84cc]Blue[/color][/b] = Correct digit
[b]• [color=#cc0000]Red[/color] [/b]= Incorrect digit

If you have any issues while playing or find any bugs, please leave a post!

[color=#ff7700][size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size][/color]
1. Download Mod
2. Put the Mod file in here : "Casualties Unknown Demo\BepInEx\plugins"
3. Play!

[color=#ff7700][size=4][b]Main features[/b][/size][/color]
[color=#ffffff]Adds a Backspace (<) button to the Lifepod keypad[/color]
[color=#ffffff]Works in Singleplay[/color]
[color=#ffffff]Works in Multiplay ( client-side )[/color]

[color=#ff7700][size=4][b]Requirements[/b][/size][/color]
[b]• [url=https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx/releases/]BepInEx[/url][/b] For mod

[b][color=#ff7700][size=4]Known bugs[/size][/color][/b]
Players without this mod installed will hear multiple beeping sounds when a modded player presses the < button.



Mod idea & Request by.Henes

Name: Crafting Tweaks
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]Defeats* (3x reduction) the lag spike when crafting or opening the craft screen. Also includes quality of life features.[/color][/size]

[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
[color=#d4d4d8]Zip includes the dependency KefPluginRuntime.dll[/color]
[color=#d4d4d8]QOL Unknown compatible[/color]

[size=4][b]Main features[/b][/size]
[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]Optimizes crafting: lag spikes during opening crafting menu and crafting lowered from 136ms (vanilla) and 161ms (QOL) reduced to 52ms (yaaaay!)[/color][/size]

[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]-----> Inspired by QOL Unknown (and overrides with config)[/color][/size]
[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]: Auto-Auto-Crafting: Automatically crafts the components of the components of what you want to craft, customizable depth (canvas -> Sterilized Dressing automatically)[/color][/size]
[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]: Item Conditions (same as QOL)[/color][/size]
[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]___[/color][/size]
[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]:Item Counts: Shows how many of the item you already have[/color][/size]
[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]:Item Usage/Total: Shows how many of the item will be used/total you have[/color][/size]
[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]:Bio-Chem Fluid Tracking: Shows in the crafting UI how much you have[/color][/size]
[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]:Item Quick-Craft: Favorite items and craft them without visiting the page[/color][/size]
:Favorited Item Override: Use favorited items in crafts.

[size=4][b]Requirements[/b][/size]
[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]Needs Bepinex. KefPluginRuntime included in the install.[/color][/size]

MP Compatible!
[size=4][b]Shout outs[/b][/size]
QOL Unknown: https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/7
Github Repo: https://github.com/atalantisalt03/CU-CraftingTweaks

[size=4][b]Testing[/b][/size]
Try it out! set your framerate to 120fps (vsync off); Use your favorite profiler (or a keen eye), spawn this command: 
[quote]"craftingtest2 test_crafting_mats addxp_int_999999;spawn_foliage_cursor_1_20;spawn_woodscraps_cursor_1_12;spawn_glowplantfruit_cursor_1_12;spawn_scrapmetal_cursor_1_8;spawn_titaniummultitool_cursor_1_1;spawn_roselight_cursor_1_1"
 [/quote]
and craft a flimsy knife! look at the lag (or lack thereof!)
Dig up two plasticchunks, and you will have to many items you can craft!
Author: atalantisalt03

Name: All Wearable Can Be Held
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]Tired of juggling two packs or bags just to move items around? Wondering why a foliage bag with two ropes can't be carried in hand?
Now all wearable equipment — armor, backpacks, and everything else — can be held in hand and stored in your inventory.[/color]

[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]1. Make sure BepInEx is installed
2. Place "AllWearableCanBeHeld.dll" into "BepInEx/plugins/" folder
3. Launch the game[/color]

[size=4][b]Main features[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]All wearable items (armor, backpacks, etc.) can now be equipped, held in hand, or stored in the inventory — just like an Autopump.
Does not affect any other stats or attributes of the items.
Multiplayer compatibility has not been tested yet — hopefully it works![/color]

[size=4][b]Requirements[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]BepInEx (5.4.x)[/color]

[b][size=4]介绍[/size][/b]
厌恶了来回装备两个背包来倒腾道具吗？疑惑为什么加了两根背带的纤维袋就不能抓在手里了吗？
现在所有的装备（无论是护甲还是背包）都可以手持和放入道具栏了。

[b][size=4]安装方法[/size][/b]
1. 确保已安装 BepInEx
2. 将 AllWearableCanBeHeld.dll 放入 BepInEx/plugins/ 文件夹
3. 启动游戏即可

[b][size=4]功能[/size][/b]
所有能装备的道具（无论是护甲还是背包）都可以像自动泵那样，既能装备，也能手持和放入道具栏了。
不影响装备的其他数值。
尚未测试多人联机的兼容性——希望是兼容的。

[b]前置依赖[/b]
BepInEx (5.4.x)
Author: winddramon

Name: exp Intelligence Enhancement Program
Description:
This is from the artist: These ideas were killing me. I'm glad I found programer—I'm so grateful that it can turn ideas into actual results. We taught exp how to crack open stone fruits using objects, though it's not very tool-friendly. Remember to use the "F" key to favorite items and avoid tool durability running out. Added some more durable containers, a few practical items, and a makeshift electromagnetic rifle. Tweaked some mechanics to make the game more "realistic" than the original—this should benefit our lovely exp. Press F3 to adjust mechanics and items added or changed during gameplay.
中文-English 
AiserOmniMod — Overview

**AiserOmniMod** is a content expansion mod for *Casualties: Unknown (Scav Prototype)*. It adds ~19 new craftable items, overhauls recipes, and includes a variety of gameplay tweaks.

---
🧰 New Items (19 total)
| Item | Category | Description |
|------|----------|-------------|
| **Electric Lantern** | Utility | Battery-powered (large battery), 3 brightness levels, 50% wider illumination than vanilla |
| **Cluster Dynamite** | Explosive | Delayed fuse, detonates 3 times in rapid succession |
| **Sticky Dynamite** | Explosive | Adheres to blocks, oil pipes, and enemies |
| **Mountable Toolbox** | Backpack (Container) | 10u capacity, 85% encumbrance reduction, wearable on back |
| **Reinforced Backpack** | Backpack (Container) | 10u capacity, 60% encumbrance reduction |
| **Ammo Pouch** | Belt Pouch | Stores bullet casings, same slot as bandolier |
| **Repair Kit (Cloth)** | Utility | Fixes fabric gear (bags, satchels, pouches, backpacks...) |
| **Repair Kit (Iron)** | Utility | Fixes iron tools (knives, wrenches, pickaxes, helmets...) |
| **Repair Kit (Titanium)** | Utility | Fixes titanium gear (toolbox, riot helmet, tactical gear...) |
| **Repair Kit (Copper)** | Utility | Fixes copper tools — essentially a bundle of wires |
| **Headlamp Helmet** | Headwear | Bike helmet + headlamp, medium battery, 3 brightness modes, 1.0 armor |
| **Headlamp Riot Helmet** | Headwear | Riot helmet + headlamp, medium battery, 3 modes, 2.0 armor |
| **Flint Lighter** | Tool | Refillable oil lighter (up to 50ml), provides firestarter quality |
| **Monocular Telescope** | Tool | LMB toggle: activates far-view camera mode |
| **Rope Gun** | Tool | Load a climbing rope, fires a projectile that deploys a rope at impact. Features a trajectory-prediction laser sight |
| **Crossbow** | Weapon | Single-shot, pump-action, fires recoverable bolts. Dual-state sprites (loaded/empty) |
| **Crossbow Bolt** | Ammo | Homemade bolt, recoverable from walls and creatures |
| **Railgun** | Weapon | 3-second charge for max power, 1400 animal / 311 structure damage, 20-round mag. 4-state sprites depend on battery & chamber status |
| **Metal Pellet** | Ammo | Shotgun-type ammo for the railgun |

### 🔧 Recipe Additions
Every item above has a craftable recipe. New utility recipes include:
- **Biochem Fluid** (20ml) — Glowing plant fruit + hammering → Tools category
- **Procoagulant** (alternative) — Clotting mushroom + blood + helluce + biochem
- **Stonefruit** recipe — Hammering to open
- **Bone Welding Tool** recharge — Uses LRDSerum

### 🎯 Gameplay Tweaks
- **Scanner color improvements** — Oil pipes (green), radioactive barrels (purple), copper (orange), titanium (cyan),
- **Animal-sensing turrets** — Turrets detect and fire at spiders & crystal enemies
- **Animal trap triggers** — Barbed fence, bear trap, mines, sawblades, jump pads all affect creatures
- **Animal radiation damage** — Radioactive objects damage nearby creatures
- **Elder Thornback DPS stagger** — 1000 damage in 5 seconds → stun + leg damage
- **Dynamite bonus** — 2x damage to oil pipes
- **Offhand recoil reduction** — 70% less recoil when offhand is empty
- **Brain booster double XP** — 2x INT exp when brain-grow sickness is active

### 🎨 Visuals
Custom sprite support — drop a PNG into the `sprites/` folder next to the DLL to replace any item's appearance. Multi-state sprites for crossbow (loaded/empty) and railgun (battery × chamber combinations).

### 🌐 Multiplayer Compatibility
- Net message IDs: **40200** (rope request), **40201** (rope spawn) — safe range (≥40100)
- Force-ignore network tracking for client-side climbing ropes
- Custom recipe production on listen-server hosts (MP guard bypass)

---
## ⚙️ Config Options (BepInEx config file)
| Key | Default | Description |
|-----|---------|-------------|
| `HeadlampArmor` | true | Headlamp headwear armor |
| `NewItems` | true | Register new items |
| `NewRecipes` | true | New craft recipes |
| `StonefruitRecipe` | true | Stonefruit opening recipe |
| `CoagulantRecipe` | true | Alternative procoagulant recipe |
| `RepairKitRecipe` | true | Repair kit + bone welder recharge recipe |
| `ScannerColors` | true | Scanner color improvements |
| `AnimalTurrets` | true | Turrets detect creatures |
| `AnimalTraps` | true | Traps affect creatures |
| `AnimalRadiation` | true | Radiation damages creatues |
| `ElderStagger` | true | Elder DPS stagger mechanic |
| `ElderStaggerThreshold` | 1000 | Damage threshold in 5s window |
| `DynamiteBonus` | true | 2x dynamite damage to oil pipes |
---
## 📦 Installation
1. Install **BepInEx** (if not already)
2. Copy `AiserOmniMod.zip` into `BepInEx/plugins/`and unzip it
---

# AiserOmniMod — 模组概述


---

## 新增物品（共计 19 件）

| 物品 | 类别 | 描述 |
|------|------|------|
| **电提灯** | 工具 | 使用**大号电池**供电，三档亮度，照明范围比原版提高 50% |
| **集束雷管** | 爆炸物 | 延时引信后连续三次爆炸 |
| **粘性雷管** | 爆炸物 | 可粘附在方块、油管和敌人身上 |
| **挂载工具箱** | 背包（容器） | 10u 容量，85% 负重减免，可穿戴在背部 |
| **加固双肩包** | 背包（容器） | 10u 容量，60% 负重减免 |
| **子弹袋** | 腰包 | 收纳弹壳，与子弹带同一槽位 |
| **维修包（布基）** | 工具 | 修复织物装备：纤维袋、书包、帆布袋、双肩包、头套等 |
| **维修包（铁基）** | 工具 | 修复含铁装备：临时刀、扳手、十字镐、自行车头盔等 |
| **维修包（钛基）** | 工具 | 修复钛合金装备：工具箱、防爆头盔、战术背心等 |
| **维修包（铜基）** | 工具 | 其实就是电线，修复含铜装备 |
| **带头灯的头盔** | 头饰 | 自行车头盔 + 头灯，使用**中号电池**，三档亮度，1.0 护甲 |
| **防暴头盔带头灯** | 头饰 | 防暴头盔 + 头灯，使用**中号电池**，三档亮度，2.0 护甲 |
| **燃油打火机** | 工具 | 可反复充油（最多 50ml），每 25ml 提供 1 引火物品质 |
| **望远镜** | 工具 | 轻触左键切换开启/关闭模式，开启后自动进入远望视角 |
| **绳索枪** | 工具 | **装填攀爬绳**后发射钩子，在落点生成攀爬绳。内置**弹道预测镭射瞄准**，每次消耗绳索 50% 耐久 |
| **弩** | 武器 | 单发、泵动、手动上膛，发射可回收弩箭。双态贴图（上膛/空膛） |
| **弩箭** | 弹药 | 简易弩箭，命中墙壁和生物时都会生成可回收物品 |
| **电磁步枪** | 武器 | 蓄力 3 秒达到最大威力（1400 生物 / 311 结构伤害），弹匣容量 **20 发**，消耗大电池。四态贴图（电池有无 × 开膛闭膛） |
| **金属弹丸** | 弹药 | 霰弹类弹药，用于电磁步枪 |

---

## 新配方

所有新增物品均可通过合成台制作。新增配方包括：

- **生化流体（20ml）** ← 发光植物果实 + 锤击 → **工具**类别
- **凝血剂替代配方** ← 凝血蘑菇 + 血液 + 地狱菜 + 生化流体
- **石果锤开配方** ← 石果 + 锤击
- **骨焊工具充能** ← 消耗 LRDSerum

---

## 游戏性改进

- **扫描仪颜色增强** — 油管（绿）、放射桶（紫）、铜矿（橙）、钛矿（青）、硫磺（黄）
- **生物触发炮台** — 炮台会检测并射击蜘蛛、水晶生物等敌人
- **生物陷阱** — 铁丝网、捕兽夹、地雷、电锯、弹跳板均会影响生物
- **生物辐射伤害** — 放射性物品会持续伤害周围生物
- **长老眩晕** — 5 秒内累积 1000 伤害 → 眩晕并附加腿部破坏
- **雷管加成** — 对油管造成 2 倍爆炸伤害
- **副手减后座** — 副手空置时后坐力降低 70%
- **脑力药剂经验翻倍** — 脑长症状态时 INT 经验获取 ×2

---

## 自定义贴图支持

将 PNG 文件放入 `sprites/` 文件夹（与 DLL 同目录），文件名匹配物品 ID 即可替换贴图。

支持多态贴图的物品：
- **弩**：`omni_crossbow_loaded.png`（上膛） / `omni_crossbow_empty.png`（空膛）
- **电磁步枪**：`nobat_open/closed`（无电池开/闭膛） / `hasbat_open/closed`（有电池开/闭膛）

---

## 多人联机兼容

- 网络消息 ID：**40200**（绳索请求）、**40201**（绳索生成）— 安全范围 ≥40100
- 攀爬绳强制忽略网络追踪 — 纯客户端可见
- 主控端合成补刀 — MP 拦截被跳过后自动生成自定义配方产物

---

## 配置选项（BepInEx 配置文件）

| 键 | 默认 | 说明 |
|-----|------|------|
| `HeadlampArmor` | true | 头灯护甲 |
| `NewItems` | true | 注册新物品 |
| `NewRecipes` | true | 新合成配方 |
| `StonefruitRecipe` | true | 石果配方 |
| `CoagulantRecipe` | true | 凝血剂替代配方 |
| `RepairKitRecipe` | true | 维修包 + 骨焊充能配方 |
| `ScannerColors` | true | 扫描仪颜色增强 |
| `AnimalTurrets` | true | 炮台检测生物 |
| `AnimalTraps` | true | 陷阱影响生物 |
| `AnimalRadiation` | true | 辐射影响生物 |
| `ElderStagger` | true | 长老眩晕机制 |
| `ElderStaggerThreshold` | 1000 | 5 秒窗口内的累积伤害阈值 |
| `DynamiteBonus` | true | 雷管对油管 2 倍伤害 |

---

## 安装方法

1. 安装 **BepInEx**
2. 将 `AiserOmniMod.zip 放入 `BepInEx/plugins/` 目录

---

## 注意事项

- 所有物品的合成配方均受游戏识别系统（Recognition）限制
- 物品的贴图（PNG）路径为 `BepInEx/plugins/114514/sprites/`，默认无贴图时使用彩色方块作为后备

Author: MetroJelly

Name: Lefty Expies
Description:
Make your Expies lefties! This mod makes it so that there's a chance that your Experiment will be left handed or ambidextrous when you start a new run. Left handed Expies prefer to use and default to their left hand instead of their right, and ambidextrous Expies can use both equally, but at a 10% damage penalty across the board as a trade off. Everything is configurable in the game settings!

I haven't tested this mod with multiplayer, use at your own risk.

A known issue is that if you load a save file, all future runs until you close the game will always have the same handedness. Not sure why, but a quick restart fixes it!

Currently has support for the following languages:
- English (Courtesy of myself)
- Spanish (Machine translated)
- Italian (Machine translated)
- Russian (Machine translated)
- Ukrainian (Machine translated)
- Vietnamese (Courtesy of InklessBrush)
- Simplified Chinese (Machine translated)
- Romanian (Machine translated)
- Korean (Machine Translated)

Please let me know if you find any errors or would like to contribute!

[size=5][b]Requires BepInEx and CUCoreLib![/b][/size]

[b]If the mod does not work:[/b]
1.  Open the BepInEx config at
[code]C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Casualties Unknown Demo\BepInEx\config\BepInEx.cfg[/code]2. Change HideManagerGameObject to true:[img]https://files.catbox.moe/y9wzou.png[/img]

Future ideas:
- Explicit multiplayer mod support
Author: IAmLeftie

Name: VProfiler
Description:
VProfiler is a lightweight in-game performance monitoring mod for tracking runtime performance and diagnosing bottlenecks. It displays FPS, minimum FPS, maximum FPS, average FPS, 1% low FPS, GC memory, CPU/GPU frame time, network latency, bandwidth, packet counts, and Unity component-level CPU usage directly on screen.
The mod includes a real-time FPS graph using fixed-time sampling to keep latency low while avoiding abnormal V-shaped artifacts at the right edge of the chart. It is useful for debugging stutters, investigating performance issues, monitoring multiplayer network status, and comparing performance across different settings.

Main features:
[list]
[*]Real-time FPS, Min, Max, Avg, and 1% Low display[/*]
[*]FPS history graph[/*]
[*]GC memory and collection count tracking[/*]
[*]Unity main-thread CPU and GPU frame time display[/*]
[*]Unity component CPU usage breakdown[/*]
[*]Network ping, upload/download bandwidth, and packet statistics (Available when KrokMP is installed)[/*]
[*]Game system performance sampling and sorted display[/*]
[*]Hotkeys for toggling profiler panels[/*]
[/list]
Hotkeys:
[list]
[*]F6: Toggle FPS, GC, and network info[/*]
[*]F7: Toggle CPU, GPU, and Unity component analysis[/*]
[*]F8: Toggle game system performance analysis[/*]
[/list]Please install BepInEx to use this mod correctly. Optional: KrokMP

VProfiler 是一个轻量级游戏内性能监控模组，用于实时查看游戏运行状态和性能瓶颈。它可以在画面上显示 FPS、最低帧、最高帧、平均帧、1% Low、GC 内存、CPU/GPU 帧耗时、网络延迟、带宽、收发包数量，以及 Unity 组件级 CPU 占用情况。
模组内置实时 FPS 图表，使用固定时间采样来减少延迟，并避免图表右侧出现异常 V 形波动。适合调试卡顿、排查性能问题、观察多人联机网络状态，或对比不同设置下的性能表现。

主要功能：
[list]
[*]实时 FPS、Min、Max、Avg、1% Low 显示[/*]
[*]FPS 历史曲线图[/*]
[*]GC 内存与 GC 次数统计[/*]
[*]Unity 主线程 CPU / GPU 帧耗时显示[/*]
[*]Unity 组件 CPU 占用分析[/*]
[*]网络 Ping、上下行带宽、收发包统计 （KrokMP安装后可用）[/*]
[*]游戏系统性能采样与排序显示[/*]
[*]快捷键开关不同监控面板[/*]
[/list]快捷键：
[list]
[*]F6：显示/隐藏 FPS、GC、网络信息[/*]
[*]F7：显示/隐藏 CPU、GPU、Unity 组件分析[/*]
[*]F8：显示/隐藏游戏系统性能分析[/*]
[/list]请安装BepInEx以使用此mod，可选：KrokMP
Author: VtLoader

Name: gouxi's funnyshit
Description:
# gouxi's funnyshit – 狗曦的乐色堆

> 一些来自 G0ux1 的奇怪点子，希望你们能享受。所有物品均已在游戏中配置自然刷新，部分内容还在完善中，后续会持续更新。

---

## 📦 模组内容概览

本模组为《Scav Prototype》添加了大量全新物品、液体和机制，涵盖装备、食物、医疗、工具、武器、实用道具以及多种特殊液体。所有内容均围绕“Gouxi-Tech”宇宙风格设计，带有恶搞、黑色幽默和一定程度的成人向内容。

### 🎒 装备类
- **尾包** – 可穿戴容器，增加负重上限，减少负重惩罚。
- **郊狼?!** – 可穿戴设备，可稳定心率，也能当作 AED 使用（需对胸部部使用）。
- **亚空间背包** – 超大容量背包，内置护盾，但电池耗尽时有湮灭风险。

### 🍖 食物类
- **生鱼** – 来自异维度的生鱼，吃了会拉肚子。
- **熟牛排** – 口感奇怪的完美煎牛排，能恢复大量饱食度和快乐值。

### 💊 医疗类
- **金苹果** – 大幅恢复内外伤，增加快乐值。
- **神经阻断中和剂** – 解除“记忆阻断”后遗症，使用后会强制高质量睡眠并重置智力。

### ⚒️ 工具/武器（三阶升级）
- **石制工具**（镐、剑、斧、锄、铲）– 基础采集与战斗。
- **铁制工具** – 更高耐久和伤害。
- **钻石制工具** – 顶级属性，附带截肢功能（对感染肢体使用可触发截肢小游戏）。

- **打火石** – 生火工具。
- **钓竿** – 抛出后回收可拉拽玩家并概率钓到鱼（经验修补）。

### 🧩 实用/杂项
- **脑机超频** – 提升移速、跳跃力，但损伤脑部。
- **系列玩偶（狗曦、黑白狼、槐梦、邪修、影狐、狐狸等）** – 可互动，产生各种效果（如增加快乐、降低体力、收集奇怪液体等）。
- **火焰弹** – 投掷后爆炸，带音效。
- **经验瓶** – 砸碎后获得大量经验并解锁随机配方。
- **核弹（两种）** – 一枚直接引爆，另一枚需完成拆弹小游戏（密码 `114514` 触发彩蛋奖励）。
- **芯片移除/植入器** – 控制“芯片”状态，影响脑部属性和能力。
- **吃吃爆** – 随机生成食物或爆炸（25%概率）。
- **EXP摸摸卷** – 对头部使用可增加快乐、减轻疼痛。
- **莹石粉、金锭、铁锭、钻石、木棍** – 合成材料。
- **俄罗斯轮盘赌** – 对头部使用，六分之一概率完全恢复，否则即死（带耐久消耗）。

### 🧪 液体容器
- **铁桶** – 可装任何液体并饮用。
- **药水瓶子** – 默认装填“瞬间治疗II”药水。
- **迷你桶注射器** – 超大容量注射器，对肢体使用会触发注射小游戏，效果强力但伴随严重副作用（大出血、骨折、脑损伤等）。

### 🌊 特殊液体（可饮用/注射）
- **血清素** – 注射后调节情绪，过量会产生抑郁。
- **瞬间治疗II** – 口服或外用/注射，快速恢复皮肤、肌肉、减少感染。
- **牛奶?（疑似）** – 饮用恢复饥渴但增加疾病，注射会感染。
- **橙汁汽水？** – 好喝但会引起不适。
- **昏睡红茶** – 饮用后极度快乐，短暂延迟后强制睡眠（带剧烈疼痛）。

---

## 🔧 特殊机制

- **截肢系统**：使用剑/斧类武器对感染严重的肢体（非腿部）可触发截肢小游戏。
- **核弹拆弹小游戏**：输入正确密码（正常随机生成）可延迟引爆，输入彩蛋密码 `114514` 则直接获得奖励。
- **郊狼 AED 功能**：对胸部使用可启动心脏复苏小游戏。
- **血清素动态平衡**：注射量影响快乐值和负面效果，过量会重置。
- **俄罗斯轮盘赌**：动态概率（随使用次数降低生存率），耐久消耗为 1/6。

---

## ⚠️ 注意事项

- **兼容性**：本模组基于 `CUCoreLib` 开发，**与 RSHLib 存在冲突**（这是 CCL 与 RSHLib 的底层问题，无法修复）。
- **多人联机**：仅提供最基础的支持，部分功能（如小游戏）可能无法在联机环境下正常工作。
- **成人内容**：模组包含极端暴力、自残、性暗示、有害物质等元素，请确保您已年满 18 岁并开启成人内容过滤。
- **自然刷新**：所有物品均已配置 `SpawnFrequency`，会在游戏世界中正常刷新。

---

## 🚧 未来计划

- 补全剩余未实装内容。
- 优化联机兼容性（尽力而为）。
- 增加更多“Gouxi-Tech”系列道具和事件。

---

## 🙏 致谢

感谢所有测试者和 `CUCoreLib` 的作者。祝您玩得开心，也希望您不要因为模组内容而讨厌狗曦（笑）。


# gouxi's funnyshit

> A collection of weird ideas from G0ux1 – hope you enjoy them. All items are set to spawn naturally in-game. Some features are still WIP and will be updated later.

---

## 📦 Mod Overview

This mod adds a large variety of new items, liquids, and mechanics to *Scav Prototype*, covering equipment, food, medicine, tools, weapons, utilities, and special liquids. Everything is themed around the "Gouxi-Tech" universe – full of parody, dark humor, and adult-oriented content.

### 🎒 Equipment
- **Tail Pouch** – wearable container, increases carry capacity and reduces encumbrance.
- **Coyote?! (DG Lab)** – device that stabilizes heart rate and can act as an AED (use on chest).
- **Subspace Bag** – massive backpack with shielding, but risks annihilation when battery depletes.

### 🍖 Food
- **Raw Fish** – from another dimension, may cause sickness.
- **Cooked Steak** – perfectly cooked steak with odd texture, restores hunger and happiness.

### 💊 Medical
- **Golden Apple** – heals internal/external injuries and boosts happiness.
- **Nerve Block Neutralizer** – removes "mindwipe" aftereffects, forces high-quality sleep and resets INT.

### ⚒️ Tools/Weapons (3 tiers)
- **Stone tools** (pickaxe, sword, axe, hoe, shovel) – basic harvesting and combat.
- **Iron tools** – higher durability and damage.
- **Diamond tools** – top-tier stats, with amputation capability (use on infected non-leg limbs to trigger minigame).

- **Flint & Steel** – fire starter.
- **Fishing Rod** – cast and reel to pull yourself toward target and maybe catch a fish (mending).

### 🧩 Utilities / Misc
- **Brain Overclock** – boosts speed/jump but damages brain.
- **Doll series** (Gouxi, Black-White Wolf, Huaimeng, Xieuxiu, Shadow Fox, Huli, etc.) – interactive, each with unique effects (happiness, stamina drain, liquid collection, etc.).
- **Fireball** – throwable explosive with audio cue.
- **Experience Bottle** – smash for large XP and unlock a random recipe.
- **Nuke (two versions)** – one explodes directly, the other requires a defuse minigame (easter egg code `114514` triggers reward).
- **Chip Remover/Implanter** – toggles "chipped" state, affecting brain stats and abilities.
- **Eat-Explode Box** – randomly gives food or explodes (25% chance).
- **EXP Pet Ticket** – use on head for happiness and pain relief.
- **Glowstone Dust, Gold Ingot, Iron Ingot, Diamond, Wooden Stick** – crafting materials.
- **Russian Roulette** – use on head; 1/6 chance of full heal, otherwise instant death (durability consumption).

### 🧪 Liquid Containers
- **Iron Bucket** – holds any liquid for drinking.
- **Empty Bottle** – pre-filled with "Instant Healing II".
- **Mini Barrel Syringe** – huge-capacity injector, triggers an injection minigame; powerful but with severe side effects (heavy bleeding, fractures, brain damage).

### 🌊 Special Liquids (drinkable/injectable)
- **Serotonin** – inject to regulate mood, overdose causes depression.
- **Instant Healing II** – oral or topical/injection, restores skin, muscle, reduces infection.
- **"Milk" (cum)** – restores hunger/thirst but increases sickness; injection causes infection.
- **Orange Soda** – tasty but causes discomfort.
- **Sleeping Red Tea** – euphoric, then forces sleep after a short delay (with intense pain).

---

## 🔧 Special Mechanics

- **Amputation System**: Use swords/axes on severely infected non-leg limbs to trigger amputation minigame.
- **Nuke Defuse Minigame**: Enter correct code (randomly generated) to delay explosion; enter easter egg `114514` to get rewards.
- **Coyote AED Function**: Use on chest to start a CPR minigame.
- **Serotonin Homeostasis**: Injection amount affects happiness and negative effects; overdose resets.
- **Russian Roulette**: Dynamic probability (survival chance decreases with use), consumes 1/6 durability per shot.

---

## ⚠️ Important Notes

- **Compatibility**: This mod is built on `CUCoreLib` and **conflicts with RSHLib** (underlying issue between CCL and RSHLib, cannot be fixed).
- **Multiplayer**: Only basic support – some features (like minigames) may not work properly in multiplayer.
- **Adult Content**: Contains extreme violence, self-harm, sexual themes, harmful substances – you must be 18+ and enable adult content filtering.
- **Natural Spawning**: All items have `SpawnFrequency` set and will appear in the game world normally.

---

## 🚧 Future Plans

- Complete remaining unimplemented features.
- Improve multiplayer compatibility (as much as possible).
- Add more "Gouxi-Tech" themed items and events.

---

## 🙏 Credits

Thanks to all testers and the author of `CUCoreLib`. Have fun, and please don't hate Gouxi because of this mod (laughs).

Author: G0ux1

Name: Bark
Description:
[url=https://github.com/CNCUMC/Bark][size=5]Bark[/size][/url] | [url=https://github.com/jimmyking9999999/CUCoreLib]CUCoreLib[/url]

[i]A mod utility library for [url=https://store.steampowered.com/app/3624440/Casualties_Unknown_Demo/]Casualties Unknown[/url], built on top of [url=https://github.com/jimmyking9999999/CUCoreLib]CUCoreLib[/url].[/i]

[i]Evolved from [url=https://github.com/Explosive-Hydra/Moss-Lib]Moss Lib[/url].[/i]

[line]

[size=4][b]Table of Contents[/b][/size]

Overview

Installation

Quick Start

Localization

Setting Options (BetterOptions)

Tools Reference

Constants Reference

[line]

[size=5]Overview[/size]

[b]Bark[/b] is a BepInEx plugin utility library for [b]Casualties Unknown[/b], extending [url=https://github.com/jimmyking9999999/CUCoreLib]CUCoreLib[/url] (CCL) with enhanced localization, settings, and game utility tools.

[b]Module list:[/b]

BetterLocale – Localization system built on CCL's LocaleRegistry

BetterOptions – CCL settings registration wrapper (Float/Int/Bool/Dropdown/Keybind)

ModLangGenBase – Language generator base class

GameInstances – Unified game instance access (Body, World, Console)

PlayerUtil – Player manipulation: TP, vitals, drugs, recovery, raw writes

SkillUtil – Skill level/XP manipulation

LimbUtil – Limb operations: healing, damage, status checks

WorldUtil – World manipulation: blocks, items

InventoryUtil – Inventory operations

ItemUtil – Item utilities: FindNearby, Repair, SetCondition

InputUtil – Input handling: mouse position, click waiting

LogUtil – Console logging + validation helpers

ConfigUtil – BepInEx config helpers

TextUtil – Rich text formatting: color, alpha, bold, italic, size

ToolsUtil – Argument validation, float/int parsing

Blocks – Strongly-typed block definitions

Items – Strongly-typed item definitions

Backgrounds – Background ID string constants

Keys – Key action constants

Slots – Inventory slot definitions

[line]

[size=5]Installation[/size]

Install [url=https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx]BepInEx 5.x[/url] for Casualties Unknown.

Install [url=https://github.com/jimmyking9999999/CUCoreLib]CUCoreLib[/url] — place [i]CUCoreLib.dll[/i] into [i]BepInEx/plugins/CUCoreLib/[/i].

Download the latest [i]Bark.dll[/i] from the [url=https://github.com/CNCUMC/Bark/releases]Releases[/url] page.

Place [i]Bark.dll[/i] into your [i]BepInEx/plugins/[/i] folder.

[quote][b]For mod developers:[/b] Reference [i]Bark.dll[/i] in your project, and add [i][BepInDependency("org.cucnmc.bark")][/i] to your plugin class.[/quote]
[line]

[size=5]Quick Start[/size]

[size=4]1. Add Dependencies[/size]
[code]
[BepInPlugin(Guid, Name, Version)]
[BepInDependency("net.cucorelib")] // CCL is required
[BepInDependency("org.cucnmc.bark")] // Bark extends CCL
public class MyPlugin : BaseUnityPlugin
{
// ...
}[/code]
[size=4]2. Localization[/size]
Bark provides [i]BetterLocale[/i] on top of CCL's [i]LocaleRegistry[/i]:
[code]
using Bark.BetterCCL;

// Get localized text (CCL → Bark defaults → key fallback)
string text = BetterLocale.GetOther("bark.feature.enabled");

// Define fallback translations via language generators:
// EnLangGenerator.cs
Other("bark.feature.enabled", "Enable Feature");

// ZhCnLangGenerator.cs
Other("bark.feature.enabled", "启用功能");[/code]See [url=Example/Lang/]Example/Lang/[/url] for sample generators.

[size=4]3. Register a Setting[/size]
[code]
using Bark.BetterCCL;

BetterOptions.Bool("bark", "feature_enabled", Setting.SettingCategory.Game, true);

// With custom category tab
BetterOptions.Bool("bark", "advanced_mode", "Bark", false);[/code]
[line]

[size=5]Localization[/size]

[size=4]Generators ([i]ModLangGenBase[/i])[/size]
[code]
public class EnLangGenerator : ModLangGenBase
{
protected override string LanguageCode => "EN";
protected override void BuildLocaleData()
{
Other("bark.tooltip.heat", "Hot enough to warp.");
Option("bark.game.test", "Test Mode", "Turns on the test mode");
}
}[/code]
[b]Methods and categories:[/b]

Item(key, value) → item

Building(key, value) → building

Moodle(key, value) → moodle

Other(key, value) → other

Option(key, label, description) → option (settings labels)

[size=4]BetterLocale API[/size]

[b]Get (retrieve localized text)[/b]

GetItem(key, args?) → item

GetBuilding(key, args?) → building

GetMoodle(key, args?) → moodle

GetOther(key, args?) → other

GetLog(key, args?) → log

GetCommand(key, args?) → command

GetOption(key, args?) → option

GetLiquid(key, args?) → liquid

GetTitle(key, args?) → title

[b]Has (check if translation exists)[/b]

HasKey(category, key) → any category

HasKeyItem(key) → item

HasKeyBuilding(key) → building

HasKeyMoodle(key) → moodle

HasKeyOther(key) → other

HasKeyLog(key) → log

HasKeyCommand(key) → command

HasKeyOption(key) → option

HasKeyLiquid(key) → liquid

HasKeyTitle(key) → title

[b]Other methods:[/b]

SetDefault(lang, cat, key, val) – Register fallback value

Flush() – Write all defaults to CCL locale directory

ToRichText(md) – Convert [b]Markdown[/b] to Unity Rich Text

StripMarkdown(md) – Strip markdown to plain text

[line]

[size=5]Setting Options (BetterOptions)[/size]
[code]
BetterOptions.Bool("ns", "key", Setting.SettingCategory.Game, true);
BetterOptions.Int("ns", "level", Setting.SettingCategory.Game, 5, 1, 10);
BetterOptions.Float("ns", "volume", Setting.SettingCategory.Audio, 0.8f, 0f, 1f);
BetterOptions.Dropdown("ns", "mode", Setting.SettingCategory.Game, 0, choices);
BetterOptions.Keybind("ns", "hotkey", Setting.SettingCategory.Input, KeyCode.F5);

// Custom category tab
BetterOptions.Bool("ns", "key", "My Mod Tab", false);[/code]
[line]

[size=5]Tools Reference[/size]

[size=4]LogUtil[/size]

Info(text, logger) – Log to console + BepInEx

Error(text, logger) – Log error

Warning(text, logger) – Log warning

CheckWorld(logger?) – Throw if no world loaded

CheckBody(logger?) – Throw if player body is null

CheckArgumentCount(args, min, logger?) – Validate argument count

CheckNotNullOrEmpty(val, name, logger?) – Validate string not empty

CheckParseFloat(s, logger?) – Parse float or throw

CheckParseInt(s, logger?) – Parse int or throw

PrintList(header, items, logger) – Print formatted list to console

PrintNumberedList(header, items, logger) – Print numbered list

[size=4]PlayerUtil[/size]

Tp(x, y) – Teleport player

PickItem(id, slot, force?) – Add item to inventory slot

IsAlive() / IsConscious() – State checks

GetBloodOxygen() / GetHeartRate() – Vital signs

HealAll() – Fully heal player

SetHunger(val) / SetThirst(val) – Raw writes

Thresholds.* – Constant threshold values

[size=4]WorldUtil[/size]

PlaceBlock(x, y, id) – Place a block

FillBlocks(sx, sy, ex, ey, id) – Fill area with blocks

PlaceItem(x, y, id) – Spawn an item

CheckForWorld() – Throw if no world

[size=4]SkillUtil[/size]

GetLevel(skill) – Get skill level

GetExperience(skill) – Get XP amount

SetLevelRaw(skill, level) – Set level directly

AddExperience(skill, xp) – Add experience

XpMultiplier – Get/set XP multiplier

[size=4]LimbUtil[/size]

GetLimb(index/slot/name) – Get limb by index or name

HasBrokenBone() / HasInfection() – Status checks

HealLimb(limb) – Full limb heal

SetSkinHealthRaw(limb, value) – Raw writes

[size=4]InventoryUtil[/size]

HasItem(id) – Check if holding item

GetItem(slot) – Get item by slot

GetAllItems() – Get all items

GetAllItemInfos() – Get all ItemInfo

FindById(id, out item) – Find item by ID

[size=4]ItemUtil[/size]

FindNearby(center, radius) – Find items in circular area

FindClosest(center, maxRadius) – Find nearest item

Repair(item) – Repair to full condition

SetCondition(item, val) – Set durability (0~1)

[size=4]InputUtil[/size]

WaitForLeftClick() – Coroutine: wait for click

WaitForRightClick() – Coroutine: wait for click

ushort blockId = Blocks.SteelTile; // implicit conversion
Blocks block = Blocks.FromId(6);[/code]

Author: CNCUMC

Name: MistalCry's Map
Description:
[b]中文/English[/b]
MistalCrysMap 是一个给 Casualties Unknown Demo 使用的轻量地图模组，提供小地图和大地图功能，方便探索、回路、寻找资源和避开危险。

[size=5]主要功能：[/size]
[list]
[*]显示小地图和大地图[/*]
[*]支持探索迷雾模式[/*]
[*]显示可交互资源、陷阱、商人、怪物、掉落物和 长老[/*]
[*]大地图顶部可以单独开关不同类别的标记[/*]
[*]支持鼠标中键放置导航标记，并显示玩家到标记点的指示线[/*]
[*]玩家位置带呼吸光圈，更容易在大地图上找到自己[/*]
[*]可选显示游戏对象自带精灵图，默认关闭[/*]
[*]大地图新增Center按钮，可直接把视角居中到玩家当前位置。（也可以按键盘home键）[/*]
[/list][size=4]如果不开精灵图，图标会这样显示：[/size]
[list]
[*]可交互的物体和容器显示为较亮的灰蓝色方块。[/*]
[*]交易者以绿色的 `$` 标记显示。[/*]
[*]敌人以红色小方块显示，其标记位置会随着移动而变化。[/*]
[*]荆棘背长老作为独立的boss标记显示，并可在大地图上单独切换。[/*]
[*]掉落物品以持续的黄色点显示。[/*]
[/list][size=5]默认操作：[/size]
[size=4]你可以在设置里的游戏玩法（gameplay），更改默认按钮、是否开启探索模式、小地图的形状和大小[/size]
[list]
[*]M：显示或隐藏小地图，打开大地图时用于关闭大地图[/*]
[*]右键点击小地图：打开大地图[/*]
[*]滚轮：缩放地图[/*]
[*]大地图右键拖动：平移地图[/*]
[*]中键点击地图：放置或更新导航标记[/*]
[*]Clear Mark：删除导航标记[/*]
[/list][size=5]安装方法：[/size]
需要 BepInEx。
把 MistalCrysMap.dll 放入 BepInEx/plugins 文件夹，然后启动游戏即可。
设置项可以在游戏 Settings -> Game 中找到。


[size=4][b]English Description[/b][/size]
MistalCrysMap is a lightweight map mod for Casualties Unknown Demo. It adds a minimap and a fullscreen map to make exploration, navigation, resource hunting, and danger awareness easier.
[size=5]Features:[/size]
[list]
[*]Adds a minimap and a fullscreen map[/*]
[*]Optional exploration fog mode[/*]
[*]Shows interactable resources, traps, traders, enemies, dropped items, and thornbackelder[/*]
[*]Fullscreen map category toggles[/*]
[*]Middle mouse waypoint marker with a guidance line from the player to the marker[/*]
[*]Breathing halo around the player marker for better visibility[/*]
[*]Optional sprite icons for map markers, disabled by default[/*]
[*]Performance optimizations for enemy-heavy layers, earthquakes, and block destruction updates[/*]
[*]The main map has added a "Center" button, which enables you to directly center the view at the player's current location. (You can also press the home key on the keyboard) [/*]
[/list][size=4][b]If the sprite image is not enabled, the icon will be displayed like this:[/b][/size]
[list]
[*]- Interactable objects and containers are shown as brighter gray-blue squares.[/*]
[*]- Traders are shown as green `$` markers.[/*]
[*]- Crystal enemies and animal enemies are shown as small red squares and their marker position follows movement.[/*]
[*]- Thornback Elder is shown as its own boss marker and can be toggled separately on the large map.[/*]
[*]- Dropped items are shown as persistent yellow dots.[/*]
[/list][size=5]Default Controls:[/size]
[size=4]You can change the default buttons, whether to enable the exploration mode, the shape and size of the mini-map, etc. in the "Gameplay" section of the settings.[/size]
[list]
[*]M: Show or hide the minimap, or close the fullscreen map[/*]
[*]Right click minimap: Open fullscreen map[/*]
[*]Mouse wheel: Zoom map[/*]
[*]Right drag on fullscreen map: Pan map[/*]
[*]Middle click on map: Place or update waypoint marker[/*]
[*]Clear Mark: Remove waypoint marker[/*]
[/list][size=5]Installation:[/size]
Requires BepInEx.
Put MistalCrysMap.dll into the BepInEx/plugins folder, then start the game.
Settings can be found under Settings -> GamePlay.
Author: MistalCry

Name: Potato's Craft Everything MOD
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
[left][size=3][color=#D4D4D8]I've done some no loot runs, which basically means I couldn't get uncraftable items in the game. The whole point of the run was crafting what you needed, and I was sad to see that there wasn't many craftables, so, using CraftingFramework, I was able to add more crafting recipes` to the usually uncraftable items![/color][/size]

Although I've tried my best, I'm not the best at balancing. If you think something is overpriced or underpriced in the game, tell me what you'd like me to change! (I want to keep this as balanced as possible.)

EVERYONE must have the mod for it to work in multiplayer.

[ ! MOD IS IN A WORK IN PROGRESS ! ]

Currently only adds crafting for:
Arm Warmers, Automated External Defibrillator, Auto-Zoom Goggles,  Balaclava, Bandolier, Belly Armor, Blindfold, Braingrow, Carapace, Cardboard Box, Circuit Board, Dust Mask, Electronic Watch, Fanny Pack, Filter Straw, Grappling Hook, Grav-Bag, Heroin, Holiday Hat, Jetpack, Knee Pads, Latex Gloves, Leg Pouch, Liquid Centrifuge, Manual Defibrillator, Medkit, Mindwipe, Mp3 Player, Pistol, Plastic Bag, Pouch, Pump Action Shotgun, Purse, Rifle, Ripped Bag, Safety Glasses, Sleeping Bag, Small Backpack, Sneakers, Space Drain, Toolbox, Torn Shirt, Trash Bag.[/left]

[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
[color=#d4d4d8]1. Set up CraftingFramework.
2. Locate the crafting framework file and click on it.
3. Drag and drop the contents of this mod into the recipes folder. (If updating the mod, click replace.)
4. Boot up the game and start a run![/color]

[size=4][b]Main features[/b][/size]
[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]Makes almost all uncraftable items craftable.[/color][/size]

[size=4][b]Requirements[/b][/size]
[color=#d4d4d8]Install CraftingFramework[/color]

[size=4][b]Shout outs[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]XVoltyxX for making the CraftingFramework mod![/color]
Author: Sp00kzie

Name: Tacticool Guns
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=3]An addon for [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/122?tab=description][b]This[/b][/url] mod. It adds in 3 (May add more) modern guns inspired by real guns I thought was cool. These guns are;

- [b]Lunatic MRGG-A
[/b]A selective fire battle rifle made by [b]Lunatic Armory[/b] firing 6.5 Creedmoor rounds from a 20 round magazine. Can kill most things in a single shot. Full auto is not recommended. Because reasons.

- [b]Lunatic Super Duty .300 
[/b]A Short barreled rifle made for the civilian market firing the .300 Blackout caliber. It's relatively quiet because of its suppressor and is only limited to semi auto.

- [b]RsH 12
[/b]Hand cannon firing essentially .50 Cal. Really loud. [/size][/color]
