Name: it's owover
Description:
[color=#8e7cc3][size=5][b]what's this??[/b][/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=2]owoo?[/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=2]Use up to [/size][size=3][u][b][color=#d4505a]s[/color][color=#fa6a0a]e[/color][color=#f9a31b]v[/color][color=#1aaa3e]e[/color][color=#289cc4]n[/color][color=#994a90]![/color][/b][/u][/size][size=2] types of modifiers to change the dialogue in the game, ranging from cutesy to entirely incomprehensible![/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=2]Provides choice on where modifiers are applied: Dialogue, EPDAs, tooltips, and [/size][/color][color=#00ffff][size=2]everywhere[/size][/color][color=#D4D4D8][size=2]![/size][/color]

[color=#8e7cc3][size=4][b]Modifiers[/b][/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=2][b]Lisp[/b]: give evewyone a wisp so they can't pwonounce w or w[/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=2][b]Stutter[/b]: a-a-applied to the start of some w-words...[/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=2][b]Nya[/b]: myakes myore dialogue nyow nyaified.[/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=2][b]Tilde[/b]: make sentences a bit more playful with tildes~[/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=2][b]Excitement[/b]: exclaim your emotions!!! suffer confusion????? woah..............[/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=2][b]Faces[/b]: a little emotion c:[/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=2][b]Chaos[/b]: the mowost chaowotic mowodifier uwunder the suwun. uwunreadable.[/size][/color]

[color=#D4D4D8][size=2]The chance for any modifier to be triggered can be changed in the settings menu, under Gameplay.[/size][/color]

[color=#8e7cc3][size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size][/color]
[size=2]Same dealio as most mods. BepInEx, place .dll in plugins.[/size]
[size=2]BepInEx install steps:[/size]
[spoiler][color=#D4D4D8][size=2]1. Download [/size][/color][color=#8e7cc3][size=2][font=Courier New][b]BepInEx_win_x64[/b][/font][/size][/color][color=#D4D4D8][size=2] (even if you're on [/size][/color][color=#ff00ff][size=2]Linux[/size][/color][color=#D4D4D8][size=2]) from their [url=https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx/releases]releases[/url]. I used version [/size][/color][color=#8e7cc3][size=2][b]5.4.23.4[/b][/size][/color][color=#D4D4D8][size=2].

2. Unzip the file contents into the root folder of the game. In the same directory as the [/size][/color][color=#8e7cc3][size=2][b].exe[/b][/size][/color][color=#D4D4D8][size=2] file, there should be a [/size][/color][color=#8e7cc3][size=2][b]winhttp.dll[/b][/size][/color][color=#D4D4D8][size=2] file if you've done it right.

2.5. [/size][/color][size=2][b][color=#ff00ff]Linux users[/color][/b][color=#D4D4D8][b]:[/b] Add the following command to your launch options, on steam found in Properties > General > Launch Options: [/color][b][color=#6d9eeb][font=Courier New]WINEDLLOVERRIDES="winhttp=n,b" %command%[/font][/color][/b][color=#D4D4D8]

3. Launch the game. This will initialize BepInEx. If it worked, in Casualties Unknown Demo > BepInEx, there should exist a [/color][color=#8e7cc3][b]plugins[/b][/color][color=#D4D4D8] folder.[/color][/size][/spoiler]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=2]From there, place the provided [/size][/color][color=#8e7cc3][size=2][b].dll[/b][/size][/color][color=#D4D4D8][size=2] file into [b]BepInEx/plugins[/b][/size][/color]

[color=#8e7cc3][size=4][b]Compatibility[/b][/size][/color]
[size=2]Untested with multiplayer. Will probably work, but players will see different results. Lemme know if this is something you really want :)[/size]
[size=2]Should work with any mods that change dialogue strings.[/size]
[size=2]This mod performs the following patches:[/size]
[size=2][font=Courier New][color=#8e7cc3]Postfix[/color] [color=#1e84cc]Locale.GetString[/color][/font][/size]
[size=2][font=Courier New][color=#8e7cc3]Postfix [/color][color=#1e84cc]Locale.GetPdaNote(int)[/color][/font][/size]
[size=2][font=Courier New][color=#8e7cc3]Postfix [/color][color=#1e84cc]Locale.GetNote[/color][/font][/size]
[size=2][font=Courier New][color=#8e7cc3]Postfix [/color][color=#1e84cc]Locale.GetItem[/color][/font][/size]
[size=2][font=Courier New][color=#8e7cc3]Postfix [/color][color=#1e84cc]Locale.GetBuilding[/color][/font][/size]
[size=2][font=Courier New][color=#8e7cc3]Postfix [/color][color=#1e84cc]Locale.GetMoodle[/color][/font][/size]
[size=2][font=Courier New][color=#8e7cc3]Postfix [/color][color=#1e84cc]Locale.GetOther[/color][/font][/size]
[size=2][font=Courier New][color=#8e7cc3]Postfix [/color][color=#1e84cc]Locale.GetTutorial[/color][/font][/size]
[size=2][font=Courier New][color=#8e7cc3]Postfix [/color][color=#1e84cc]Locale.GetPauseQuote[/color][/font][/size]
[size=2][font=Courier New][color=#8e7cc3]Postfix[/color] [color=#1e84cc]Settings[/color][/font][/size][color=#1e84cc][size=2][font=Courier New].DefaultSettings[/font][/size][/color]
[size=2][font=Courier New][color=#8e7cc3]Prefix[/color] [/font][/size][color=#1e84cc][size=2][font=Courier New]Talk.Talker(List<string>, Limb, bool, bool)[/font][/size][/color][color=#6d9eeb][size=2][font=Courier New] [color=#8e7cc3](No skip)[/color][/font][/size][/color]

[color=#8e7cc3][b][size=4]Bug reporting[/size][/b][/color]
[size=2]There may be bugs I haven't noticed! If you find a bug, let me know and I'll try to fix it quickly. Guide for that:[/size]
[spoiler][size=2]The more information is provided, the quicker developers are able to address the issue!
Any information is always better than no information. Even if you can't get much, making any post may help.[/size]
[size=2]Bug reports should go into the [b]Bugs[/b] section of the mod page.

[b]Description[/b] - Details of what was expected to happen, and what happened instead. Any information that might suggest what the cause is. It can't be fixed if we don't know what the issue is!

[b]Replicability[/b] - If you can give steps to reliably reproduce the issue, that's the most helpful thing! It makes it quick to verify the issue and test fixes.

[b]Existing bug reports[/b] - Try to check if there's already been a report of this bug. You could add more information to that report, or find an explanation of what's going on.

[b]Game version[/b] - This can be seen on the main menu in the bottom right. Code can change a lot between versions!

[b]Log file[/b] - This is located in {game_folder}/BepInEx/LogOutput.log. It provides a list of your mods and their versions, which are very helpful for tracking down the issue!

[b]Updating[/b] - Try to make sure your mods and game are up to date, especially the mod that has the bug. It might have been changed, or fixed.

Modding is not simple work, and most of us do this for free out of passion in our spare time. Be considerate. It might take time to fix things.[/size][/spoiler]

[color=#6d9eeb][size=3][font=Courier New][color=#8e7cc3][b]footnotes[/b][/color][/font][/size][/color]
i have a [color=#8e7cc3][url=https://discord.gg/2SrT3eCPKs]discord server[/url][/color] if you wanna say hi or talk about a mod

Name: Sound Cannon Vine Boom
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
Replaces the unpleasant default sound cannon firing noise with a funny vine boom. It's just as modified and reactive as the original, just now with comedic effect.

[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=3]You need BepInEx first, like every other mod![/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=3]Extract the zip file, and put the folder into "BepInEx/plugins/" under the game's directory.[/size][/color]

[size=4][b]Shout outs[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]Originally a commission for @rflxvr on Discord![/color]
Author: CJendantix

Name: AdditionalTraps
Description:
[size=4][b]Additional Traps v1.0.0[/b][/size]
[size=4][b]Features: [/b][/size]
[list]
[*][size=3]Add five more traps (Medical Pile,  Nuclear Bomb, Poison Mine, Frost Mine and Piston Trap) to make the game even tougher.[/size][/*]
[*][size=3]Multiplayer based on KrokMP is supported. Both the server and the client need to be installed. (Optional features)[/size][/*]

Name: no tooltips while transferring Liquids
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]small QoL mod that improves liquid transfer controls.

This mod hides inventory item tooltips while transferring liquids, preventing them from covering the transfer UI. It also adds an optional Snap feature for faster and more precise liquid measurements.[/color]

[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]1. Download Mod
2. Put the Mod file in here: "Casualties Unknown Demo\BepInEx\plugins"
[/color]3. Play!

[size=4][b]Main features[/b][/size]

Author: Elysian0166

Name: Urine enjoyment mod.
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=2]Changes the "urine" fluid to provide a mood buff when consumed. If you're freaky like that.[/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=2]All other effects of urine, such as sickness, are unchanged.[/size][/color]

[color=#D4D4D8][size=4][b]Compatibility[/b][/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=2]Works for Linux and Windows. Mac untested, probably same steps as Linux.[/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=2]Works on the Steam release of Casualties: Unknown version 7.0. Probably most others too, it's dead simple.[/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=2]Unless a mod really overhauls how data is stored, shouldn't conflict with anything.[/size][/color]

[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
[size=2][color=#D4D4D8]Requires that BepInEx is installed in your game. Steps for that:[/color][/size]
[spoiler][color=#D4D4D8]1. Download [b]BepInEx_win_x64[/b] (even if you're on Linux) from their [url=https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx/releases]releases[/url]. I used version [b]5.4.23.4[/b].

2. Unzip the file contents into the root folder of the game. In the same directory as the [b].exe[/b] file, there should be a [b]winhttp.dll[/b] file if you've done it right.

2.5. [b]Linux users:[/b] Add the following command to your launch options, on steam found in Properties > General > Launch Options: [b]WINEDLLOVERRIDES="winhttp=n,b" %command%[/b]

3. Launch the game. This will initialize BepInEx. If it worked, in Casualties Unknown Demo > BepInEx, there should exist a [b]plugins[/b] folder.[/color][/spoiler]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=2]From there, place the provided [b].dll[/b] file into [b]BepInEx/plugins[/b][/size][/color]

[color=#D4D4D8][size=4][b]Endorsement[/b][/size][/color]
[size=2]I don't care if you do it for this mod. But do endorse the mods you like. It helps with rankings, and more importantly it helps make modders feel better about their stuff.[/size]
Author: BalaurBohemianBroken

Name: WearableHider
Description:
[color=#64d8b8][size=4][b]Wearable Hider[/b][/size][/color]

Wearable Hider 是一个简单的便利性 Mod。

如果你不喜欢某个装备的外观或者不希望自己的oc被部分装备遮挡，可以试试这个mod，它可以自定义隐藏角色身上已穿装备的外观，（兼容自定义穿戴物）但不会改变装备本身。护甲、重量、保温、耐久、容器、物品栏图标、提示信息和穿戴状态都不会受到影响。打开物品栏，将鼠标悬停到已穿戴装备上，按 [color=#ffd166][b]G[/b][/color] 就可以隐藏或显示该类装备外观，并且会记住你的喜好，不需要每次都设置。

这个 Mod 也让 [color=#ffd166][b]智力等级[/b][/color] 更有用。随着智力等级提升，开锁提示会逐渐变得更精准，18密码小游戏也会自动预填一部分密码。它不会自动开锁，不会自动填完整密码，也不会修改原版开锁成功判定。

只需要把 [color=#ffd166][b]WearableHider.dll[/b][/color] 放进 [color=#ffd166][b]BepInEx/plugins[/b][/color] 后启动游戏即可。

更新1.0.1，修复了 低智力等级绿条范围提示不会随机偏移的问题
现已提供单独服装隐藏系统和带有生存辅助Qol两个版本
多人模式可使用，因为是本地小插件
[color=#64d8b8][b]后续更新自定义配置


Wearable Hider is a simple quality-of-life mod.

If you do not like the look of certain equipment, or if some worn items cover your OC, you can try this mod. It lets you customize and hide the appearance of equipped wearables on your character. It also supports custom wearable items. The equipment itself is not changed. Armor, weight, warmth, durability, containers, inventory icons, tooltips, and equip state are all unaffected. Open your inventory, hover over an equipped wearable item, and press [color=#ffd166]G[/color] to hide or show that item type. The mod will remember your preference, so you do not need to set it every time.

This mod also makes [color=#ffd166]INT[/color] more useful. As your INT level increases, lockpicking hints become gradually more accurate, and keypad minigames can automatically prefill part of the code. It does not automatically open locks, complete the full password, or change the original lockpicking success rules.

Simply put [color=#ffd166]WearableHider.dll[/color] into [color=#ffd166]BepInEx/plugins[/color] and start the game.
[/b][/color]
[color=#64d8b8][b]Update 1.0.1: Fixed an issue where the green bar range indicator for low intelligence levels would not shift randomly.
Separate versions are now available: one with the outfit-hiding system only, and one with both the outfit-hiding system and survival-assist QoL features.
Multiplayer mode is supported, as this is a local mini-plugin.
Custom configuration may be added in future updates.[/b][/color]

Author: Yraganchic

Name: SmartCraft
Description:
[b]SmarterCraft – Crafting Material Filter[/b]
In the vanilla game, the crafting system automatically picks the first matching item from your inventory, often using fresh, high‑condition materials or valuable liquids without asking you. This can be frustrating when you want to save your best supplies for later or use a specific item for a recipe.
[b]SmarterCraft[/b] solves this by introducing five intelligent filtering modes that you can switch between instantly, plus a container chain‑favourite system for even finer control.
[b]Five Crafting Modes:[/b]
[list]
[*][b]Normal Mode (default)[/b] – Skips favourited items and everything inside favourited containers, protecting them from being used. Perfect for safeguarding your precious resources while crafting with the rest.[/*]
[*][b]Favourited First Mode[/b] – Prioritises using favourited items (and contents of favourited containers). If none are available, it falls back to normal items. Great when you want to consume your marked supplies first.[/*]
[*][b]Favourited Only Mode[/b] – Strictly uses only favourited items (and contents of favourited containers). Nothing else will be touched – gives you absolute precision.[/*]
[*][b]Ground First Mode[/b] – Prefers items lying on the ground; only when none are available does it use items from your inventory or backpack. Ideal for scavenging without depleting your carried reserves.[/*]
[*][b]Ground Only Mode[/b] – Uses only items that are currently on the ground (not in your inventory, backpack, or any container). Perfect for risky expeditions where you want to keep your backpack untouched.[/*]
[/list][b]Container Chain‑Favourite System:[/b]
When you favourite a container (like a backpack or box), all items inside it automatically inherit the favourite status – protecting or prioritising the entire set in one click.
You can toggle this feature on/off at any time with [b]Ctrl+G[/b] – the choice is yours.
[b]Controls:[/b]
[list]
[*][b]Ctrl + F[/b] – Cycle through the five modes.[/*]
[*][b]Ctrl + G[/b] – Toggle container chain‑favourite on/off.
Clear on‑screen alerts show you the current mode and chain status. The crafting panel updates in real time, so you can immediately see which materials are available under the current rules.[/*]
[/list][b]Special Exemption:[/b] Heat sources (campfires, etc.) are always exempt from all filters.
[b]Key Benefits:[/b]
[list]
[*]No UI clutter – the plugin adds no extra buttons or menus.[/*]
[*]Works with existing saves – drop in and play.[/*]
[*]Lightweight and performance‑friendly – only a few hooks, no asset loading.[/*]
[*]Fully compatible with the latest version of [i]Casualties Unknown[/i].[/*]
[/list][b]Installation:[/b]
Place 
[code]SmarterCraft.dll[/code] into your 
[code]BepInEx/plugins[/code] folder. The plugin will load automatically on game start.
[line]
[b]SmarterCraft – 合成材料过滤器[/b]
在原版游戏中，合成系统会自动从背包里挑选第一个匹配的物品，往往会浪费新鲜、高耐久度的好材料或珍贵液体，而且无法干预。当您想保留优质物资以备后用，或者想为某个配方指定特定物品时，这会非常恼人。
[b]SmarterCraft[/b] 通过引入五种智能过滤模式，以及独特的容器连锁收藏系统，让您完全掌控合成材料的选择。
[b]五种合成模式：[/b]
[list]
[*][b]正常模式（默认）[/b] – 跳过已收藏的物品以及被收藏容器内的所有物品，保护它们不被消耗。非常适合保护珍贵资源，同时用其他物品正常合成。[/*]
[*][b]收藏优先模式[/b] – 优先使用已收藏的物品（以及被收藏容器内的物品）。如果没有可用收藏品，则回退到普通物品。当您想先消耗标记过的物资时非常实用。[/*]
[*][b]仅收藏模式[/b] – 严格只使用已收藏的物品（以及被收藏容器内的物品）。其他任何物品都不会被触碰 – 提供绝对精准的控制。[/*]
[*][b]地面优先模式[/b] – 优先使用地面上的物品；仅当没有地面物品时才使用背包或身上的物品。非常适合拾荒而不消耗随身物资。[/*]
[*][b]仅地面模式[/b] – 只使用当前扔在地上的物品（不在背包、容器或身上）。完美适用您希望保持背包物资完好无损。[/*]
[/list][b]容器连锁收藏系统：[/b]
当您收藏一个容器（如背包或箱子）时，其内部所有物品会自动继承收藏状态 – 一键保护或优先整个容器组。
您可以随时通过 [b]Ctrl+G[/b] 开启或关闭此功能 – 一切由您决定。
[b]操作方式：[/b]
[list]
[*][b]Ctrl + F[/b] – 循环切换五种模式。[/*]
[*][b]Ctrl + G[/b] – 切换容器连锁收藏的开关。
屏幕中央会弹出清晰的提示，显示当前模式和连锁状态。合成面板会实时更新，您能立即看到在当前规则下哪些材料可用。[/*]
[/list][b]特殊豁免：[/b] 热源（篝火等）始终无视所有过滤规则，不会遇到任何阻碍。
[b]主要优点：[/b]
[list]
[*]不增加任何 UI 按钮或菜单，不干扰原有界面。[/*]
[*]兼容现有存档，即装即用。[/*]
[*]轻量化，性能友好 – 只修改少量代码，不加载额外资源。[/*]
[*]完全兼容最新版本的《Casualties Unknown》。[/*]
[/list][b]安装方法：[/b]
将 
[code]SmarterCraft.dll[/code] 放入 
[code]BepInEx/plugins[/code] 文件夹，游戏启动时会自动加载。
Author: stf7799

Name: Escape From Casualties
Description:
[center][url=https://github.com/Shinkudaisuki/Escape-From-Casualties-Plugin][img]https://img.shields.io/badge/github-repo-blue?logo=github[/img][/url][/center]
[b]Description[/b]

Escape From Casualties is a BepInEx plugin for [b]Casualties: Unknown Demo[/b] that brings the iconic stims and injectors from [b]Escape From Tarkov[/b] into the game.
It adds [b]22 single-use injectors[/b], faithfully recreated from EFT, each with its own positive effects and side effects. Patch yourself up, buff your stats before a fight, or take a risky homemade cocktail and hope for the best.

All items use the game's native medical item system, so they can be used directly from the inventory or through the medical interface, and every injector is fully localized.

[i]Note: Subjects are not human. The effects of these injectors may be significantly stronger or weaker than in the source game.[/i]

[b]Installation instructions[/b]

1. Install BepInEx for [b]Casualties: Unknown Demo[/b].
2. Install [b]RshLib[/b] and [b]MossLib[/b] into the game's BepInEx plugins folder.
3. Download [b]EscapeFromCasualties.zip[/b].
4. Extract all contents into the game's plugins folder:
[b]BepInEx/plugins/[/b]
5. Launch the game. Language files are generated automatically on first run.

[b]Main features[/b]

• Adds 22 new single-use injectors faithfully recreated from Escape From Tarkov.
• Each injector has tailored effects: pain relief, stat buffs, healing, bleeding control, antidotes, temperature changes, and more.
• Realistic side effects (dehydration, exhaustion, sickness, delayed crashes) that mirror the source material.
• Usable directly from the inventory or through the medical interface.
• Full localization support (English, Simplified Chinese, and more).
• Custom syringe use sound.
• Concussion removal and tunnel vision effects are remapped to consciousness increase/decrease.
• Stats (excluding health restoration and skill changes) are based on the original values from Escape From Tarkov.

[b]Included injectors[/b]

• Morphine - painkiller (5min), removes concussion; reduces hunger & thirst.
• L1 (Norepinephrine) - painkiller (2min), STR+2/RES+1 (2min); increases hunger & thirst.
• Tramadol - painkiller + STR+1/RES+2 + stamina regen (3min), removes concussion; hunger & thirst crash.
• Adrenaline - painkiller + STR+1/RES+1 (1min), light heal; delayed hunger & thirst crash.
• Propital - painkiller (4min), RES+2 (5min), slow heal, reduces sickness; delayed tunnel vision.
• eTG-change - removes concussion, rapid heal, immunity, metabolism boost; severe hunger crash & sickness after.
• xTG-12 - antidote + poison immunity (delayed onset); causes sickness.
• Perfotoran (Blue Blood) - antidote, blood regen, stops bleeding, anti-radiation; severe hunger crash & sickness after.
• AHF1-M - stops bleeding (1min); causes thirst.
• Zagustin - stops bleeding (3min); severe dehydration & sickness after.
• PNB (Product 16) - STR+2, heal, removes concussion (40s); severe sickness after.
• P22 (Product 22) - RES+3 (1min); stamina drain after.
• Meldonin - STR+1/RES+2 + stamina regen (15min); slow hunger & thirst drain.
• SJ1 - STR+2/RES+2 (3min); hunger & thirst drain after.
• SJ6 - RES+3 + stamina regen (4min); tunnel vision after.
• 3-(b-TG) - STR+1/INT+3 + stamina regen (4min); hunger drain after.
• 2A2-(b-TG) - STR+2/RES+2/INT+1 (15min); continuous thirst drain.
• Obdolbos - random buffs and debuffs; may cause instant ragdoll.
• Obdolbos 2 - STR+4/RES+4/INT+2 (30min); continuous health and stamina drain.
• M.U.L.E. - STR+4/RES+4 (15min); slow health drain.
• SJ9 - lowers body temperature (5min); blood drain and pain after.
• SJ12 - INT+3 (10min), lowers temperature; dangerous temperature spike after.

[b]Requirements[/b]

• Casualties: Unknown Demo
• BepInEx
• RshLib (hard dependency)
• MossLib (hard dependency)

[b]Credits[/b]

Item names, descriptions, and effects are inspired by [b]Escape From Tarkov[/b] by Battlestate Games.
Built on top of RshLib and MossLib.

[b]Disclaimer[/b]

This is a fan-made mod and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Battlestate Games or the developers of Casualties: Unknown.
Author: shinkudaisuki

Name: Temporal Panic Button(Time stop)
Description:
中文/ENGLISH
如果你更新了KrokMP mod。也请下载本MOD适配的版本。
If you have updated the KrokMP mod. Also, please download the version that is compatible with this MOD.
ver1.0.4：
修复了KrokMP和其依赖项的兼容性检查问题。 此版本兼容KrokMP4.0.x
Fixed the compatibility check issues with KrokMP and its dependencies. This version is compatible with KrokMP 4.0.x.
ver1.0.3：
新增了调整屏幕上方状态栏大小的功能。 此版本兼容KrokMP4.0.x
A new function has been added to adjust the size of the status bar at the top of the screen. compatible with KrokMP4.0.x
ver1.0.2：
此版本兼容KrokMP4.0.x
compatible with KrokMP4.0.x
ver1.0.1：
修复了多人时停不同步的问题，新增了多人模式下智力升级模式遵循主机设置。此版本兼容KrokMP3.1.2
fixed the issue of inconsistent synchronization when playing with multiple players. A new feature has been added where the intelligence upgrade mode in multiplayer mode follows the settings of the console. compatible with KrokMP3.1.2

[b][url=https://github.com/MistalCry/Cas-Unk-TemporalPanicButton][size=5]Project repository link:github[/size][/url][/b]
[b]如果游戏出现了问题或者bug，请优先认为是本MOD导致的问题，因为我的代码能力相当垃圾。[/b]
[b]If there are any issues or bugs in the game, please first assume that they are caused by this MOD. Because my programming skills are quite poor.
[size=5]中文[/size][/b]
Temporal Panic Button 是一个娱乐向模组。仅供娱乐，烦请不要较真。多人联机仅较少测试，如有BUG、建议欢迎提出。
它会在玩家触发地雷、炮台类陷阱，或按下手动按键时发动时停。时停期间，发动者可以行动、治疗、投掷和射击；世界、陷阱、怪物、炸药倒计时和未获得时停权限的玩家会被暂停。

[b][size=4]功能概览[/size][/b]
- 支持地雷、炮台 / 枪雷、手动按键触发时停。
- 默认启用智力成长模式：智力越高，时停越久，冷却越短。
- 支持 KrokMP 多人联机同步：多人可以重叠发动时停，只有当前拥有时停权限的玩家能动。
- 时停时有蓝色画面、冲击波、开始 / 结束特效、音效、攻击姿态和 Observer 当作替身。
- 时停期间暂停玩家流血、失去意识、身体数值变化。
- 时停期间可以治疗自己，并可选择无视疼痛和意识降低带来的医疗速度惩罚。
- 时停期间投掷物会停在空中，时停结束后继续按投掷方向和力度飞出。
- 时停期间枪械可以射击并产生延迟弹道表现，伤害在时停结束后结算。
- 时停期间会阻止部分陷阱继续触发或追踪，包括弹跳垫、捕熊夹、线圈、尖刺陷阱、声波炮。
- 支持剪短炸药功能：暂停 Dynamite 倒计时，并可剪短引线让下一次使用后几乎立刻爆炸。

[b][size=4]安装[/size][/b]
1. 安装 BepInEx。
2. 将 TemporalPanicButton.dll 放入：BepInEx/plugins/
3. 启动游戏，在 Settings -> GamePlay 中调整本模组设置。加了中文的话，大概是游戏玩法那一栏。
4.加入时停音效
[b]默认没有开始、结束时停的音效！如需自定义音效，在 DLL 同目录下创建或使用自动生成的资源文件夹：[/b]
BepInEx/plugins/TemporalPanicButtonAssets/
可放入以下文件：
开始时停音效：timestop_start.wav或.ogg
结束时停音效： timestop_end.wav 或.ogg
同名 `.wav` 和 `.ogg` 同时存在时，模组会优先加载可用文件。

[b][size=4]设置项[/size][/b]
设置位置：Settings -> GamePlay ----设置->游戏玩法
[list]
[*]Temporal Panic Button（默认：开启）总开关。关闭后不再触发时停。[/*]
[*]Intelligence Growth Mode（默认：开启）开启后时停时间和冷却由智力决定。[/*]
[*]Time Stop Duration（默认：5 秒）手动模式下的时停时长。[/*]
[*]Time Stop Cooldown（默认：15 秒）手动模式下的冷却时间。[/*]
[*]Trigger On Mines（默认：开启）踩到地雷时触发时停。[/*]
[*]Trigger On Turrets（默认：开启）触发炮台 / 枪雷时触发时停。[/*]
[*]Manual Time Stop（默认：开启）允许按键手动触发时停。[/*]
[*]Manual Time Stop Key（默认：V）手动触发时停的按键。[/*]
[*]Steady Medical Hands（默认：开启）忽略疼痛和意识降低带来的医疗速度惩罚。[/*]
[*]Time Stop Effect Intensity（默认：1）时停视觉特效强度，范围 0–2。[/*]
[*]Time Stop Sound Volume（默认：0.9）时停音效音量，范围 0–1。[/*]
[/list][b][size=4]智力升级模式[/size][/b]
默认开启。开启后，玩家不能直接通过设置菜单决定时停时长和冷却，而是通过智力等级成长。
多人联机时，Intelligence Growth Mode （智力升级模式）现在遵循主机设置。主机开启时，客机会按开启处理；主机关闭时，客机会按关闭处理，不再使用客机自己的本地开关。
稍微增加点可玩性？
[list]
[*]智力低于 7---尚未习得时停，不能主动发动。[/*]
[*]智力 7---解锁时停，时长约 4 秒，冷却约 240 秒。[/*]
[*]智力 20---达到满级时停，时长约 20 秒，冷却约 120 秒。[/*]
[/list]7 到 20 级之间会缓慢成长，成长曲线不是完全线性，后期提升会更明显一些。

如果关闭 Intelligence Growth Mode，则使用 Time Stop Duration和 Time Stop Cooldown中设置的固定数值。

[b][size=4]玩法说明[/size][/b]
[size=4]触发时停[/size]
[list]
[*]踩到地雷。[/*]
[*]触发炮台 / 枪雷。[/*]
[*]按下手动时停键，默认是 `V`。[/*]
[/list]手动时停会在暂停菜单、交易菜单、容器菜单等非正常游玩界面会阻止手动触发。

[b][size=4]时停期间[/size][/b]

[list]
[*]- 发动者可以移动和播放正常移动动画。[/*]
[*]- 世界中的大部分物体、陷阱、怪物和倒计时会暂停。[/*]
[*]- 玩家身体状态会冻结，流血、失水、失去意识等数值不会继续恶化。[/*]
[*]- 可以打开医疗界面治疗自己。[/*]
[*]- 如果开启 `Steady Medical Hands`，医疗小游戏速度会按正常状态计算。[/*]
[*]- 投掷物脱手后会浮空，时停结束后继续飞出。[/*]
[*]- 枪械射击会产生时停弹道表现，实际命中和伤害在时停结束后结算。[/*]
[*]- 屏幕顶部会显示自己的时停 / 冷却状态；如果别人正在时停而自己没有权限，会显示其他人的剩余时停时间。[/*]
[/list][b][size=4]时停结束[/size][/b]
[list]
[*][b]- 播放结束特效和音效。[/b][/*]
[*][b]- 延迟的炮台、枪械、投掷物和其他排队行为会继续结算。[/b][/*]
[*][b]- 没有其他玩家仍在发动时停时，世界恢复正常。[/b][/*]
[/list][b][size=4]多人联机[/size][/b]

本模组可以在单人环境中独立运行，也可以在安装 KrokMP 时尝试同步多人时停。
多人逻辑大致如下：
[list]
[*]- A 发动时停时，A 可以动，B 会被暂停。[/*]
[*]- 如果 B 在 A 的时停期间也发动时停，则 A 和 B 都可以动。[/*]
[*]- 如果 A 的时停先结束，而 B 的时停仍在持续，则 A 会被暂停，B 继续行动。[/*]
[*]- 当所有玩家的时停都结束后，世界恢复正常。[/*]
[/list]炮台 / 枪雷触发会尽量只归属给实际触发的玩家，避免同一个陷阱在多人视角里重复触发时停。
多人同步依赖 KrokMP 的运行状态，因此仍属于实验功能。如果没有安装或没有加载 KrokMP，本模组会按单人逻辑工作。

[b][size=4]炸药临时功能[/size][/b]

本模组包含一个临时的 Dynamite 引线功能，后续可能会删除或改成独立功能。
[list]
[*]- 点燃后的 Dynamite 倒计时会在时停期间暂停。[/*]
[*]- 手持 Dynamite 时，屏幕右侧会出现 `CUT FUSE` 按钮。[/*]
[*]- 点击后，该 Dynamite 下一次使用时倒计时会变成约 `0.1` 秒。[/*]
[*]- 该功能只针对 Dynamite，尽量不影响其他物品。[/*]
[/list]相当于在时停里掐个瞬爆，时停结束立刻爆炸。

如果与其他模组发生冲突，优先检查这些模组是否也修改了相同的陷阱、玩家身体状态、医疗小游戏、相机时间缩放或 KrokMP 同步逻辑。





[b][size=5]ENGLISH[/size][/b]

[b]Temporal Panic Button[/b] is an entertainment-focused mod. Please don't take it too seriously.
Multiplayer functionality has only been tested to a limited extent. If you encounter bugs or have suggestions, feel free to leave feedback.
When a player triggers a mine, turret-type trap, or presses the manual activation key, a Time Stop will be activated. During Time Stop, the activator can move, heal, throw items, and shoot, while the world, traps, creatures, explosive timers, and players without Time Stop permission are frozen.
[heading]Features[/heading]
[list]
[*]Time Stop can be triggered by mines, turrets / gun traps, or a manual hotkey.[/*]
[*]Intelligence Growth Mode enabled by default: higher Intelligence grants longer Time Stop duration and shorter cooldown.[/*]
[*]KrokMP multiplayer synchronization support. Multiple players can overlap their Time Stops, and only players currently granted Time Stop permission can move.[/*]
[*]Blue screen effect, shockwave, start/end visual effects, sound effects, attack poses, and an Observer acting as your stand.[/*]
[*]Prevents bleeding, unconsciousness progression, and body stat changes while Time Stop is active.[/*]
[*]Allows self-treatment during Time Stop and can optionally ignore pain and consciousness penalties affecting medical speed.[/*]
[*]Thrown objects freeze in mid-air and continue traveling after Time Stop ends.[/*]
[*]Firearms can be fired during Time Stop with delayed projectile effects; actual damage is applied when Time Stop ends.[/*]
[*]Prevents certain traps from continuing to trigger or track targets during Time Stop, including jump pads, bear traps, coils, spike traps, and sonic cannons.[/*]
[*]Includes a temporary Dynamite fuse-cutting feature. Dynamite timers pause during Time Stop, and fuses can be shortened to create near-instant explosions on the next use.[/*]
[/list][heading]Installation[/heading]
[list=1]
[*]Install BepInEx.[/*]
[*]Place TemporalPanicButton.dll into: BepInEx/plugins/[/*]
[*]Launch the game and configure the mod under: Settings -> Gameplay[/*]
[/list][heading]Optional Time Stop Sounds[/heading]
By default, the mod does not include Time Stop start/end sounds.
To use custom sounds, create (or use the automatically generated) folder:  BepInEx/plugins/TemporalPanicButtonAssets/
Place the following files inside:
Time Stop Start Sound:
timestop_start.wav
or
timestop_start.ogg
Time Stop End Sound:
timestop_end.wav
or
timestop_end.ogg
If both .wav and .ogg versions exist, the mod will load whichever valid file it finds first.
[heading]Settings[/heading]
Location:
[code]Settings -> Gameplay[/code][list]
[*][b]Temporal Panic Button[/b][i](Default: Enabled)[/i][/*]
[/list]Master switch. Disabling it completely turns off all Time Stop functionality.
[list]
[*][b]Intelligence Growth Mode[/b][i](Default: Enabled)[/i][/*]
[/list]Time Stop duration and cooldown scale with Intelligence.
[list]
[*][b]Time Stop Duration[/b][i](Default: 5 seconds)[/i][/*]
[/list]Fixed Time Stop duration when Intelligence Growth Mode is disabled.
[list]
[*][b]Time Stop Cooldown[/b][i](Default: 15 seconds)[/i][/*]
[/list]Fixed Time Stop cooldown when Intelligence Growth Mode is disabled.
[list]
[*][b]Trigger On Mines[/b][i](Default: Enabled)[/i][/*]
[/list]Activates Time Stop when stepping on a mine.
[list]
[*][b]Trigger On Turrets[/b][i](Default: Enabled)[/i][/*]
[/list]Activates Time Stop when triggering a turret or gun trap.
[list]
[*][b]Manual Time Stop[/b][i](Default: Enabled)[/i][/*]
[/list]Allows manual activation of Time Stop.
[list]
[*][b]Manual Time Stop Key[/b][i](Default: V)[/i][/*]
[/list]Hotkey used for manual activation.
[list]
[*][b]Steady Medical Hands[/b][i](Default: Enabled)[/i][/*]
[/list]Ignores medical speed penalties caused by pain or reduced consciousness.
[list]
[*][b]Time Stop Effect Intensity[/b][i](Default: 1, Range: 0–2)[/i][/*]
[/list]Controls the strength of visual Time Stop effects.
[list]
[*][b]Time Stop Sound Volume[/b][i](Default: 0.9, Range: 0–1)[/i][/*]
[/list]Controls the volume of Time Stop sound effects.

[heading]Intelligence Growth Mode[/heading]
Enabled by default.
When enabled, players cannot directly configure Time Stop duration and cooldown through the settings menu. Instead, these values scale with Intelligence.
Adds a little progression and replayability.
[list]
[*]Intelligence below 7: Time Stop has not yet been learned and cannot be activated manually.[/*]
[*]Intelligence 7: Unlocks Time Stop. Duration approximately 4 seconds, cooldown approximately 240 seconds.[/*]
[*]Intelligence 20: Maximum Time Stop level. Duration approximately 20 seconds, cooldown approximately 120 seconds.[/*]
[*]Progression from Intelligence 7 to 20 is gradual. The scaling curve is not completely linear, and later levels provide more noticeable improvements.[/*]
[/list]If Intelligence Growth Mode is disabled, the mod uses the fixed values configured in: Time Stop Duration and  Time Stop Cooldown
[heading]Gameplay[/heading]
[b]Triggering Time Stop[/b]
Time Stop can be activated by:
[list]
[*]Stepping on a mine.[/*]
[*]Triggering a turret or gun trap.[/*]
[*]Pressing the manual activation key (default:V).[/*]
[/list]Manual activation is blocked while menus such as pause menus, trading screens, and container inventories are open.

[b]During Time Stop[/b]
[list]
[*]The activator can move and play normal movement animations.[/*]
[*]Most world objects, traps, creatures, and countdown timers are frozen.[/*]
[*]Body status progression is paused, including bleeding, dehydration, and unconsciousness.[/*]
[*]The medical interface can be opened for self-treatment.[/*]
[*]If  Steady Medical Hands is enabled, medical mini-game speed is calculated as if the player were in normal condition.[/*]
[*]Thrown items remain suspended in mid-air until Time Stop ends.[/*]
[*]Firearms create delayed projectile effects; actual hits and damage are resolved when Time Stop finishes.[/*]
[*]A status display appears at the top of the screen showing your remaining Time Stop duration and cooldown. If another player is currently stopping time and you are not allowed to move, their remaining Time Stop duration is displayed instead.[/*]
[/list][heading]When Time Stop Ends[/heading]
[list]
[*]End visual and sound effects are played.[/*]
[*]Delayed turret shots, gunfire, thrown items, and other queued actions are resolved.[/*]
[*]If no other player is currently stopping time, the world returns to normal.[/*]
[/list][heading]Multiplayer[/heading]
The mod works in single-player on its own and can optionally synchronize Time Stop effects when KrokMP is installed.
In multiplayer, Intelligence Growth Mode now follows the host setting. If the host enables it, clients follow it. If the host disables it, clients follow that as well, instead of using their own local setting.
Multiplayer behavior works roughly as follows:
[list]
[*]If Player A activates Time Stop, A can move while Player B is frozen.[/*]
[*]If Player B activates Time Stop during A's Time Stop, both A and B can move.[/*]
[*]If A's Time Stop ends first while B's is still active, A becomes frozen and B continues moving.[/*]
[*]Once all active Time Stops have ended, the world resumes normal behavior.[/*]
[/list]Turret and gun-trap triggers attempt to identify the actual triggering player to avoid duplicate Time Stop activations from different client perspectives.
Multiplayer synchronization depends on KrokMP and should still be considered experimental.
If KrokMP is not installed or not running, the mod behaves as a single-player mod.
[heading]Temporary Dynamite Feature[/heading]
This mod currently includes a temporary Dynamite fuse feature.
It may be removed later or moved into a separate mod.
[list]
[*]Lit Dynamite timers pause during Time Stop.[/*]
[*]While holding Dynamite, a CUT FUSE
button appears on the right side of the screen.[/*]
[*]Clicking it causes the next activation of that Dynamite to use a fuse length of approximately 0.1econds.[/*]
[*]The feature only affects Dynamite and is designed to avoid interfering with other items.[/*]
[/list]Basically, you can prepare an almost-instant explosion during Time Stop and watch it detonate the moment time starts moving again.
[heading]Compatibility[/heading]
If conflicts occur with other mods, first check whether those mods also modify:
[list]
[*]Trap behavior[/*]
[*]Player body status systems[/*]
[*]Medical mini-games[/*]
[*]Camera time scaling[/*]
[*]KrokMP synchronization logic[/*]
[/list]These areas are the most likely sources of incompatibility.
Author: MistalCry

Name: Cu-Stats
Description:
[b]CuStats[/b]

CuStats turns the things do in Casualties: Unknown into numbers. It watches block breaks, item pickups, weapon uses, food and medical consumption, layer descents, mob kills and trader encounters, then renders them in a tabbed panel grouped by category, with totals split between "all saves" and "this world".

CuStats 把在 Casualties: Unknown 里做的每件事都翻译成数字：方块破坏、物品拾取、食物 / 医疗用量、下层次数、相遇求生者；面板按类别分页展示，并把"所有存档总计"与"当前世界"两条数据线分开。

[b]Tabs[/b]

- **General** — distance walked, layers descended, deepest layer, total blocks broken, items picked / used, mobs killed, survivors met.
- **Blocks broken** — every block id you ever cracked, with sprite icons.
- **Items picked up** — what you pulled from the world, sorted by count.
- **Food / Medical / Combat / Misc** — what you actually consumed, with a one-click toggle between "durability equivalent" (e.g. `1.02 items`) and "use count" (e.g. `3 times`).
- **Settings** — verbose log toggle, font scale slider, update check toggle, panel hotkey, UI language (auto / Chinese / English).
- **About** — version, links, credits, dependencies.

- **综合** — 移动距离、下降层数、最深层数、方块破坏总数、物品拾取与使用、相遇求生者。
- **破坏方块** — 每个被你挖掉过的 block id，附带 sprite 图标。
- **获得物品** — 从世界里捡到的所有物品，按数量倒序。
- **食物 / 医疗 / 战斗 / 杂物** — 真正消耗掉的东西，顶栏一键切换"耐久件数"（如 `1.02 件`）与"使用次数"（如 `3 次`）两种维度。
- **设置** — 详细日志开关、字号缩放、检查更新、面板快捷键、界面语言（自动 / 中文 / 英文）。
- **关于** — 版本、链接、致谢、依赖。

[b]Two ways to open it[/b]

If CuSaveManager is installed, CuStats registers itself as a "Statistics" sidebar tab inside its panel; nothing extra appears on the main menu. If CuSaveManager is missing or its registration point is gone, CuStats injects its own button into the main menu and opens the panel as a standalone window. The default in-game hotkey is `U`; `ESC` closes the panel.

如果安装了 CuSaveManager，CuStats 会把自己注册成"统计"侧栏分页，主菜单上不再额外加按钮；如果 CuSaveManager 不在或者注册接口取不到，CuStats 会在主菜单注入一个独立按钮，打开自己的浮动窗口。游戏内默认 `U` 键开关面板，`ESC` 关闭。

Some data points come from observation, not authoritative game events. Food classification listens for `Body.Eat` inside a `Body.UseItem` window and reclassifies the active item into the food partition; mob kill credit is given when a `BuildingEntity` with `animal=true` dies within 1.5 seconds of a player melee strike (inside the strike's reach + 1m) or within 1.5 seconds of a gunshot (within 100m). These approximations are good enough for casual stats — open a GitHub issue if a count looks wrong.

部分数据来自运行时观察，不来自游戏权威事件：食物分类靠在一次 `Body.UseItem` 期间监听 `Body.Eat` 调用，命中即把当前物品归入食物分区；生物判定靠 `BuildingEntity` 的 `animal=true` 死亡那一刻——若 1.5 秒内有过玩家近战（在攻击距离 +1 米内）或开火（100 米内）。这些近似在日常统计里足够用；数字看起来不对的话欢迎在 GitHub 开 issue。
[b]
Compatibility[/b]

Soft-depends on CuSaveManager for the sidebar embed (works without it). Doesn't touch save files.

软依赖 CuSaveManager 用于侧栏嵌入（缺失也能独立运行）。不修改 save 文件。

[b]Links[/b]

- GitHub:[[url=https://github.com/huanxin996/Cu-Stats]huanxin996/Cu-Stats[/url]]
Author: huanxin996

Name: (Deprecated)QoL Unknown Chinese Patch
Description:
【停止维护公告】
本补丁已停止维护，不再建议新用户安装。
目前已经有其他更完整的 QoL 汉化方案可用，并且经过测试可以独立运行，字体显示也没有明显问题。因此本补丁将作为历史存档保留，不再继续更新。（[url=https://github.com/031fox-ui/a.chs.mod%EF%BC%89]https://github.com/031fox-ui/a.chs.mod[/url]）
当前状态：
[list]
[*]不再发布新版本；[/*]
[*]不再适配 QoL Unknown 后续版本；[/*]
[*]不再处理新的兼容性问题；[/*]
[*]文件仅作为历史存档保留。[/*]
[/list]感谢所有使用和测试过本补丁的玩家。

【Maintenance Discontinued】
This patch is no longer maintained and is no longer recommended for new users.
A more complete QoL localization solution is now available and has been tested to run independently without this patch. The font display also appears to work correctly. Therefore, this patch will be kept only as a historical archive and will not receive further updates.
Recommended alternative:
[url=https://github.com/031fox-ui/a.chs.mod]https://github.com/031fox-ui/a.chs.mod[/url]
Current status:
[list]
[*]No new versions will be released.[/*]
[*]No future QoL Unknown versions will be supported.[/*]
[*]No new compatibility issues will be handled.[/*]
[*]Existing files will remain available only as a historical archive.[/*]
[/list]Thank you to everyone who used, tested, and gave feedback on this patch.


QoL Unknown Chinese Patch
A Simplified Chinese localization patch for [b]QoL Unknown[/b], a quality-of-life mod for [b]Casualties: Unknown / Scav Prototype[/b].
This patch localizes QoL Unknown's menus, settings, module list, tooltips, dropdown entries, and several UI strings into Simplified Chinese.
This patch does [b]not[/b] include QoL Unknown itself.
Please install the original QoL Unknown mod first.
[heading]Supported versions[/heading]
[list]
[*]Game: Casualties Unknown Demo v7.0.1[/*]
[*]Original mod: QoL Unknown 1.0.4.5[/*]
[*]Mod loader: BepInEx 5.4.23.5[/*]
[*]Patch version: v0.10.14[/*]
[/list][heading]Installation[/heading]
[list=1]
[*]Install BepInEx 5.4.23.5.[/*]
[*]Install the original QoL Unknown mod.[/*]
[*]Download this patch.[/*]
[*]Extract the
[code]QoLChinesePatch[/code]folder into:[/*]
[/list][code]Casualties Unknown Demo/BepInEx/plugins/[/code]The final structure should look like this:
[code]Casualties Unknown Demo/
└── BepInEx/
    └── plugins/
        ├── QoL Unknown.dll
        └── QoLChinesePatch/
            ├── QoLChinesePatch.dll
            ├── QoLChinesePatch.Bootstrap.dll
            ├── translations.zh-CN.json
            └── phrases.zh-CN.json[/code][heading]Known compatibility issue[/heading]
This version is currently not compatible with [b]KrokMP Chinese Name Fix 1.0.18.20[/b].
Reason: both mods patch global Unity text rendering methods such as
[code]UnityEngine.GUI[/code],
[code]GUILayout[/code],
[code]GUIStyle[/code],
[code]TMP_Text[/code], and
[code]UI.Text[/code]. If both are installed at the same time, some QoL Unknown IMGUI texts may fail to localize correctly.
Temporary workaround:
[list]
[*]Use this patch without KrokMP Chinese Name Fix; or[/*]
[*]Wait for a future compatibility update from either side.[/*]
[/list][heading]Notes[/heading]
This patch only contains localization files and patch code. It does not redistribute:
[list]
[*]QoL Unknown original DLL[/*]
[*]Casualties Unknown game files[/*]
[*]KrokMP files[/*]
[*]KrokMP Chinese Name Fix[/*]
[*]wiki translation JSON files[/*]
[*]fonts or Unity built-in resources[/*]
[/list][heading]Credits[/heading]
Original QoL Unknown mod by Jimmyking / Jimmyking9999999.
This is an unofficial Simplified Chinese localization patch.

Name: V for Whining with MP
Description:
[b][color=#ff7700][size=4][important!][/size][/color]
if you want to use this mod on the client side in multiplayer, the host must have the mod installed.
if only the host installs the mod, clients can still play without any issues, but the mod features won't function for them.[/b]

[color=#ff7700][size=4][b]Description[/b][/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]This is a small add-on for "[b][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/197]V for Whining[/url]"[/b] that adds compatibility with "[b][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/67]KrokMP multiplayer[/url]"[/b].
Normally, the original mod only works locally, meaning other players cannot hear your whining. This add-on synchronizes the effect across the network, allowing other players to hear nearby players whining in multiplayer.
This mod is an add-on and does not replace or modify the original "[url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/197]V for Whining[/url]" experience.[/color]

[color=#ff7700][size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]1. Install "[b]BepInEx[/b]" for "Casualties Unknown Demo" [/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]2. Install "[b]KrokMP[/b]"[/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]3. Install "[b]V for Whining"[/b][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]4. Install this mod[/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]5. Put the mod things in here! : "Casualties Unknown Demo\BepInEx\plugins" [/color]

[color=#ff7700][size=4][b]Main features[/b][/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]multiplayer support for V for Whining. [/color]

[b][size=4]Requirements[/size][/b]
[list]
[*][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/197][b]V for Whining[/b][/url] ( Whining~ )[/*]
[*][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/67][b]KrokMP[/b][/url] ( Online Multiplayer Co-op Mod )[/*]
[*][b][url=https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx/releases/]BepInEx[/url][/b] For mods! [/*]
[/list][b][color=#ff7700][size=4]Known Issues[/size][/color][/b]
[size=3]I don't have many friends who play this game, so I haven't been able to test this mod with a large number of players. ;w;
So far, it has only been tested in a simple Host + 1 Friend setup.
If you run into any issues with larger groups or find any bugs, please leave a post and let me know! xd[/size]

[color=#ff7700][size=4][b]Shout outs[/b][/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]Huge Thanks! to [b][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/profile/winddramon]winddramon[/url][/b][b] [/b]:b for creating "[url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/197]V for Whining[/url]" and for kindly allowing this add-on to be shared with the community.
Also, thanks to the "KrokMP" developers for making multiplayer modding possible.[/color]

Name: MoreWatchInfo
Description:
[heading]MoreWatchInfo Plugin Description[/heading]
[b]MoreWatchInfo[/b] is a quality‑of‑life enhancement mod for the original watch item in [i]Casualties Unknown[/i]. Of course, [b]BepInEx[/b] is required as a prerequisite.
By default, actively using the watch only reports its runtime and temperature. This plugin adds [b]many vital signs that are not shown on the standard health panel[/b], allowing you to fully monitor your experiment’s condition – especially after using procoagulants or when you need to track hidden risks like blood viscosity.
New Information Added
When you actively use the watch, in addition to the runtime and temperature, the following data will be reported ([b]most entries appear only when their value is abnormal[/b] to avoid clutter):
[list]
[*][b]Blood Viscosity[/b] (always shown) – Positive means thick blood (thrombosis risk), negative means thin blood (bleeding risk). Pay close attention after using clotting agents.[/*]
[*][b]Internal Bleeding[/b] – Internal blood loss from damaged organs or vessels; reported when >0%.[/*]
[*][b]Hemothorax[/b] – Blood accumulation in the chest cavity, affecting respiration and oxygen capacity; reported when >0.[/*]
[*][b]Fibrillation Progress[/b] – Percentage of cardiac fibrillation; higher values mean greater risk of cardiac arrest; reported when >0%.[/*]
[*][b]Septic Shock[/b] – Systemic infection reaching a critical stage; reported when >0%.[/*]
[*][b]Stroke Risk[/b] – Chance of cerebral hemorrhage caused by high blood pressure or blood issues; reported when >0%.[/*]
[*][b]Pulmonary Embolism[/b] – Blood clot blocking a pulmonary artery, which can lead to respiratory arrest; reported when present.[/*]
[*][b]Venom Level[/b] – Blood toxin (e.g., from shade crawler bites); reported when >0.[/*]
[*][b]Limb Infection[/b] – Lists all infected limbs with their infection percentage (only shown when infection >0 for that limb).[/*]
[/list]All extra information is seamlessly integrated into the original speech‑bubble format (multi‑line text). Infection details appear on a separate line and are omitted entirely if no infection is present.
Feedback & Suggestions
The current set of reported parameters already covers most survival monitoring needs. However, if you would like to see additional hidden stats, or if you have ideas for a better reporting format, please let me know.

In memory of the one who took too much procoagulant and couldn't keep the blood flowing while sleeping.

[b]MoreWatchInfo[/b] 是一个针对《Casualties Unknown》原版手表物品的功能增强插件。当然了，需要 [b]BepInEx[/b] 作为前置。
在原版游戏中，主动使用手表只会播报运行时间和温度。而本插件为手表添加了[b]更多健康面板不会直接显示的关键生理指标[/b]，让您能够更全面地掌握实验体的身体状况，尤其适合在打完凝血剂后监控血液粘度等隐藏风险。
主要新增信息
当您主动使用手表时，除了原有的运行时间和温度，还会额外报告以下数据（[b]大多数指标仅在其数值异常时才会出现，避免不必要的干扰[/b]）：
[list]
[*][b]血液粘度[/b]（始终显示） – 正值表示血液粘稠（血栓风险），负值表示血液稀薄（出血风险）。打完凝血剂后务必关注此数值。[/*]
[*][b]内出血[/b] – 体内器官或血管破裂导致的内部失血，超过 0% 即报告。[/*]
[*][b]血胸[/b] – 胸腔内积血，影响呼吸与血氧上限，超过 0% 即报告。[/*]
[*][b]室颤进度[/b] – 心脏纤颤的百分比，数值越高越接近心脏停搏，超过 0% 即报告。[/*]
[*][b]败血性休克[/b] – 全身感染导致的危急状态，超过 0% 即报告。[/*]
[*][b]中风风险[/b] – 高血压或血液问题引发脑出血的概率，超过 0% 即报告。[/*]
[*][b]肺栓塞[/b] – 血栓堵塞肺部动脉，严重时可致呼吸停止，出现即报告。[/*]
[*][b]中毒量[/b] – 血毒（如被暗影爬行者咬伤后积累的毒素），超过 0% 即报告。[/*]
[*][b]肢体感染[/b] – 列出所有感染肢体的名称和感染进度百分比（仅当感染值 > 0 时列出）。[/*]
[/list]所有额外信息均整合在原有的播报格式中，保持与原版一致的显示风格（多行文字气泡）。感染信息单独占一行，无感染时自动省略。
反馈与建议
本插件目前包含的指标已经能满足大多数生存监控需求，但如果您有其他隐藏参数希望加入，或者有更好的播报格式想法，欢迎随时告知。

以此纪念那个打了太多凝血剂在睡觉时血流不动的家伙。

Name: Ultimate Sound Swap
Description:
[b]Ultimate Sound Swap[/b]
A lightweight framework for replacing nearly any sound in Casualties Unknown.
Simply place WAV files inside the Sounds folder and the mod will automatically replace matching in-game sounds. Sound names are matched directly against the game's internal audio clip names.

[b]Setup[/b]
[list=1]
[*]Install BepInEx 5.4.23.5 (or newer 5.x release) into your Casualties Unknown installation.[/*]
[*]This mod was developed and tested on Casualties Unknown v7.0.1. Ensure your version matches or expect weird behavior.[/*]
[*]Place the Ultimate Sound Swap DLL into:
[code]Casualties Unknown/
└── BepInEx/
    └── plugins/
        └── UltimateSoundSwap.dll[/code][/*]
[*]Launch the game once. The mod will automatically create a Sounds folder inside the plugins directory if one does not already exist:
[code]Casualties Unknown/
└── BepInEx/
    └── plugins/
        └── Sounds/[/code][/*]
[*]Enable HideManagerGameObject in BepInEx's config file. You'll find it in:
[code]Casualties Unknown/
└── BepInEx/
    └── config/
        └── BepInEx.cfg/[/code]You should be able to open it in a text editor like notepad. Confirm that:
[code][Chainloader]
HideManagerGameObject = true[/code][/*]
[/list][b]Single Replacement Example[/b]
[code]Sounds/
├── pain1.wav
└── death1.wav[/code]Whenever the game plays "pain1" or "death1", your custom sound will be used instead.

[b]Randomized Replacements[/b]
Place multiple WAV files inside a folder named after the sound you want to replace:
[code]Sounds/
└── death1/
    ├── boom.wav
    ├── owie.wav
    └── deez.wav[/code]Each time "death1" is played, a random file from the folder will be selected.

[b]Finding Sound Names[/b]
Hold Left Ctrl while sounds are playing to print their internal names and properties to the console. This makes it easy to identify which sounds you want to replace. Additionally, you can use the "playsound" command in the console and browse through the string ids there.

[b]Requirements[/b]
Replacement sounds can be MP3, WAV, OGG, etc. Let me know if an audio type you like doesn't work.

Author: Yraganchic

Name: CU.RemoteConsole
Description:
[b]CU.RemoteConsole[/b]

CU.RemoteConsole is a BepInEx 5 plugin for Casualties: Unknown that provides a local authenticated browser/API command console.

[b]Features[/b]

- Local browser console at http://127.0.0.1:8848/
- Bearer-token authentication
- Command output rendering
- Command history and receipt lookup
- Command catalog grouped by risk
- In-game config overlay opened with F8
- English / Simplified Chinese UI
- Conservative defaults: localhost only, auth enabled, dangerous commands denied

[b]Requirements[/b]

- Casualties: Unknown or Casualties: Unknown Demo
- BepInEx 5.4.x

BepInEx is not included and must be installed separately.

[b]Installation[/b]

1. Install BepInEx 5.4.x into the game folder.
2. Download CU.RemoteConsole-v1.0.0.zip.
3. Copy the BepInEx folder from this package into the game install directory.
4. Start the game once.
5. Open http://127.0.0.1:8848/
6. Copy the generated bearer token from:

BepInEx/config/cu.remoteconsole.cfg

[b]Safety[/b]

CU.RemoteConsole can execute game console commands. Keep it bound to 127.0.0.1, keep authentication enabled, do not share the generated bearer token, and do not expose the service directly to the public internet.

If remote access is needed, use a private network or tunnel such as Tailscale, WireGuard, SSH tunnel, or ZeroTier.

[b]Proton / Steam Deck[/b]

Normal Windows installs do not need launch options.

If BepInEx does not load when running the Windows build through Proton, try this Steam launch option:

WINEDLLOVERRIDES=winhttp=n,b %command%

[b]Source Code[/b]

https://github.com/foxderin/CU.RemoteConsole

Name: Inventory Sort Mod
Description:
[center][size=5][b]✨ Inventory Sort Mod[/b][/size]
A lightweight UI mod that adds S and M buttons to container menus, enabling one-click sorting, automatic stack merging, and 7 sort modes. Favorited items are protected and will not be moved.

[size=4][b]✨ Core Features[/b][/size]
[list]
[*][b]1️⃣ Container Sorting[/b] – Click the S button to sort items in the container using the current sort mode.[/*]
[*][b]2️⃣ Item Merging[/b] – Shift + Click the S button to automatically merge all stackable items in the container (fills based on durability) [b](excluding liquids and bullets)[/b] .[/*]
[*][b]3️⃣ Mode Cycling[/b] – Click the M button to cycle through 7 sort modes (Shift + M to reverse cycle).[/*]
[/list]
[size=4][b]📋 Sort Modes (7 Total)[/b][/size]
[list]
[*][b]Name A → Z[/b] – Sort by item name ascending[/*]
[*][b]Name Z → A[/b] – Sort by item name descending[/*]
[*][b]Weight Heavy → Light[/b] – Sort by weight descending[/*]
[*][b]Weight Light → Heavy[/b] – Sort by weight ascending[/*]
[*][b]Value High → Low[/b] – Sort by value descending[/*]
[*][b]Value Low → High[/b] – Sort by value ascending[/*]
[*][b]Category Group[/b] – Sort by item category[/*]
[/list]
[size=4][b]🛡️ Protection Mechanism[/b][/size]
[list]
[*]Favorited items always remain at the top of the list and will not be moved.[/*]
[*]Merging operations only target non-favorited items.[/*]
[/list]
[size=4][b]🎮 Controls[/b][/size]
[list]
[*][b]Click [S][/b] – Sort container using current mode[/*]
[*][b]Shift + Click [S][/b] – Merge all mergeable items in container [b](excluding liquids and bullets)[/b] [/*]
[*][b]Click [M][/b] – Cycle to next sort mode[/*]
[*][b]Shift + Click [M][/b] – Cycle to previous sort mode[/*]
[/list]
[size=4][b]⚠️ Known Limitations[/b][/size]
[list]
[*]No multiplayer compatibility – May cause sync issues on multiplayer servers. Use with caution.[/*]
[/list]



[/center]
[center][size=5][b]✨ 容器整理 [/b][/size][/center]

[center]一个轻量级 UI 模组，为容器菜单添加 [b]S[/b] 和 [b]M[/b] 按钮，实现一键整理、自动合并堆叠物品，并支持 7 种排序模式切换。收藏物品会受到保护，不会被移动。[/center]


[size=4][b]✨ 核心功能[/b][/size]

[list]
[*][b]1️⃣ 容器整理[/b] – 点击 [b]S 按钮[/b]，按当前排序模式整理容器内物品。[/*]
[*][b]2️⃣ 物品合并[/b] – [b]Shift + 点击 S 按钮[/b]，自动合并容器内所有可堆叠物品（按耐久度填充） [b]（不包括液体与子弹）[/b] 。[/*]
[*][b]3️⃣ 模式切换[/b] – 点击 [b]M 按钮[/b] 循环切换 7 种排序模式（Shift + M 反向切换）。[/*]
[/list]

[size=4][b]📋 排序模式（共7种）[/b][/size]

[list]
[*][b]名称 A → Z[/b] – 按物品名称升序[/*]
[*][b]名称 Z → A[/b] – 按物品名称降序[/*]
[*][b]重量 重 → 轻[/b] – 按重量降序[/*]
[*][b]重量 轻 → 重[/b] – 按重量升序[/*]
[*][b]价值 贵 → 便宜[/b] – 按价值降序[/*]
[*][b]价值 便宜 → 贵[/b] – 按价值升序[/*]
[*][b]类别分组[/b] – 按物品类别排序[/*]
[/list]
[size=4][b]🛡️ 保护机制[/b][/size]

[list]
[*][b]收藏物品 (Favourited)[/b] 始终保持在列表最前，不会被移动。[/*]
[*]合并操作 [b]仅针对非收藏物品[/b]。[/*]
[/list]
[size=4][b]🎮 操作说明[/b][/size]

[list]
[*][b]点击 [S][/b] – 按当前模式整理容器[/*]
[*][b]Shift + 点击 [S][/b] – 合并容器内所有可合并物品 [b]（不包括液体与子弹）[/b] [/*]
[*][b]点击 [M][/b] – 切换到下一个排序模式[/*]
[*][b]Shift + 点击 [M][/b] – 切换到上一个排序模式[/*]
[/list]
[size=4][b]⚠️ 已知限制[/b][/size]

[list]
[*][b]无多人模式兼容[/b] – 多人联机时可能出现同步问题，请谨慎在多人服务器上使用。[/*]
[/list]

Name: Inventory Visibility Fix
Description:
[b][size=5]English introduction/ 中文说明[/size][/b]
[heading]中文[/heading]
一个基于 BepInEx / Harmony 的 UI 修复 Mod，用于解决角色到达地图底部时，打开背包后装备栏被屏幕底部遮挡的问题。
修复内容
原版背包 UI 的装备菜单会跟随角色在屏幕上的位置。角色越接近地图底部，整个背包菜单越靠下，导致可穿戴装备栏可能被屏幕底部裁切。本 Mod 会在角色接近当前地图层底部时，平滑地把整个装备菜单向上偏移；离开底部区域后自动恢复原位。它不会单独移动装备槽，不修改 Camera，也不会重写背包生成逻辑。
[b]功能[/b]
[list]
[*]接近地图底部时，平滑上移整个背包菜单。[/*]
[*]离开底部区域后自动恢复原位置。[/*]
[*]在Settings -> GamePlay（设置->游戏玩法）中添加可调设置。[/*]
[*]可选：将底部存档/继续按钮分别向左、向右移动，避免与上移后的背包 UI 重叠。[/*]
[*]仅使用 Harmony Patch，不覆盖游戏文件。[/*]
[/list][b]设置项[/b]
[list]
[*]Inventory Edge Fix：默认值 开启，范围 开启/关闭。是否启用背包底部遮挡修复。[/*]
[*]Inventory Edge Fix Threshold：默认值 2%，范围 1%-5%。距离地图底部多少范围内开始上移背包。[/*]
[*]Inventory Edge Fix Offset：默认值 150 px，范围 50-500 px。背包最大向上偏移量。[/*]
[*]Move Save/Continue Buttons：默认值 关闭，范围 开启/关闭。将底部存档/继续按钮左右分开，避免和背包 UI 重叠。[/*]
[/list][b]安装[/b]
[list=1]
[*]为游戏安装 BepInEx。[/*]
[*]从 Release 页面下载InventoryVisibilityFix.dll。[/*]
[*]将 DLL 放入BepInEx/plugins/。[/*]
[*]启动游戏，在Settings -> GamePlay（设置->游戏玩法）中调整设置。[/*]
[/list][b]兼容性说明[/b]
[b]本 Mod 也兼容 [/b][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/194][b]Wearable Array[/b][/url][b] 模组。使用多行装备栏时，只需要开启 Move Save/Continue Buttons，并将 Inventory Edge Fix Offset 调整到合适范围即可。[/b]

[b][size=5]English[/size][/b]
A BepInEx/Harmony UI fix mod that keeps the inventory radial menu visible when the player reaches the bottom edge of a generated map layer.
[b]What It Fixes[/b]
In the vanilla game, the inventory RadialMenu follows the player's screen position. Near the bottom of the map, the whole inventory menu is placed too low, and the wearable equipment row can be clipped by the bottom of the screen.
This mod applies a smooth, configurable upward offset to the whole RadialMenu only when the player is close to the bottom of the current map layer. It does not move individual equipment slots, change camera behavior, or rewrite inventory generation.
[b]Features[/b]
[list]
[*]Smoothly moves the full inventory radial menu upward near the bottom edge of the map.[/*]
[*]Restores the original menu position outside the bottom-edge area.[/*]
[*]Adds in-game settings under Settings -> GamePlay .[/*]
[*]Optional save/continue button separation to prevent overlap with larger inventory offsets.[/*]
[*]Uses Harmony patches only; no game files are overwritten.[/*]
[/list][b]Settings[/b]
[list]
[*]Inventory Edge Fix: default On, range On/Off. Enables the radial menu visibility fix.[/*]
[*]Inventory Edge Fix Threshold: default 2%, range 1%-5%. Bottom portion of the map where the upward offset begins.[/*]
[*]Inventory Edge Fix Offset: default 150 px, range 50-500 px. Maximum upward UI offset.[/*]
[*]Move Save/Continue Buttons: default Off, range On/Off. Moves the bottom-depth save and continue buttons left/right so they do not overlap the raised inventory UI.[/*]
[/list][b]Installation[/b]
[list=1]
[*]Install BepInEx for the game.[/*]
[*]Download InventoryVisibilityFix.dll from the release page.[/*]
[*]Place the DLL in  BepInEx/plugins/.[/*]
[*]Launch the game and adjust the settings under Settings -> GamePlay.[/*]
[/list][b][size=3]Compatibility Notes
This mod is also compatible with [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/194]Wearable Array[/url]. When using multiple equipment rows, enable  Move Save/Continue Buttons and adjust  Inventory Edge Fix Offset to a suitable range.[/size][/b]

Name: No Decay
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]Prevents items from losing condition simply because time passes.[/color]
By default, this mod:
 - Stops normal item time decay / spoilage
 - Does not change normal item usage, damage, or other non-time-based condition loss
 - Does not alter the game's original behavior when an item's condition actually reaches zero
 - Battery-type items are not disabled by default. If an item uses the game's battery-style time drain, it will continue to work normally unless you change the config. Config file: BepInEx/config/com.el739.nodecay.cfg

[size=4][b]Installation[/b][/size]
1. Install BepInEx for the game                                                                                                                           
2. Place NoDecay.dll into BepInEx/plugins/

Name: Mushoo's Scuffed English Translation
Description:
[size=4][b]WELCOME TO THE MOST IMPORTANT MOD OF THE YEAR 2XXX![/b][/size]
[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]Finally, the [i]technically[/i] modified language file, "Scuffed English", is available for download to any who thinks I'm silly and funny enough to have my humor completely take over your game.[/color][/size]

[size=4][b]Main features[/b][/size]
[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]Adds some dialogue to your expie, most of which are references to other things, as well as changes a good number of descriptions in the game to things I find hopefully funny for people to see.[/color]
[/size]
Additionally, this "mod" requires no actual modding experience- you don't even need bepinex to use it! I'm just that good of a coder. It is a single file that you don't even need to modify your game in any way to use!

[b]Installation instructions[/b]
First: Locate your Casualties Unknown folder.
Now, stay with me here, because it's about to get serious.

Second: You're going to find "CasualtiesUnknown_Data" in your game files. This is scary, but don't worry, I'll be here with you the whole way.

Third: Find the "Lang" folder. The only thing you need to do now is, carefully, [i][b]very carefully[/b][/i], place the file in your "Lang" folder. It won't work if you put it in a different folder, or in a folder inside the Lang folder, it [i]has[/i] to be in the "Lang" folder and nowhere else.

Fourth: Open the game, and go to your settings. Navigate to the "Language" tab, and it should appear as an option for you to select!

Congratulations! You have successfully modified your game with my patented new virus-free language file (now with 12% less virus than before!)

[size=4][b]Requirements[/b][/size]
[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]A computer of some variety that is capable of playing Casualties Unknown.[/color][/size]

[size=4][b]Shout outs[/b][/size]
[color=#d4d4d8]Thanks to Orsonik for the fun game[/color]
Author: Mistamushoo

Name: Straightforward Health Panel
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
Reworks the health panel to be more straightforward
Stats are now categorized by organ, and don't always show their number values, instead changing the organ they belong to
Body-wide stats also have their own fancy little bars

[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
This mod requires BepInEx
Once it's installed, place SFHealthPanel.dll and the SFHealthPanelTextures folder in the plugins folder
This mod is probably not compatible with any other mod that messes with the health panel

This mod was made in five days starting from quite literally zero modding knowledge as a result of a random burst of "i can do whatever the fuck i want"
I am aware that this removes some of the charm that the obtuse vanilla health panel has, as you have to figure out what to pay attention to while figuring out what's causing you to rapidly perish, but i personally don't like it and i doubt i'm the only one
Author: RosaAstraea

Author: winddramon

Name: Lore Reorganization
Description:
Main goal with this is to take the game's vent nature in a different direction. Instead of being "forced" to experience negative emotions, you voluntarily explore them for the benefit they provide.

Various aspects changed, most notably intro screen and pause screen splashes.

Pause splashes have the tonal range they do intentionally. Edit if disliked.

[u][b]The text is all very easy to edit, make changes to this or the original. I encourage you to reuse or copy ideas from this, without credit, assuming you find them good. Make them your own.[/b][/u]

This mod was last tested for Demo 7.0.1, and should be forward compatible. At minimum, you can copy and paste desired text directly.

[b]To install:[/b]

Add to [steam install]/CasualtiesUnknown_Data/Lang

Will show up in settings (blue vat on left) --> Language

Click it and reset game, should be changed.

[b]To edit:[/b]

The .json files can be opened in any text editor. Notepad++ is what I used for the better search function.

Intro text is at the 'startlorenote' syntax, a bit above the middle, and pause screen text at 'pauseQuotes', directly at the bottom.

Recommended to keep a backup of the original EN.json, reference the syntax from it.
Author: MetalFilingCabinet

Name: Species selection (BETA)
Description:
Patreon: [url=https://patreon.com/TheWanderer652?utm_medium=unknown&utm_source=join_link&utm_campaign=creatorshare_creator&utm_content=copyLink]Cool Stuff[/url] (not recommended as the mod update is being released soon.)

[heading]Main Features[/heading]
[list]
[*][b]Selectable Species[/b]: Adds a new [b]Species[/b] dropdown settings option to your pre-run preset screen to choose between [b]Experiment[/b] and [b]Milky[/b].[/*]
[*][b]Visual Overhaul[/b]: Dynamically replaces player sprites (limbs, tail, heads, eyes, disfigured states) with Milky species textures.[/*]
[*][b]Tuned Physics[/b]:
[list]
[*]Player scale set to 
[code]0.90f[/code] of normal.[/*]
[*]Fall damage force reduced to 
[code]0.75x[/code] (net 
[code]0.9375x[/code] fall damage).[/*]
[*]Colliders micro-tuned horizontally to 
[code]0.85x[/code] to resolve infinite walljumping.[/*]
[*]Increased base speed and jump height to feel light and nimble.[/*]
[/list][/*]
[*][b]Balanced Stats & Leveling[/b]:
[list]
[*]Starts with [b]STR = 5[/b], [b]RES = 5[/b], and [b]INT = 17[/b].[/*]
[*]Strength is capped at [b]9[/b] and levels up very slowly (
[code]0.1x[/code] XP).[/*]
[*]Resilience levels up slightly slower (
[code]0.75x[/code] XP) while Intelligence levels up fast (
[code]1.5x[/code] XP).[/*]
[*]Milky HP is effectively [b]80[/b] (via 
[code]1.25x[/code] hazard damage scaling).[/*]
[/list][/*]
[*][b]Unique Dialogue & Voice Hook[/b]:
[list]
[*]custom dialogues for [b]35+ state reactions[/b] (from stepping on glass, to heavy bleeding, to eating good food, to meeting other traders in a bad mood).[/*]
[*]Seamless native compatibility with the [b]Animalese[/b] mod to automatically increase your player's voice pitch to match Milky traders (
[code]1.2f[/code] pitch).[/*]
[/list][/*]
[/list][line]
[heading]Installation Instructions[/heading]
[list=1]
[*]Download the mod files.[/*]
[*]Extract and place the 
[code]Beta_RaceChanger.dll[/code], 
[code]README.txt[/code], and the 
[code]Body[/code] folder directly into your game's 
[code]BepInEx/plugins/[/code] directory.[/*]
[*][b]Important[/b]: The 
[code]Body[/code] folder [i]must[/i] be placed directly next to the 
[code]Beta_RaceChanger.dll[/code] file.[/*]
[/list][line]
[heading]Requirements[/heading]
[list]
[*][b]BepInEx[/b]: Required to load the mod.[/*]
[*][b]Singleplayer Exclusivity[/b]: This mod is exclusively for singleplayer. Do not use it online/multiplayer as it will not work.[/*]
[*][b]Sprite Replacers[/b]: Currently incompatible with other sprite replacer mods. Please disable them to avoid visual glitching. [i](I will eventually fix this incompatibility in the future, but for now, I'm just a tired chud.)[/i][/*]
[*][b]Animalese Mod (Optional)[/b]: Optional but highly recommended for the custom player voice pitch![/*]
[/list][line]
[heading]Shout Outs[/heading]
[list]
[*][b]BeebiGirl[/b]: thanks for the sprite.[/*]
[/list]
Author: EvilAnthonyAppleton

Name: tigerLin Custom Trans
Description:
目前该页面的总访问量：
![:visits](https://count.getloli.com/@tigerLin_CU_Trans?theme=booru-rfck)


! ! 这不是在社区中心置顶的那个翻译版本 ! !    如需查找社区置顶翻译，请移步 https://wwarz.lanzouu.com/i4M8D3p9j11e



# tigerLin定制版简中汉化 — Casualties Unknown / 未知伤亡

<div align="center">

**一个不那么忠于原文的中文翻译。更风格化，更生活化，更多「新手友好设计」。**

进度 25% · 施工中 · 原生单机 / 多人兼容

**现已对V7.0.1游戏版本提供支持**

**翻译最新版本现为V0.1.0**

</div>

---

## 这是什么

这是《Casualties Unknown》的一款个人定制版简体中文本地化。

英文原文是冷静的说明书。准确，详尽，但不负责教你活下去。你得自己试过才知道它真的会杀了你。

游戏已有的那份社区精准翻译严谨、忠实、克制，


本版本不试图取代它，**而是走另一条路：**

本版本是一份**活下来的队友写的笔记**。不一定每个词都对应原文，但会告诉你「这一步可能死」。

“不忠实”的翻译不等于劣质的翻译。这里的「不忠实」是故意的，是设计选择。

---

## 和社区精准版的区别

| | 社区精准版 | tigerLin定制版 |
|---|---|---|
| 追求 | 准确还原原文 | 优化游玩体验 |
| 语言风格 | 严谨、中性 | 口语化、有梗 |
| 适合谁 | 想读原文想表达的意思 | 想快速理解机制、沉浸氛围 |
| 额外内容 | 无 | 新手提示、机制讲解、幽默吐槽 |

打个比方。

创可贴

> **社区精准版：** 一包小型医用敷料，用于处理轻微伤口。可减少出血。
>
> **本版本：** "一包小型医用敷料，用于处理轻微伤口。可减少出血。
>
> <color=yellow>如果你有非常着急的大出血，可以快速使用大量创可贴来止血</color>",

跳板：

> **社区精准版：** 装有压力感应板。
>
> **本版本：** 上面有一个压力板。
>
> <color=yellow>装B？让你飞起来！（神鹰黑手哥音）</color>

重力袋：

> **社区精准版：** 通过负重力减轻内容物重量的实验性容器。电量耗尽时有爆炸倾向。
>
> **本版本：** 通过负重力减轻内容物重量的实验性容器。电量耗尽时有爆炸倾向。
>
> <color=yellow>怕它爆炸的话把电池拆下来即可，拆掉电池后仍然是一个不错的容器。</color>

海洛因注射器：

> **社区精准版：** 一个150mL的注射器，需要注射使用。注射器缺少剂量标签。
>
> **本版本：** 一支150mL的海洛因注射器。缺少刻度标记和剂量说明。
>
> <color=yellow>鉴于这是强效阿片类药物，轻推慢打总是没错的。</color><color=yellow>注意：这是阿片类药物，过量使用有成瘾和窒息风险。</color>

煎饼：

> **社区精准版：** 一层层摊开的甜面糊在高温的表面上烹制，淋满糖浆。糖浆可能会沾到你的毛发上。很美味！
>
> **本版本：** 在热表面上煎制成而的层层叠叠的甜面糊，淋满了糖浆。沾到毛上相当难洗，不过好吃就完了。
>
> <color=orange>胰岛：这把高端局</color>


5个物品，2种气质。选你需要的那个

社区版把原文给你。我的版本顺便救你一命——或者至少逗你笑一下。


本版本特别强调「新手友好」：
- 危险机制用红色警告醒目标注
- 实用技巧用黄色提示高亮

---

## 本版本做了什么

**硬核医疗，软性讲解**

游戏拥有极其复杂的医疗系统（骨折、出血、感染、截肢、阿片类药物过量……）。

本翻译尽量把每种药品的实际用途、风险和注意事项讲得通俗易懂，而不是照搬原文

简而言之

**不需要自己试错才知道什么会要命**

**重建了信息层级**

- 红色：致命警告，认真看
- 黄色：实用提示，建议看
- 橙色：轻松吐槽，随便看
- 灰色：彩蛋

**给了游戏一个叙事声音。**

原版像监控摄像头：客观，有距离。本版本像一个跟你一起被扔进洞穴的倒霉蛋在物品上贴的便条————懂的不一定多，但吃过亏是真的。

**中文互联网语境**

部分描述使用了中文网络文化中的表达。如果你看到看不懂的梗可以去去B站补课。

---

## 安装方法

在 https://wwarz.lanzouu.com/i4M8D3p9j11e 按照教程安装社区汉化版后，

将我的汉化Json文件拖到  游戏根目录\CasualtiesUnknown_Data\Lang 内即可

---

## 当前进度

初次校对和润色进度：25%

### 已完成部分
- 部分医疗用品（绷带、药物、注射器、复苏装置等）
- 部分食物与饮品（从全家桶到巧克力牛奶）
- 部分工具与武器（基础工具、枪械、弹药）
- 全部容器与背包
- 全部杂物
- 全部水晶碎片
- 多人模式兼容性测试
- moodle 系统（身体状态描述）
### 施工中
- 剩下部分的医疗用品,食物,饮品,工具与武器
### 尚未开始
- 角色语音台词（吃东西、受伤、情绪波动等）
- 笔记与PDA文本
- 教程文本


制作中，后75%目前仍为AI初译版本，实际游玩中不影响理解，但我对这75%的质量不做保证

当然，现在这个如果你不太在意剧情的话，就是可用的版本了，想尝鲜的现在就可下载使用，如果你介意，可以先收藏仓库，等进度到 100% 再下载。

---

## 常见问题

**Q: 为什么叫「不那么忠于原文」？这不是翻译错误吗？**

不是错误，是设计。本版本的核心理念是在理解原文含义的基础上，用中文玩家更亲切、更好记的方式表达。如果你追求每个词都严格对应原文，社区精准版更适合你。

**Q: 里面的梗会不会过时？**

会。网络梗有保质期，这是本版本的一部分。把它当作2026年的时代胶囊，而不是永恒文本。

后期如果有机会的话会尽量更新

**Q: 多人模式能用吗？**

理论上能，但未经测试。如果你在多人模式中使用了，欢迎反馈。

**Q: 发现有翻译问题或想提建议？**

去B站找 @_tigerLin_ 反馈，提 Issue 嘛...我好像不常上GitHub，因此随缘回复

另外，迫于学业压力，仅周末可以回复

---

## 致谢

- 社区精准翻译团队：铺垫了参考基础，也定义了「标准答案」，让本版本可以放心地“跑偏”
- DeepSeek V4 Pro：完成了初译，省去了大量体力劳动（感谢梁文锋带来的低价API，让用不起GPT的我也能畅快使用，可以说没有DeepSeek就没有这版翻译）
- 所有愿意尝试这个「不正经」版本的人
- 游戏开发者 Orsoniks：创造了一个值得认真对待的世界

---

## 许可证

待定

Name: Dynamite Timer
Description:
[b][size=4]描述[/size][/b]
[color=#D4D4D8]一个用于 [b]Casualties Unknown[/b] 的 BepInEx/Harmony Mod，为点燃后的炸药显示爆炸倒计时。 [/color]

[b]安装说明[/b]
[list=1]
[*]从 https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx/releases 下载并安装 BepInEx5。[/*]
[*]将模组放入“Casualties Unknown Demo/BepInEx/plugins”文件夹中，"DynamiteTimerCN.dll" 为中文名称，而 "DynamiteTimerEN.dll" 为英文名称。请选择您更熟悉的那个。只能安装其中一个！！！[/*]
[*]此模组仅在steam发布的v7.0.1版本上进行过测试[/*]
[/list]
[size=3][color=#D4D4D8][b]功能[/b][/color][/size]
[list]
[*][color=#D4D4D8]在炸药上方显示剩余爆炸时间。[/color][/*]
[*][color=#D4D4D8]支持多个炸药同时倒计时。[/color][/*]
[*][color=#D4D4D8]显示炸药所在位置，例如：[/color]
右手 4.1s；左手 3.2s；口腔 2.5s；上背部 1.8s；中背部 1.2s；下背部 0.7s[/*]
[*][color=#D4D4D8]根据剩余时间改变显示颜色：[/color]
> 3s 绿色；<= 3s 黄色[/*]
[/list]手部显示为实际的左手和右手，而非“主手/副手”。这是因为当游戏切换主手时，主手的概念会发生变化，但对玩家而言，物品仍会保留在对应的手的位置上，因此左右手的显示更不容易引起混淆。

我使用AI辅助我编写了这个模组。这个模组主要还是我自己用。

[b]Description[/b]
[b]A BepInEx/Harmony Mod for Casualties Unknown, which displays the explosion countdown for ignited Dynamites.[/b]

[b]Installation instructions[/b]
[list=1]
[*]Download [b]BepInEx5 [/b]from https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx/releases and install it.[/*]
[*]Put the mod in Casualties Unknown Demo/BepInEx/plugins, "DynamiteTimerCN.dll" is in Chinese, while "DynamiteTimerEN.dll" is in English. Please choose the one you are more familiar with. Only one can be installed!!![/*]
[*]This mod has only been tested on the v7.0.1 version released by Steam.[/*]
[/list]

[b]Main features[/b]
[list]
[*]The remaining explosion time is displayed above the explosive.[/*]
[*]Multiple explosives can be counted down simultaneously.[/*]
[*]The location of the explosive is shown, for example:
Right hand: 4.1s; Left hand: 3.2s; Mouth: 2.5s; Upper back: 1.8s; Middle back: 1.2s; Lower back: 0.7s[/*]
[*]The display color changes according to the remaining time:
> 3s: Green; <= 3s: Yellow[/*]
[/list][heading]The hands are displayed as the physical left and right hands, rather than "primary hand/secondary hand". This is because when the game switches the primary hand, the concept of the primary hand changes, but in the player's perspective, the items remain in the corresponding left or right hand positions, making it less likely for the display of the left and right hands to cause confusion.[/heading]

[b][size=4]I used AI to assist me in writing this mod. This mod is mainly for my own use.[/size][/b]

Name: ContainerTweaks
Description:
[center][url=https://github.com/Shinkudaisuki/ContainerTweaksPlugin][img]https://img.shields.io/badge/github-repo-blue?logo=github&link=https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2FShinkudaisuki%2FContainerTweaksPlugin[/img][/url]  [img]https://img.shields.io/badge/Multiplayer-Verified-green?logo=%25F0%259F%258C%2590[/img][/center]
[b]Description[/b]

ContainerTweaks is a BepInEx plugin for [b]Casualties: Unknown Demo[/b] that improves the container UI.
It expands the container layout and adds scrolling support, making containers with many items easier to browse and use. It also adds a configurable quick-transfer hotkey for moving matching items between containers, quick liquid transfer between compatible water containers, and auto-highlights compatible items when dragging.

[b]Installation instructions[/b]

1. Install BepInEx for [b]Casualties: Unknown Demo[/b]. 
2. Download or build [b]ContainerTweaks.dll[/b]. 
3. Copy [b]ContainerTweaks.dll[/b] into the game’s BepInEx plugins folder:
[b]BepInEx/plugins/ContainerTweaks.dll[/b]
4. Launch the game.

[b]Main features[/b]

[list]
[*]Expands the container grid from 3 columns to 6 columns by default.[/*]
[*]Adds mouse wheel scrolling for containers with more items than the visible area.[/*]
[*]Keeps the expanded container area from closing unexpectedly while interacting with it.[/*]
[*]Adds a configurable quick-transfer hotkey (default: LeftControl) for moving matching items between containers.[/*]
[*]Supports quick liquid transfer between compatible water containers.[/*]
[*]Supports quick magazine-to-magazine transfers for the same ammo type.[/*]
[*]Supports quick loading rounds (in a magazine, including a 12gauge box) into a direct-feed gun (typically a shotgun).[/*]
[*]Supports quick loading rounds into a magazine, including a 12gauge box.[/*]
[*]Provides BepInEx configuration entries for grid layout, scrolling, drag threshold values, and enabling / disabling specific features.[/*]
[*]Auto-highlights compatible items in the container when dragging an item (water containers, ammo, and guns).[/*]
[*]Supports multiplayer mod [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/67]Casualties Together[/url].[/*]
[/list]
[b]Quick Transfer[/b]

Hold the configured quick-transfer key while dragging an item onto another container-like item.

[list]
[*]For normal items, matching items with the same full name are moved from the source container to the target container.[/*]
[*]For water containers, [b]themselves[/b] with same liquid types in the source container are transferred to the target [b]item[/b] container.[/*]
[*]For water containers, [b]liquids[/b] are transferred when the target [b]water[/b] container is empty or has the same liquid types.[/*]
[*]For ammo, all rounds of the same type in the source container are loaded into the target magazine (including a 12gauge box) or the target direct-feed gun (typically a shotgun).[/*]
[*]For magazines (including 12gauge boxes), rounds are transferred between matching magazines of the same ammo type.[/*]
[*]The target container must be able to hold the dragged item.[/*]
[/list]
[b]Auto Highlight[/b]

When dragging an item, compatible items in the container are automatically highlighted:
[list]
[*][b]Green[/b]: compatible and has space (e.g. a magazine that can receive the dragged round, a gun that can be loaded).[/*]
[*][b]Cyan[/b]: compatible but full (e.g. a magazine of the same ammo type but already full).[/*]
[*][b]Yellow[/b]: partially compatible water container — contains a subset of the liquid types in the dragged item.[/*]
[/list]
[b]Known issues[/b]

[list]
[*]The background and volume bar of the container view won't scale with the number of columns. Because I can't figure out how they are drawn.[/*]
[*]The simi-transparent strip indicates closing inventory view won't scale for the same reason above. But since the drop feature of the base game still works, I'd like to call this a feature ;) .[/*]
[/list]
[b]Credits[/b]

The container scrolling implementation references code from [url=https://github.com/jimmyking9999999/QoL-Unknown]QoL-Unknown[/url].
Because QoL-Unknown does not support the latest current version (v7.0.1) of the game by the time this plugin was created, the container scrolling feature was ported into this plugin.
Thanks to the original author of QoL-Unknown. If the original author prefers, the related referenced or ported code can be removed from this project.

Name: Multiplayer Inventory Load Fix
Description:
[color=#ffff00][size=4][b]Description[/b][/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]Fixes equipped and inventory items failing to restore when loading multiplayer saves with the Casualties Together mod, preventing “item too far” errors and seemingly missing items.[/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]修复了使用多人联机模组时，读取存档时客机的部分装备和背包物品无法恢复，且始终显示“物品距离过远”的问题。[/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]
Bypasses pickup-distance checks while inventory data is loading. Provides an additional configurable 20-second grace period after loading.[/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]在加载存档库存数据时，强制绕过物品距离检查。[/color][color=#d4d4d8]加载完成后，还将提供可配置的20秒额外宽限期。[/color]

[color=#d4d4d8]Displays the active fix status in the upper-left corner. Restores normal distance restrictions after the grace period.
模组生效时，将会在左上角显示启用状态。[/color][color=#d4d4d8]宽限期结束后，游戏将恢复正常距离限制。[/color]

[color=#D4D4D8]Fixes affected equipped, wearable, and inventory items.[/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]通过这个“粗糙”方法，从而修复受影响的装备物品无法恢复的问题。[/color]

[color=#ff0000][b]Warning: [/b]This mod does not fix the issue where an item equipped on the upper back can be replaced or covered by the emergency light during save loading. Since this issue can be avoided by moving the upper-back item to another slot before saving, it is currently outside the scope of this fix.
[b]请注意：[/b]本模组没有修复读取存档时，上背部装备可能被应急照明灯替换或覆盖的问题。由于在保存前将上背部的物品移动到其他栏位即可避免此问题，因此目前不在本模组的修复范围内。 [/color]

[color=#D4D4D8][i]Compatible with Casualties Unknown 7.0.1 and Casualties Together 4.0.0. [/i][/color]

[color=#D4D4D8]Although made to fix the issue with Casualties Together, this mod does not rely on it. If you haven't installed Casualties Together, this mod can still run normally.[/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]尽管是为修复Casualties Together的问题而制作，但本模组并不依赖于它。如果你没有安装Casualties Together，本模组仍能正常运行。[/color]

[color=#ffff00][size=4][b]Installation instructions [/b][/size][/color]
[list]
[*]Install BepInEx.[/*]
[*]Download and extract the mod.[/*]
[*]Place GracePickupBypass.dll in BepInEx/plugins.[/*]
[*]Start the game.[/*]
[/list][b][color=#ffff00][size=4]Configuration[/size][/color][/b]
The configuration file is generated automatically after launching the game once with the mod installed:
安装模组并启动一次游戏后，配置文件会自动生成在：
BepInEx/config/local.casualtiesunknown.gracepickupbypass.cfg

Open this file with any text editor to change the settings. Restart the game after saving your changes.
你可以使用任意文本编辑器打开并修改此文件。保存修改后，需要重新启动游戏。

Enabled: Enables or disables the fix.
启用或禁用修复。
 
PostLoadGraceSeconds: Controls the additional grace period after loading. Default: 20.
设置读档完成后的额外宽限时间，默认为 20 秒。
 
OnlyWhenMultiplayerLoaded: Only enables the fix when Casualties Together is installed and loaded.
仅在检测到 Casualties Together 时启用修复。

BypassWheneverEnabled: Debug option that permanently bypasses the relevant distance checks. Keeping this set to false is recommended.
调试选项，永久绕过相关距离检查。建议保持为 false。

ShowOverlay: Shows or hides the status display in the upper-left corner.
显示或隐藏左上角的状态提示。

[color=#ffff00][size=4][b]Requirements[/b][/size][/color]
[list]
[*][color=#D4D4D8]BepInEx[/color][/*]
[/list][list]
[*]Casualties Together (Optional, but this mod was created to fix its item issues) [/*]
[/list][color=#ffff00][size=4][b]Shout outs[/b][/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]Special thanks to everyone behind Casualties Together. The mod has brought a lot of joyful moments to me and my friends.[/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]This fix was developed by studying its multiplayer inventory synchronization behavior. [/color]
Author: QKkxl

Name: Quick Pickup
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]Use any hotkey (default [b]Middle Mouse Button[/b]) to quick pickup the item on the ground or in your inventory! [/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]It also provides a container filter list to prioritize when picking up items (default [b]Material pouch [/b]and[b] Belt[/b]) . Else it will be put in [b]Best Containers (High Encumbrance reduction)[/b], then your first empty slot.[/color]

[color=#D4D4D8]Btw, I made this mod just because QoL Mod don't works at this moment and it don't have a filter list. This mod is also inspired by QoL Mod. And if you want, you can still use this mod and disable the function in QoL mod, because this mod have a bit more functions?[/color]

If you have any suggestions, please tell me.

[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]

[*]Put the mod in Casualties Unknown Demo/BepInEx/plugins[/*]

[*]Enjoy the game![/*]
[/list]
