Name: Electric Titanium Tools
Description:
更新，适配新版，需要更新RshLib3.0，简化了配方，更容易合成，更新了钛砍刀的贴图，现在智力等级需求和原版钛装备一致，玩得开心！
[list]
[*]多人兼容是实验性软兼容，本人不玩多人模式，如遇问题及时反馈。[/*]
[*]所有多人玩家都需要安装同版本电动钛工具；使用自带版或标准版均可，但 RshLib 版本需一致。[/*]
[/list]
Electric Titanium Tools 为 Scav Prototype / Casualties Unknown 新增两款后期工具升级：

- 电动钛砍刀
- 电动钛镐

这两个物品是原版钛砍刀和钛镐的电动升级版。原版物品不会被修改，原版钛多功能工具也不会被改动。

## 功能

- 保留原版钛工具的伤害数值和工具属性。
- 支持安装可拆卸电池，包括大型电池。
- 攻击距离略微增加，更容易拉扯长老。
- 有电时：
  - 攻击速度更快。
  - 体力消耗更低。
  - 战斗时更不容易中暑。
- 没电或未安装电池时：
  - 仍可按基础钛工具数值正常使用。
  - 不会因为没电而损坏。

这些工具可以被合成，也可以在探索中搜到，并且商人会售卖。商人价格偏高。

## 合成

两个配方都位于 Tools 分类中，智力要求为 INT 16。

配方偏后期。由于这两款工具相当于把钛装备升级成了长期可用的电动装备，因此制作成本会比普通钛工具更高。

## 前置需求

- BepInEx 5
- RshLib

## 安装方法

先安装 BepInEx 和 RshLib，然后将压缩包解压到游戏根目录。

最终路径应类似：

```text
BepInEx/plugins/ElectricTitaniumTools/ElectricTitaniumTools.dll
BepInEx/plugins/ElectricTitaniumTools/Assets/electrictitaniummachete.png
BepInEx/plugins/ElectricTitaniumTools/Assets/electrictitaniumpickaxe.png

Updated for the latest version. Requires RshLib 3.0.

Recipes have been simplified and are now easier to craft. The electric titanium machete texture has also been updated. Intelligence level requirements now match the vanilla titanium equipment requirements.

Multiplayer compatibility is experimental soft compatibility. I personally do not play multiplayer mode, so please report any issues promptly.
All multiplayer players need to install the same version of Electric Titanium Tools. Either the bundled version or the standard version can be used, but the RshLib version must be the same.

Have fun!

# Electric Titanium Tools

Electric Titanium Tools adds two late-game tool upgrades for Scav Prototype / Casualties Unknown:

- Electric Titanium Machete
- Electric Titanium Pickaxe

These two items are electric upgraded versions of the vanilla titanium machete and titanium pickaxe. The original items are not modified, and the vanilla titanium multi-tool is not changed.

## Features

- Keeps the original titanium tools’ damage values and tool properties.
- Supports removable batteries, including large batteries.
- Slightly increased attack range, making it easier to kite Elders.
- When powered:
  - Faster attack speed.
  - Lower stamina consumption.
  - Reduced risk of heatstroke during combat.
- When out of power or without a battery:
  - Still works normally with the base titanium tool stats.
  - Will not break just because it has no power.

These tools can be crafted, found while exploring, and purchased from traders. Trader prices are intentionally high.

## Crafting

Both recipes are located in the Tools category.

The recipes are designed for late-game progression. Since these tools upgrade titanium equipment into long-term electric gear, their crafting cost is higher than regular titanium tools.

## Requirements

- BepInEx 5
- RshLib 3.0

## Installation

Install BepInEx and RshLib first, then extract the archive into the game root folder.

The final path should look like this:

```text
BepInEx/plugins/ElectricTitaniumTools/ElectricTitaniumTools.dll
BepInEx/plugins/ElectricTitaniumTools/Assets/electrictitaniummachete.png
BepInEx/plugins/ElectricTitaniumTools/Assets/electrictitaniumpickaxe.png

Author: Tauookie

Name: ICEneco's Custom Item API
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
可以使用json文件编写您自己的额外物品mod（本mod仅为API不包含物品，但是你可以下载样例），现在支持工具（包括手动与电动）、防具、容器、水容器、电池物品（可以添加电量归零时爆炸），食物。自定义液体我还没有写，以及自定义动作和脚本也还在计划中
制作方法请看下方 [b]How to build your items[/b]板块

*************************************************************
You can create your own additional item mods using JSON files (this mod only includes the API and does not contain items, but you can download examples). Currently, it supports tools (including manual and electric types), armors, containers, water containers, battery items (which can explode when the battery power is zero), and food. I haven't written the custom liquids yet, and custom actions and scripts are also in the planning stage.
For the construction method, please refer to the "How to build your items" section below.
[line]
[b][size=4]Installation instructions[/size][/b]
0.如果你有之前版本的我的mod，请删除它否则可能导致问题
1.在站内下载 RshLib并放在 BepInEx/Plugin
2.下载本mod文件解压后也放在   BepInEx/Plugin
*************************************************************
0. [b]If you have previously installed my mod, please delete the old version files before updating.[/b]
1. Add RshLib.dll to BepInEx/Plugin
2.Extract the compressed file and place ICEnecoCustomItemAPI.dll in BepInEx/Plugin
[line]
[b][size=4]Main features[/size][/b]
可以让你不需要写C#不需要写.dll只通过json文件就能够添加自己的物品
*************************************************************
It enables you to add your own items without writing C#, without creating .dll files, simply by using a JSON file.
[line]
[b][size=4]Requirements[/size][/b]
BepInEx
RshLib
[line]
[b][size=5]How to build your items[/size][/b]
This is a simple tutorial. For detailed instructions, please refer to the technical documentation in the compressed file.
[b]Step 1: Install Environment & API[/b]
[list=1]
[*]Ensure the game has [b]BepInEx[/b] and [b]RshLib[/b] installed (required dependencies).[/*]
[*]Place 
ICEnecoCustomItemAPI.dll into the BepInEx/plugins/ folder.[/*]
[/list][b]Step 2: Create Mod Folder Structure[/b]
[list=1]
[*]Inside 
BepInEx/plugins/, create a separate subfolder for your mod ( MyCustomMod).[/*]
[*]Extract the mod identification file named "ICEnecoCustomItemFlag.json" from the compressed package and place it in this subfolder. Fill in the properties. Currently, the internal properties are only used for recording purposes.[/*]
[*]Inside the mod folder, create an 
Items/ directory to hold subfolders for each custom item.[/*]
[/list][b][size=4]Recommended structure example:[/size][/b]
[code]BepInEx/plugins/
├── RshLib.dll
├── ICEnecoCustomItemAPI.dll
└── MyCustomMod/
    ├── ICEnecoCustomItemFlag.json
    └── Items/
        ├── my_sword/
        ├── healing_potion/
        └── ...[/code]
[b]Step 3: Write Mod Identification File[/b]
Fill ICEnecoCustomItemFlag.json with the following content:
{
  "modName": "Your Item Mod Name",  // Required
  "creator": "Author Name",          // Optional
  "version": "1.0.0"                // Optional
}
（ Currently, the internal properties are only used for recording purposes. ）
[b]Step 4: Prepare Item Image Resources[/b]
[list=1]
[*]For each item, prepare a [b]main icon[/b] “ image.png ” (square, any pixel size). If not available, it will use the image of the originPrefab item.[/*]
[*][b]For liquid containers only:[/b] optionally prepare “ fillimage.png ” (overlay image when filled).[/*]
[*]Place the images inside the corresponding item's folder.[/*]
[/list][b]Step 5: Create Normal Item Configuration ([/b]item.json[b])[/b]
[list=1]
[*]Create a new 
item.json file inside the item's folder.[/*]
[*]Check [b]Customized item attributes.docx[/b] or [b]自定义物品属性.docx[/b], determine the available fields and their purposes,[/*]
[*]Fill in the basic fields (id, originPrefab, fullName, description, weight, value, etc.).[/*]
[*]Add optional features as needed:
[list]
[*][b]Container:[/b] set "isContainer": true and provide ContainerData.(Search for "CustomItemContainerData" in the .docx file.)[/*]
[*][b]Battery-powered:[/b] set "isBatteryItem": true and provide BatteryData. (Search for " CustomItemBatteryData " in the .docx file.) [/*]
[*][b]Use actions:[/b] add attack / eat / splint etc. in useAction.（The "splint" actually refers to the action of drying one's body. The sound it makes is "splint". I will fix this issue in the next version.） (Search for "CustomItemUseData" in the .docx file.)
The format should be:"usable": true,"useAction": {"actionName (for now only have [eat][splint][attack][drawblood])": CustomItemUseData}[/*]
[*][b]Medical actions:[/b] add bandage / use in useLimbAction. (Search for "CustomItemuseLimbData" in the .docx file.)
The format should be:"usableOnLimb": true,"useLimbAction ": {"actionName (for now only have [eat][splint][attack][drawblood])": CustomItemUseData}[/*]
[/list][/*]
[*]Save the file.[/*]
[/list][b]Step 6: Create Liquid Container Configuration ([/b]liquiditem.json[b])[/b]
[list=1]
[*]Create a new 
liquiditem.json file inside the item's folder (instead of item.json).[/*]
[*]Inherit all fields from normal items, then add the following: (Search for " CustomLiquidItem " in the .docx file.)
[list]
"capacity" (maximum milliliters)"autoFill" (whether to auto-fill)"drinkAmount" (amount consumed per drink)"defaultLiquid" (initial liquid fill, e.g., {"blood": 250})Recommended use actions: "drink" or "drawblood". (Search for " CustomItemUseData " in the .docx file.)Medical actions: add injection / use in useLimbAction. (Search for "CustomItemuseLimbData" in the .docx file.)[/list][/*]
[*]Save the file.

PS：Choose either liquiditem.json or item.json.  If both exist, liquiditem.json will be read first.[/*]
[/list][b]Step 7: Create Recipe ([/b]recipe.json[b], optional)[/b]
[list=1]
[*]Create a new recipe.json file inside the item's folder.[/*]
[*]Fill in:
[list]
INT (required intelligence)category (Materials/Tools/Medicine/Utilities/Food)amount (crafting output quantity)items array (each material specifies specific / quality / isLiquid, etc.)【For specific usage, please refer to the examples.】[/list][/*]
[*]Save the file.[/*]
[/list][b]Step 8: Verification & Debugging[/b]
1.Launch the game and check the BepInEx console log：
In the file Casualties Unknown Demo\BepInEx\config\BepInEx.cfg, change:
[code]## Enables showing a console for log output.
# Setting type: Boolean
# Default value: false
Enabled = false[/code]to 
[code]Enabled = true[/code]
2.Confirm that items are loaded successfully (no errors).
3.If images do not appear, check the path and file names; if liquid filling does not work, check fillimage.png and defaultLiquid
4.If battery properties (explosion/weight reduction) do not take effect, ensure the relevant switches in 
BatteryData are set to true


[b][size=4]Following the steps above will complete the basic development of a custom item mod. Refer to the original documentation’s tables and examples for detailed field meanings. [/size][/b]

*************************************************************
此处为简易教程，详细教程请参考压缩包中的技术文档
[b]步骤1：安装环境与 API[/b]
1. 确保游戏已安装 BepInEx 和 RshLib（必需前置）。
2. 将 ICEnecoCustomItemAPI.dll 放入 BepInEx/plugins/ 文件夹。
 
[b]步骤2：创建模组文件夹结构[/b]
1. 在 BepInEx/plugins/ 下为你的模组创建一个独立子文件夹（例如 MyCustomMod）。
2. 从压缩包中解压出模组标识文件 ICEnecoCustomItemFlag.json，并放入该子文件夹中，填写其中的属性。目前，内部属性仅用于记录用途。
3. 在模组文件夹内创建 Items/ 目录，用于存放所有自定义物品的子文件夹。
结构示例：
[code]BepInEx/plugins/
├── RshLib.dll
├── ICEnecoCustomItemAPI.dll
└── MyCustomMod/
    ├── ICEnecoCustomItemFlag.json
    └── Items/
        ├── my_sword/
        ├── healing_potion/
        └── ...[/code]
 
[b]步骤 3：编写模组标识文件[/b]
在 ICEnecoCustomItemFlag.json 中填写以下内容：
{
"modName": "你的物品Mod名称", // 必填
"creator": "作者名", // 可选
"version": "1.0.0" // 可选
}
（目前，内部属性仅用于记录用途。）
 
[b]步骤 4：准备物品图片资源[/b]
1. 为每个物品准备 主图标 image.png（正方形，任意像素）。如果图片不存在，将使用 originPrefab 对应物品的图标。
2. 仅液体容器 可选准备 fillimage.png（填充时的叠加图）。
3. 将图片放入对应物品的文件夹内。
 
[b]步骤 5：创建普通物品配置（item.json）[/b]
1. 在物品文件夹中新建 item.json。
2. 参考《Customized item attributes.docx》或《自定义物品属性.docx》，确定可用的字段及其用途。
3. 填写基础字段（id, originPrefab, fullName, description, weight, value 等）。
4. 根据需要添加可选功能：
- 容器：设置 "isContainer": true 并提供 ContainerData。（在 .docx 文件中搜索 "CustomItemContainerData"）
- 电池供电：设置 "isBatteryItem": true 并提供 BatteryData。（搜索 "CustomItemBatteryData"）
- 使用动作：在 useAction 中添加 attack / eat / splint 等。（“splint” 实际指的是擦干身体的动作，发出的声音是“splint”。下个版本会修复此问题。）（搜索 "CustomItemUseData"）
格式应为：
[code]"usable": true,
"useAction": {"动作名（目前仅有 [eat][splint][attack][drawblood]）": CustomItemUseData}[/code]
 
医疗动作：在 useLimbAction 中添加 bandage / use。（搜索 "CustomItemuseLimbData"）
格式应为：
[code]"usableOnLimb": true,
"useLimbAction": {"动作名（目前仅有 [bandage ][use]）": CustomItemuseLimbData}[/code]
5. 保存文件。
 
[b]步骤 6：创建液体容器配置（liquiditem.json）[/b]
1. 在物品文件夹中新建 liquiditem.json（代替 item.json）。
2. 继承普通物品的所有字段，额外添加以下内容（搜索 "CustomLiquidItem"）：
[code]- "capacity"（最大毫升数）
- "autoFill"（是否自动装填）
- "drinkAmount"（每次饮用量）
- "defaultLiquid"（初始填充的液体，例如 {"blood": 250}）
- 推荐使用动作："drink" 或 "drawblood"。（搜索 "CustomItemUseData"）
- 医疗动作：在 useLimbAction 中添加 injection / use。（搜索 "CustomItemuseLimbData"）
格式应为：
"usableOnLimb": true,
"useLimbAction": {"动作名（目前仅有 [injection ][use]）": CustomItemuseLimbData}[/code]
3. 保存文件。
 
PS：请选择使用 liquiditem.json 或 item.json 之一。如果两者同时存在，将优先读取 liquiditem.json。
 
[b]步骤 7：创建合成表（recipe.json，可选）[/b]
1. 在物品文件夹中新建 recipe.json。
2. 填写：
- INT（所需智力）
- category（Materials/Tools/Medicine/Utilities/Food）
- amount（产出数量）
- items 数组（每个材料需指定 specific / quality / isLiquid 等）【具体用法请参考示例。】

3. 保存文件。
 
[b]步骤 8：验证与调试 [/b]
1. 启动游戏并查看 BepInEx 控制台日志： 在文件 Casualties Unknown Demo\BepInEx\config\BepInEx.cfg 中，将：
[code]## Enables showing a console for log output.
# Setting type: Boolean
# Default value: false
Enabled = false[/code]改为：
[code]Enabled = true[/code]2. 确认物品是否成功加载（无报错）。
3. 若图片不显示，检查路径及文件名；若液体填充无效，检查 fillimage.png 和 defaultLiquid。
4. 若电池特性（爆炸/减重）不生效，确认 BatteryData 中的相关开关已设为 true。
 
按照以上步骤即可完成一个自定义物品模组的基本开发。详细字段含义请参考原文档中的表格和示例。
任何bug与问题都可以在此贴下回复
Author: ICEneco

Name: MULTIPLAYER_Sprite_Player_Customizer_ MULTIPLAYER
Description:
[size=6][b][color=#8e7cc3][font=Comic Sans MS]MULTIPLAYER[/font][/color] [color=#999999]S[/color][color=#b6b6b6]U[/color][color=#cccccc]P[/color][/b][/size][color=#d8d8d8][size=6][b]P[/b][/size][/color][color=#ffffff][size=6][b]O[/b][/size][/color][b][size=6][color=#f4f4f4]R[/color][color=#ffffff]T[/color]
[/size][/b][img width=413,height=320]https://i.postimg.cc/sgRH3qv6/Video-Project-9.gif[/img]
[size=6][b][color=#00ff00]New Esc-menu button [/color][/b][/size]
[img width=213,height=120]https://i.postimg.cc/TPVbfqn7/image.png[/img]

[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]Sprite Player Customizer is an expanded standalone fork of Player Sprite Replacer by Karlo Poljančić (dogederp).
It keeps the original real-time sprite switching concept and adds a full in-game pixel editor with live character preview.
You can now create, edit, and manage custom sprite sets directly in-game without restarting or manually replacing files every time.[/color]

[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
[list=1]
[*][color=#D4D4D8]Make sure BepInEx is installed.[/color][/*]
[*][color=#D4D4D8]Extract mod files into:[/color]

[code]...\steamapps\common\Casualties Unknown Demo\BepInEx\plugins\[/code][/*]
[*][color=#D4D4D8]Launch the game.[/color][/*]
[*][color=#D4D4D8]Open the mod menu with F4 or during the game press ESC and then the button in the top-left corner "sprite"[/color].[/*]
[/list][heading]HOW IT WORKS[/heading]
Inside the CustomSprites folder, each character set is stored in its own directory (for example st1, st2, st3, etc.).
Each set contains sprite files in the Head and Body subfolders.
When you open the mod menu in-game (F4), the mod scans these folders and shows all available sprite parts.
Clicking a PNG opens it in the built-in pixel editor.
In the editor:
[list]
[*]You can paint directly on sprite textures (pixel-by-pixel).[/*]
[*]Changes are previewed on the player model in real time.[/*]
[*]You can use tools like Brush, Eraser, Picker, Fill, Line, and Rect tools.[/*]
[*]Color can be adjusted with color wheel, Hex input, opacity, dark/light tone, and brush size.[/*]
[*]Undo/Redo and Save are available before committing file changes.[/*]
[*]You can also open the current PNG in an external editor (for example Paint).[/*]
[/list]Character model workflow:
[list]
[*]The model preview panel shows major body parts.[/*]
[*]Click a part to load its related variants list.[/*]
[*]Select a variant from the list to open and edit that exact PNG.[/*]
[/list]The mod keeps everything in-game, so you can create and test sprite edits quickly without restarting.

[heading]Media
[img]https://i.postimg.cc/bYL205G6/sasisku-(1).gif[/img]
[img]https://i.postimg.cc/6QQrnNcd/image-(7).png[/img]

Controls[/heading]
Global
[list]
[*]F4 — open/close mod UI.[/*]
[*]ESC [size=2]— closes current UI layer (fullscreen color picker -> dialogs -> editor).[/size][/*]
[*]NumPad/custom hotkeys — switch sprite set.[/*]
[/list]Main Window
[list]
[*]LMB + drag title bar — move window (attached preview/variants panels move together).[/*]
[*]Mouse wheel [size=2]over lists — scroll file/variant lists.[/size][/*]
[*]In model preview: click body part to load its variant group.[/*]
[/list]PNG Editor
[list]
[*]MMB + drag — pan canvas.[/*]
[*]Mouse wheel over canvas — zoom at cursor.[/*]
[*]LMB + drag split bar — resize tools/canvas panels.[/*]
[*]LMB + drag title bar — move editor window.[/*]
[/list]Color & Painting
[list]
[*]LMB / LMB + drag on color wheel — continuous color picking.[/*]
[*]Fullscreen color wheel supports the same LMB drag picking.[/*]
[*]Sliders + numeric fields set exact:
[list]
[*]opacity ( 0–100),[/*]
[*]tone ( 0–200, dark->light),[/*]
[*]brush size ( 1–16).[/*]
[/list][/*]
[/list]Workflow
[b]Editing variants opens on the variants panel (on the right).[/b]
The [b]"Show All"[/b] function toggles the full list of head and body variants.
[b]Main Features[/b]
[list]
[*]Fully standalone mod – does not require the original mod to be installed.[/*]
[*]Real-time switching between sprite sets.[/*]
[*]Full in-game pixel editor for head and body PNG files.[/*]
[*]Real-time preview: changes are immediately shown on the player model.[/*]
[*]Tools: Brush, Eraser, Color Picker, Fill, Line, Rectangle Outline, Rectangle Fill.[/*]
[*]Color wheel + hex input.[/*]
[*]Sliders for opacity, tint (dark/light), and brush size.[/*]
[*]Undo / Redo / Save.[/*]
[*]Saved color presets.[/*]
[*]External edit button ("Open in Paint").[/*]
[*]Character model preview panel with a list of interactive parts and variants.[/*]
[*]Empty sprite detection in the file list (
[code][empty][/code] marker).[/*]
[*]UI input protection (prevents clicks from reaching the pause menu).[/*]
[/list][b]Requirements[/b]
[list]
[*]BepInEx 5.4.23.5[/*]
[*]Casualties Unknown demo (Scav prototype) installed via Steam.[/*]
[/list][b]Acknowledgements[/b]
[list]
[*]Thanks to Carlo Poljančič (dogederp) for creating the original Player Sprite Replacer mod and releasing it under the MIT license, which allowed me to create this modified version.[/*]
[*]Original game assets provided by Orsoniks.[/*]
[/list]

Name: Cu-Hotbar
Description:
[b]CuHotbar[/b]

[u]A customizable Minecraft-style hotbar for Casualties: Unknown. Bind items from your inventory to slots and switch them to your main hand instantly.[/u]

为《未知伤亡》添加一条可自定义的快捷物品栏：把背包物品绑定到槽位，随时快速切到主手。

[b]Installation instructions[/b]

1. Install BepInEx.
2. Place the `CuHotbar` folder into `BepInEx/plugins/`.
3. Launch the game; open settings from the main-menu button, the in-game pause button, or the SaveManager tab.

1. 安装 BepInEx。
2. 把 `CuHotbar` 文件夹放入 `BepInEx/plugins/`。
3. 启动游戏，通过主菜单按钮、游戏内暂停按钮或 SaveManager 分页打开设置。

[b]Main features[/b]

- Drag items from the inventory onto slots to bind them.
- Switch to the main hand with number keys or the scroll wheel; right-click to use the held item.
- Adjustable position, scale, and background opacity.
- Bindings cached per character, persisting across sessions.
- Auto-refill and original-spot return when items are used or dropped.

- 从背包拖动物品到槽位绑定。
- 数字键 / 滚轮切到主手，右键使用手中物品。
- 位置、缩放、背景透明度均可调。
- 绑定按角色缓存，重进游戏不丢失。
- 物品用尽 / 丢出后自动补充并归还原位。

[b] Requirements[/b]

- BepInEx (required).
- SaveManager (optional): when present, settings merge into its panel as a tab.

- BepInEx（必需）。
- SaveManager（可选）：在场时设置合并为其面板的一个分页。

Repository: [[url=https://github.com/huanxin996/Cu-Hotbar]huanxin996/Cu-Hotbar[/url]]
SaveManager:[[url=https://github.com/huanxin996/Cu-SaveManager]huanxin996/Cu-SaveManager[/url]]
Author: huanxin996

Name: Dog things
Description:
Description
Adds a series of dog-themed items to Casualties: Unknown, allowing your Expie to enjoy the happy (?) life of an Earth dog.
Now supports game version DEMO v7.0.

Installation instructions
1. Make sure BepInEx and RshLib are installed
2. Place the "DogThings" folder (includes DogThings.dll and the img/ folder) into BepInEx/plugins/

Main features
Added items below:
- Dog Collar : Slowly increases happiness when worn (max 30)  
- Dog Bowl : Grants extra happiness when drinking from it (max 50) 
- Pet Ball : Grants happiness on pickup
- Elizabethan Collar : Prevents self-harm once while worn
- Dog Chew : Edible multiple times, restores small amounts of hunger and happiness
- Dog Carrier : A backpack big enough to carry 50u
- Poop Bag : A bag that can only hold poop. But a lot of it.

Requirements
- BepInEx (5.x)
- RshLib (3.0.0)

Shout outs
Thanks to rushellxyz (the author of RshLib) for the custom item framework.

Source code and more details can be found at [url=https://github.com/winddramon/Dogthings]https://github.com/winddramon/Dogthings[/url]



介绍
为游戏《Casualties: Unknown》添加一系列狗狗主题的道具，让你的Expie享受地球小狗的快乐（？）生活。
当前支持DEMO 7.0版本。

安装说明
1. 确保已安装 BepInEx 和 RshLib 插件
2. 将 DogThings文件夹（包括 DogThings.dll 及 img 文件夹）放入 BepInEx/plugins/ 目录。

主要内容
新增以下道具：
- 狗项圈： 佩戴时缓慢增加心情（上限 30）
- 狗食盆：从中喝取液体时额外增加点心情（上限 50）
- 宠物球：拾取时增加心情
- 伊丽莎白圈：佩戴后防止一次自伤
- 狗咬胶：可食用多次，增加微量饱食和心情
- 狗狗背包：一个大背包，能装入重达50u的东西
- 捡屎袋：一个只能用来装屎的袋子，但是能装很多

前置需求
- BepInEx (5.x)
- RshLib (3.0.0)

鸣谢
感谢RshLib作者rushellxyz提供的自定义物品框架

源代码和其他细节可以访问： [url=https://github.com/winddramon/Dogthings]https://github.com/winddramon/Dogthings[/url]
Author: winddramon

Name: Custom Fungame Pack
Description:
[url=https://github.com/Black-Moss/Custom-Fungame-Pack]GitHub[/url] / [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/games/scavprototype/mods/131]NexusMods[/url]
[i]A custom map/gamemode ("Fungame") management system for [b]Casualties Unknown[/b].[/i]

[i][b]Custom Fungame Pack[/b] is a BepInEx plugin that introduces a custom map/gamemode system called "Fungame" to Casualties Unknown. It allows players to load, manage, and create custom maps with unique features, waypoints, items, and game logic.[/i]

Name: Casualties Unknown Dev Menu 7.0.1
Description:
[center][b][i][u]DESCRIPTION[/u][/i][/b][/center]
[center]Adds an in-game developer and cheat menu to Casualties Unknown 6.1. Open the menu with F1 and get full control over your playthrough — spawn any item directly into your inventory, heal instantly, toggle pixelate effect, or run any console command manually.

[b][i][u] INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS
[/u][/i][/b]1. Download the archive
2. Extract it into your Casualties Unknown folder (where CasualtiesUnknown.exe is located)
3. Launch the game and press F1 to open the menu

[u][i][b]MAIN FEATURES[/b][/i][/u][/center]
[center]- Spawn any item directly into your inventory
- Instant heal
- Pixelate toggle
- Custom console command input
- 5 item categories: Medicine, Food, Weapons, Tools, Other
- Search bar for quick item lookup
- Clean purple gradient UI
- Press F1 to open and close

[b][i][u]REQUIREMENTS[/u][/i][/b][/center]
[center]BepInEx 5.4.23.5 (x64) for Unity — already included in the archive, no separate download needed.

[b][i][u]SHOUT OUTS
Thanks to the Casualties Unknown dev team for a great game. Built with BepInEx and Harmony.[/u][/i][/b][/center]

Name: A shelter that relies on Custom Structure

eightballl (Conceptualized the mod idea)
Author: Azbith

Name: Crafting Framework
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=3]This Mod (previously "More Craftables") loads .json files from the "CraftingFramework\recipes" folder.[/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=3]A template is provided within the folder as a .txt file with brief possibly wrong understanding of the variables.[/size][/color]

[color=#D4D4D8][size=3]Recipes from "More Craftables" are now available as Optional FIles. [/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=3]I am willing to add more at request while keeping in mind balancing like before.[/size][/color]

[color=#ff7700][size=3][b]WARNING [color=#ffffff]: [/color][/b][color=#ffffff]It seem [/color][color=#ffffff]Liquids must have the full amount in 1 container. (400ml of liquid cannot be 200 and 200)[/color][/size][/color]
[color=#00ff00][size=3][b]MP Compatibility [color=#ffffff]: [/color][/b][color=#ffffff]Host can craft, clients cannot unless they share recipes with host.[/color][/size][/color]

If anyone knows how to handle recipe syncing I'm all ears but otherwise that is outside my ability.

[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]Drag the contents of "CraftingFramework.zip" into your "BepInEx > Plugins" folder.[/color][/size]

[size=4][b]Main features[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=3]Adds reading .json files within the plugins folder and adding them as recipes to craft within the game.[/size][/color]

[size=4][b]Requirements[/b][/size]
[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]Bepinex[/color][/size]

[size=4][b]Shout outs[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]Shout out to the "Razor blade" mod by  RushellXYZ having it's source code so I could see how recipes are handled.[/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]Shout out to my friend Tesseffex for helping me along the way with converting the mod.[/color]
Author: Deltash

Name: Terraria Unknown
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
Replaces sprites, tiles, and audio with Terrarian.
(This mod is still in development, expect bugs.)
The mod weighs a lot because there are a lot of sounds in the Audio folder

[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]Place the plugins folder in BepInEx.
The plugins folder should eventually contain two files: Replacer.dll and ResourcePack.[/color]

[size=4][b]Main features[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]Replaces sprites, tiles, and audio [/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]Easy to customize[/color]

[size=4][b]Requirements[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]The mod requires BepInEx, any version[/color]

[color=#d4d4d8][b][size=4]How to set your custom textu[/size][size=4]res[/size][/b][/color]
[color=#d4d4d8][size=3]Put your files in the correct folder[/size][/color]

[color=#d4d4d8]Sprites, Backgrounds, and Tools - Sprites Folder[/color]
[color=#d4d4d8][size=3]Tiles and UI - Texture folder[/size][/color]
[color=#d4d4d8][size=3]Music and SFX - Audio folder[/size][/color]
[color=#d4d4d8][size=3]The mod supports png, ogg, mp3, and wav files[/size][/color]

[color=#d4d4d8][size=3]Also, duplicate the image in the Textures folder if it's a weapon[/size][/color]
Author: Kegluss

Name: LuckyBlocks
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
[b]Lucky Blocks[/b] transforms every block you destroy into a random surprise! Instead of boring regular loot, you'll get random items, hostile mobs, or deadly traps.
The deeper you dig, the more dangerous it becomes. Will you find rare loot, or will a thornbackelder crawl out of the block you just broke?

[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
[list=1]
[*][b]Install BepInEx[/b] (if you haven't already)
[list]
[*]Download BepInEx 5.x for your game version[/*]
[*]Extract it to your game folder (where the .exe is located)[/*]
[/list][/*]
[*][b]Install the mod[/b]
[list]
[*]Copy LuckyBlocks.dll to BepInEx/plugins/[/*]
[/list][/*]
[*][b]Run the game[/b]
[list]
[*]That's it! Every destroyed block will now drop random loot.[/*]
[/list][/*]
[/list][size=4][b]Main features[/b][/size]
[list]
[*]✅ [b]Every block is lucky[/b] – Any destroyed block triggers a random drop[/*]
[*]✅ [b]Random items[/b] – Over 300+ items from the entire game (weapons, medical supplies, food, tools, ammo, etc.)[/*]
[*]✅ [b]Hostile mobs[/b] – Spawns enemies like Shadecrawler, Cave Ticks, Thornback, Wallbiter, and more[/*]
[*]✅ [b]Deadly traps[/b] – Landmines, bear traps, turrets, barbed wire, and other dangers[/*]
[*]✅ [b]Depth-based difficulty[/b] – The deeper you go, the higher the risk[/*]
[*]✅ [b]Random condition[/b] – Items spawn with 50-100% durability[/*]
[/list][size=4][b]Requirements[/b][/size]
[list]
[*][b]BepInEx 5.x[/b][/*]
[/list]
Author: Plushkaa

Name: New Firearms
Description:
New firearms reworks all gun-related things in Casualties Unknown

[size=4][b]Key features[/b][/size]
[size=3]- Fire mode selector, some full-auto guns can be put into semi-auto mode to not waste ammunition[/size]
[size=3]- Different magazine types, m1911 mag, small magazine, smg magazine, etc.[/size]
[size=3]- Different ammunition types: 12gauge birdshot, buckshot, slugshot; 9mm round, hollow and venomus[/size]
[size=1]You can also choose what ammo fill magazine with when spawning by adding $ at a end of id[/size]
[size=3]- Magazine feed guns, tube feed guns, barrel feed guns (with display of all chambers!)[/size]
[size=3]- Custom UI sprites for guns, custom sounds too[/size]
[size=3]- Balancing rework: guns significly buffed to make them more useful[/size]
[size=3]- Shooting right over/under enemy stuns them[/size]
[size=3]- SLiders for configurabile damage/jaming/casings[/size]
[size=3]- Multiplayer compatability![/size]
[size=3]- Support for custom gun packs by .json editing![/size]

[size=1]TODO: Update media page[/size]

All guns:
[spoiler]Makeshift pistol:
   Early-game gun, can be easily crafted, and most lightweight. With a tradeoff of dealing least damage of all, being able to hold no more then 2 rounds at a time, and having bad durability
M1911:
   9mm semi-auto handgun, fairly lightweight and durabile. Can only hold 8 rounds in specialized magazine, craftable tho recipes will take a while to learn (18 int)
Glock 17 (pistol):
   Very durabile, holds 17 rounds in small magazine and good damage/accuracy. Not craftable
Glock 18:
   Upgrade of glock 17 (16 int). Same in everything, except option for full-auto

UZI:
   Reuses assets from SMG in gunsaw
   Custom rack/unrack sounds and buttons
   Craftable (19 int), moderate damage of 9mm
   Lightweight (1u), uses small magazines or SMG magazines
   Not very durabile, have high recoil, inaccurate
   High RPM and only full-auto
MP5:
  Reuses assets from Mini-SMG in gunsaw
  1.25u, highest damage of 9mm
  Uses small magazines or SMG magazines
  Most relaible of 9mm, accurate, select-fire
Vector:
[size=1]  TODO i prob would repaint it[/size]
  Reuses assets from Prototype in gunsaw
  Heavy (1.5u), highest damage of 9mm
  Uses only SMG magazines
  Very accurate and have almost no recoil
  Low RPM and select-fire
P90:
  Reuses assets from PDW in gunsaw
  1.25u, highest damage of 9mm
  Uses P90 magazines (that are not craftable...)
  Low recoil, select-fire

Sawed off:
  Reuses assets from Sawedoff in gunsaw
  Lightweight (1u), lowest damage of 12gauge
Double barrel:
Pump-action shotgun
Bolt-action rifle[/spoiler]
[color=#00ff00][b]MP Status: C[/b][b]ompatible[/b][/color]
Required on both parties
Even more, gun jamming is no longer dysnching and removing mag now makes you auto pick up

Other mods that do anything with firearms (including rusiber's new firearms loader and my old new firearms) are [b]Incompatible[/b]
[b][size=4]
Installation instructions[/size][/b]
If you mod your game for first time (dont have BepInEx):
[spoiler]Go to BepInEx download page
https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx/releases/tag/v5.4.23.5
And download BepInEx_win_x64_5.4.23.5
Open steam, choose browse local file
Extract BepInEx contents into game folder's root (winhttp.dll should be in same folder as executable)
Open game once and close
Now folder BepInEx/plugins should be created

Additional instruction for Linux users:
  - Add  `WINEDLLOVERRIDES="winhttp=n,b"  %command%` into launch arguments[/spoiler]

Download and extract RshLib into BepInEx/plugins(if you haven't before)
  You can verify that RshLib loaded by seeing "This is a modded beta build" on top
Download `NewFirearms` and extract into BepInEx/plugins

[size=4][b]Known bugs[/b][/size]
[size=2]Integration with prostethics is broken, log messages are actually lying as it looks for method that i deleted in 1.5.3[/size]
[size=2]In multiplayer, killing trader from a gun, makes host to apply mood penality?[/size]
[size=2]Do not try to load save without this mod with this mod, and vica verse[/size]
[size=2]Switching your main hand might mess up with aim (but this bug is present in vanila too!)[/size]
[size=2]Tube feed option behave differently from what you'd expect IRL[/size]
[size=2]After loading a save gun might have wrong sprite, this is only visual[/size]
[size=2]Yet again, other firearms-releated mods not supported[/size]

[b][size=4]Future plans[/size][/b]
 - More standalone guns (and crosbow!)(add more assets to already existing, and add rifles and special)
 - Tube feed with shift (like if you have tube-feed shotgun full of buckshots, and then instert a birdshot pump slider, a birdshot now will be in chamber)
 - Revolver feed (idk, the reloading it is bad)
 - Maybe battery powered (chemcoilgun, railgun, laser)
 - Maybe minigame (i saw that concept https://youtu.be/eKnXDqIYSiE might implement)
 - Maybe firearm handling course
 - Maybe attachments

Documentation for creating new gun pack have moved into NewFirearms/doc.txt
Please report any bugs you find

Name: Last Stand Custom Music
Description:
[b]Last Stand Theme[/b]
Lightweight mod that plays a song when last stand activates.
Simply place an audio file inside with the .dll in plugins and it'll be up and running!

[b]Setup[/b]
[list=1]
[*]Install BepInEx 5.4.23.5 (or newer 5.x release) into your Casualties Unknown installation.[/*]
[*]This mod was developed and tested on Casualties Unknown v7.0.1. Ensure your version matches or expect weird behavior.[/*]
[*]Place the Ultimate Sound Swap DLL into:
[code]Casualties Unknown/
└── BepInEx/
    └── plugins/
        └── LastStandTheme.dll[/code][/*]
[*]Launch the game once. The mod will automatically create a config file inside the config directory if one does not already exist. You can modify this file to enable/disable muting the drone and looping the song using a text editor like notepad:
[code]Casualties Unknown/
└── BepInEx/
    └── config/
        └── sebastian.laststandtheme.cfg[/code][/*]
[*]Enable HideManagerGameObject in BepInEx's config file. You'll find it in:
[code]Casualties Unknown/
└── BepInEx/
    └── config/
        └── BepInEx.cfg[/code]You should be able to open it in a text editor like notepad. Confirm that:
[code][Chainloader]
HideManagerGameObject = true[/code][/*]
[/list]
Author: SomeIdi0t

Name: ChangeSkin-Multiplayer
Description:
[size=6][b]Casualties Unknown - ChangeSkin Multiplayer[/b][/size]

Multiplayer-compatible build of ChangeSkin, adapted for Krokosha Casualties Unknown Multiplayer. Replace your character's sprite skin and sync it to other players who also have the mod.

[size=5][b]Compatibility[/b][/size]

[list]
[*]Loader: [b]BepInEx 5.4.23.5[/b][/*]
[*]Required dependency: [b]Krokosha Casualties Unknown Multiplayer[/b] (latest release)[/*]
[*]Game version: [b]Casualties Unknown demo v6.1[/b][/*]
[/list]
The game is still in demo — file layouts and APIs can change between versions, which may break the mod until it's updated.

[size=5][b]Please report any bugs you find via our GitHub issues page or here on NexusMods![/b][/size]


[size=5][b]Permissions[/b][/size]

If the game creator [b]Orsoniks[/b] does not want this mod public, please contact me and I will take it down.


[size=5][b]Installation[/b][/size]

[size=4][b]1. Prerequisites[/b][/size]

[list=1]
[*]Install BepInEx 5 — official guide: [url=https://docs.bepinex.dev/articles/user_guide/installation/index.html]https://docs.bepinex.dev/articles/user_guide/installation/index.html[/url][/*]
[*]Install [b]Krokosha Casualties Unknown Multiplayer[/b] (required) following its own instructions.[/*]
[/list]
[size=4][b]2. ChangeSkinMP[/b][/size]

[list=1]
[*]Open the mod archive and grab the
[code]ChangeSkinMP[/code]folder.[/*]
[*]Drop it into your game's
[code]BepInEx/plugins[/code]folder — the same place where Krokosha Casualties Multiplayer lives. You should end up with
[code]BepInEx/plugins/ChangeSkinMP/ChangeSkinMP.dll[/code]and a
[code]resources[/code]folder next to it.[/*]
[*]Start the game.[/*]
[/list]

[size=5][b]Usage[/b][/size]

[list=1]
[*]Start a run and open the in-game console.[/*]
[*]Load a skin — local or remote:
[list]
[*][code]skin load-local robot[/code]— bundled robot skin (or any folder you've added to
[code]resources[/code]).[/*]
[*][code]skin load-remote https://skin.cat-bot.de/d/163[/code]— download from the skin portal.[/*]
[/list][/*]
[*]Turn on replacement:
[code]skin enable[/code].[/*]
[*]Done. Other players will see your skin only if [b]they also have the mod installed[/b] and [b]the host has it installed too[/b] (the host is what syncs skin data between clients).[/*]
[/list]

[size=5][b]Console commands[/b][/size]

[list]
[*][code]skin load-local <name>[/code]— load a local skin from
[code]resources/<name>/[/code][/*]
[*][code]skin load-remote <url>[/code]— load a remote skin from a URL[/*]
[*][code]skin enable[/code]— turn skin replacement on[/*]
[*][code]skin disable[/code]— turn it off[/*]
[*][code]skin ban <player>[/code]— block a specific player's skin from being shown to you[/*]
[*][code]skin unban <player>[/code]— undo a ban[/*]
[*][code]skin rule-set <rule> <true|false>[/code]— set a rule[/*]
[*][code]skin rule-get <rule>[/code]— read the current value of a rule[/*]
[/list]
Available rules:
[list]
[*][code]SkinUploading[/code]— whether your skin gets sent to other players[/*]
[*][code]SkinDownloading[/code]— whether you receive and display other players' skins[/*]
[/list]

[size=5][b]Creating your own skins[/b][/size]

[list=1]
[*]Back up your current local skin folder first.[/*]
[*]Duplicate the bundled
[code]robot[/code]folder and rename the copy to your skin's name.[/*]
[*]Replace the PNGs inside with your own art. [b]Keep the file names exactly the same[/b] — sprites are matched by file name, so renaming them will break replacement.[/*]
[*]Try to match the original image dimensions. I haven't tested what happens when they don't, so YMMV.[/*]
[/list]
Load it in-game with
[code]skin load-local <yourFolderName>[/code].


[size=5][b]Finding skins[/b][/size]

Main skin portal: [url=https://skin.cat-bot.de/]https://skin.cat-bot.de/[/url]

Browse community skins there, then load directly with
[code]skin load-remote <url>[/code].


[size=5][b]Notes[/b][/size]

[list]
[*]You do [b]not[/b] need to edit
[code]sharedassets1.assets[/code]for this mod.[/*]
[*]Both the host and any client whose skin needs to sync must have the mod installed.[/*]
[/list]

[size=5][b]Bug reports[/b][/size]

Something broken? Report it here on NexusMods or open an issue on GitHub: [url=https://github.com/05126619z/ChangeSkin-Multiplayer]https://github.com/05126619z/ChangeSkin-Multiplayer[/url]


[size=5][b]Credits[/b][/size]

[list]
[*][b]Mod by:[/b] dogederp (Karlo)[/*]
[*][b]Contributor / original ChangeSkin author:[/b] 05126619z[/*]
[*][b]Playtester:[/b] Dmonya[/*]
[/list]

[size=5][b]Contributing & support[/b][/size]

[list]
[*]GitHub (primary — gets updates first): [url=https://github.com/05126619z/ChangeSkin-Multiplayer]https://github.com/05126619z/ChangeSkin-Multiplayer[/url][/*]
[*]Discord: [url=https://discord.gg/aCBrFPYYjs]https://discord.gg/aCBrFPYYjs[/url][/*]
[*]Pull requests welcome.[/*]
[*]Open an issue for questions or bug reports.[/*]
[*]Got screenshots or videos of your skins? Feel free to add them to this page — I'd love to see them.[/*]
[*]Buy me a coffee: [url=https://buymeacoffee.com/dogederp]https://buymeacoffee.com/dogederp[/url][/*]
[/list]

[size=5][b]Looking for an alternative?[/b][/size]

If this mod doesn't fit your needs:
[list]
[*][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/15]Player Sprite Replacer[/url] — simpler, single-player, Numpad-based skin swapper.[/*]
[/list]
Author: d0gederp

Name: WorldMap
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
WorldMap – Never get lost again!

Adds a fully functional minimap and fullscreen world map to [b]Scav Prototype. [/b]Helps you navigate underground layers, spot valuable items and containers, and explore with confidence.

[b][size=4]Features:[/size][/b]
[list]
[*][b]Fog of war[/b] – the map is hidden until you explore. Walk around to reveal terrain in a 10‑block radius (adjustable).[/*]
[*][b]Real‑time terrain display[/b] – different colors for different materials (stone, sand, soil, grass, metal, etc.).[/*]
[*][b]Player marker[/b] – red dot with a white line showing your facing direction.[/*]
[*][b]Item markers[/b] – yellow dots for loose items on the ground.[/*]
[*][b]Container markers[/b] – blue squares for any container.[/*]
[*][b]Other crates[/b] – brown squares for containercrate, foodbox, etc.[/*]
[*][b]Med crates & drop capsules[/b] – special icons for medical crates and supply pods.[/*]
[*][b]Trader markers[/b] – green squares for neutral NPC traders.[/*]
[*][b]Enemy markers[/b] – red squares for spiders, crawlers, ticks, thornbacks, and other hostile creatures.[/*]
[*][b]Buildings & interactable objects[/b] – grey squares with border / yellow circles.[/*]
[*][b]Fullscreen map[/b] – right‑click on the minimap to open a large, draggable, zoomable map. Right‑click again to close.[/*]
[*][b]Smooth zoom[/b] – mouse wheel zooms in/out on both minimap (2–500 blocks radius) and fullscreen map (0.2× – 20×).[/*]
[*][b]Minimap window[/b] – drag [b]LMB[/b] anywhere on the minimap to move it. Player controls are automatically locked while dragging (no accidental movement or attacks).[/*]
[*][b]Configurable hotkey[/b] – change the toggle key in BepInEx/config/com.purpleuser.worldmap.cfg (default: M).[/*]
[*][b]High refresh rate[/b] – both maps update at ~60 FPS for smooth real‑time tracking.[/*]
[*][b]Works on all layers[/b] – explored fog of war is preserved when descending/ascending and after world regeneration.[/*]
[/list][size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
[list=1]
[*]Install BepInEx 5 (if not already installed):
[list]
[*]Download from: [url=https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx/releases]https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx/releases[/url][/*]
[*]Extract to your game folder[/*]
[*]Run the game once, then close it[/*]
[/list][/*]
[*]Install the mod:
[list]
[*]Download MinimapMod.dll[/*]
[*]Copy it to: [Game Folder]\BepInEx\plugins\[/*]
[/list][/*]
[*]Launch the game – the minimap will appear in the top‑right corner.[/*]
[/list][b][size=4]Controls[/size][/b]
[list]
[*]M (customizable) – toggle minimap on/off[/*]
[*]Mouse wheel (over the minimap) – zoom in/out[/*]
[*]LMB drag on the minimap – move minimap window (player controls locked while dragging)[/*]
[*]Right‑click on minimap – open fullscreen map[/*]
[*]LMB drag on fullscreen map – pan the map[/*]
[*]Mouse wheel on fullscreen map – zoom in/out[/*]
[*]Right‑click on fullscreen map – close fullscreen map[/*]
[/list][left][b][size=4]Configuration[/size][/b]
After first launch, edit BepInEx/config/com.USER.worldmap.cfg:[/left]
[left]ToggleKey = M[/left]
[left][/left]
[size=4][b]Requirements:[/b][/size]
BepInEx 5 (any 5.x version)
Author: Plushkaa

Name: Quick Medical Automation
Description:
Quick Medical Automation is a BepInEx medical automation mod made for Scav Prototype / Casualties Unknown Demo.
It automatically evaluates the player's current condition and uses accessible medical supplies in priority order, focusing first on critical life signs, severe blood loss, major bleeding, glass / shrapnel, fractures / dislocations, infection / sepsis, and severe pain or opiate withdrawal.
The goal of this mod is not to “play the game for you,” but to reduce repetitive medical micromanagement so you can focus more on exploration, survival, and combat decisions.
[b]Main Features[/b]
[list]
[*]Automatically evaluates the player's current vitals and injuries[/*]
[*]Automatically uses accessible medical supplies for treatment[/*]
[*]Recursively scans inventory slots and container contents for medical items[/*]
[*]Prioritizes severe blood loss, open wounds, and critical conditions[/*]
[*]Automatically removes glass / shrapnel[/*]
[*]Automatically handles dislocations and fracture splinting[/*]
[*]Automatically handles infection, sepsis, and local disinfection[/*]
[*]Automatically manages pain relief and opiate withdrawal when needed[/*]
[*]Supports both Chinese and English[/*]
[*]Includes an in-game standalone configuration panel[/*]
[*]Supports notification mode, scan interval, panel scale, and opacity adjustment[/*]
[/list][b]How to Use[/b]
[b]Default Hotkeys[/b]
[list]
[*]F8: Toggle auto treatment on / off[/*]
[*]F9: Run one immediate smart treatment pulse[/*]
[*]F11: Open / close the config panel[/*]
[/list][b]Interface[/b]
[list]
[*]Open the standalone settings panel in-game[/*]
[*]Settings can be changed live without restarting the game[/*]
[/list][b]Configurable Options[/b]
[list]
[*]Master automation toggle[/*]
[*]Language switch (Chinese / English)[/*]
[*]Treatment mode (Conservative / Balanced / Aggressive)[/*]
[*]Notification mode[/*]
[*]Scan interval[/*]
[*]Panel scale[/*]
[*]Panel opacity[/*]
[*]Whether specific medicine, dressing, and splint categories may be used automatically[/*]
[/list][b]Currently Supported Major Item Types[/b]
[list]
[*]Combat Pen[/*]
[*]Blood bag / Human blood bag[/*]
[*]Blood coagulant[/*]
[*]Various bandages, dressings, and suturing items[/*]
[*]Tweezers[/*]
[*]Splint / Carcass splint[/*]
[*]Wrench / Makeshift wrench[/*]
[*]Antibiotics / Ceftriaxone / Antiserum[/*]
[*]LRD / Makeshift LRD[/*]
[*]Disinfectant[/*]
[*]Pain cream / Wound glue / Painkillers[/*]
[*]Morphine / Opium / Fentanyl / Naloxone[/*]
[*]Saline / Ringer solution[/*]
[*]Clotting mush / Purple herb / Bulbskin[/*]
[*]Chest drain / Ice pack[/*]
[*]Antiseptic mush / Glowplant fruit / Xaloris sponge[/*]
[/list][b]Installation[/b]
[list=1]
[*]Make sure BepInEx is installed[/*]
[*]Place QuickMedicalAutomation.dll into:
BepInEx/plugins/[/*]
[*]Launch the game[/*]
[/list][b]Notes[/b]
[list]
[*]Human blood bag is not used automatically by default[/*]
[*]Combat Pen is reserved for last-stand emergency rescue[/*]
[*]Pain-relief logic tries to avoid use during low blood pressure, low oxygen, cardiac arrest, or high opiate load[/*]
[*]Glass / shrapnel removal is prioritized above routine wound dressing[/*]
[*]For balance reasons, automatic glass / shrapnel removal and automatic bone-setting are not instant, and usually take around 15-30 seconds[/*]
[/list]

Name: Random Layer
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
Tired of the same linear progression? This mod randomizes your journey through the layers! Start on a random layer and each time you go deeper, you teleport to another random layer. 

[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
[list=1]
[*]Install BepInEx (if not already installed)[/*]
[*]Copy RandomLayer.dll to BepInEx/plugins[/*]
[*]Launch the game[/*]
[/list][size=4][b]Main features[/b][/size]
[list]
[*]Random spawn on any layer (0-4)[/*]
[*]Random transitions when going deeper[/*]
[*]No layer repeats in a row[/*]
[*]Fresh experience every playthrough[/*]
[/list][b][size=4]Configuration[/size][/b]

After launching the game once with the new version, a configuration file will appear at: BepInEx/config/com.purpleuser.randomlayer.cfg
Open it with any text editor. You can change the following settings:

Setting: StartLayer
Values: -1 (random), 0, 1, 2, 3, 4
Layer you start on. -1 = random (original behaviour).

Setting: RandomTransitions
Values: true / false
If true, every time you go down you teleport to a random layer. If false, normal linear progression (0→1→2→3→4).

Setting: ExcludeLayers
Values: comma‑separated numbers, e.g. 4 or 3,4
Layers you want to skip during random transitions. Useful for avoiding unbalanced or disliked layers.
Example – always start on layer 1, go random, but never go to layer 4 (overgrown):
StartLayer = 1
RandomTransitions = true
ExcludeLayers = 4

After editing the file, save it and restart the game.

[size=4][b]Requirements[/b][/size]
[list]
[*]BepInEx 5[/*]
[/list]
Author: Plushkaa

Name: Infinite Batteries
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
This mod makes all batteries and battery-powered items last forever. No more searching for batteries or worrying about your flashlight dying.

[b][size=4]Works on:[/size][/b]
[list]
[*]Small, Medium, Large batteries[/*]
[*]Flashlights & emergency light[/*]
[*]AED & manual defibrillator[/*]
[*]Drills (laser, heavy, plasma)[/*]
[*]Terrain scanner, MP3 player, and more[/*]
[/list][size=3][b]Configurable[/b] [/size]– enable/disable via config file.

[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
[list=1]
[*]Install BepInEx[/*]
[*]Copy InfiniteBatteries.dll to BepInEx/plugins[/*]
[*]Launch the game[/*]
[/list][b]To disable:[/b] edit BepInEx/config/com.purpleuser.infinitepbatteries.cfg and set InfiniteBatteries = [b]false[/b]

[size=4][b]Main features[/b][/size]
[list]
[*]Batteries never drain[/*]
[*]Emergency light works forever[/*]
[*]Configurable on/off[/*]
[*]Works with existing saves[/*]
[/list][heading][size=4]Configuration[/size][/heading]
After launching the game once, a config file will appear at: [size=4]BepInEx/config/com.purpleuser.infinitepbatteries.cfg[/size]

Open it with any text editor and change:

InfiniteBatteries = [b]true  [/b]→ batteries never drain (default)
InfiniteBatteries = [b]false [/b]→ mod disabled, batteries drain normally

[b]Multiplier[/b] (only works when InfiniteBatteries = false): 

BatteryDrainMultiplier = 0.5  → 2x slower drain
BatteryDrainMultiplier = 2 → 2x faster drain

Save the file and restart the game for changes to take effect.

[size=4][b]Requirements[/b][/size]
[list]
[*]BepInEx 5[/*]
[/list]

Name: Bren's Makeshift Guns
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
[color=#d4d4d8]Adds a handful of firearms to Casualties Unknown. Compatible with most other firearm mods too.[/color]


[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]Make sure to download/install BepInEx, RshLib, and New Gun Loader if you haven't already.

Links:
[url=https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx/releases/download/v5.4.23.5/BepInEx_win_x64_5.4.23.5.zip]Direct download to BepInEx[/url]
[url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/32?tab=description][/url][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/32?tab=description]RshLib[/url]
[url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/57?tab=description][/url][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/57?tab=description]New Gun Loader mod[/url]

Follow the instructions provided by the previously mentioned mods too.


Once that is done, either copy-paste or drag the contents in MakeshiftGunsMod>NewGun to BepInEx>plugins>NewGun using "Browse local files" on Steam (or by finding Casualties Unknown's game files yourself).


If that doesn't work, try again and/or check another gun mod for better instructions.[/color]


[size=4][b]Main features[/b][/size]

[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]Adds five improvised-looking or otherwise old-fashioned weapons to C:U that can be found in the console (and MAYBE in normal gameplay, I haven't checked):[/color][/size]

[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]Makeshift Semi Automatic Rifle - A semi automatic rifle loaded with up to 12 individual 9mm rounds.
Makeshift Pistol - A semi-automatic pistol loaded with up to 7 individual 9mm rounds.[/color][/size]
[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]Makeshift Shotgun - A double-barrel shotgun loaded with 12 gauge.[/color][/size]
[color=#d4d4d8]Makeshift SMG - A simplistic SMG that uses 9mm pistol magazines. Features a decent firerate and a magazine capacity of 20.[/color]
[color=#d4d4d8]Makeshift Bolt Action - A bolt-action rifle that can be loaded with up to 4 individual 5.56mm rounds.[/color]


[size=4][b]Requirements[/b][/size]
[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]Requires BepInEx, RshLib, and New Gun Loader to function.[/color][/size]


[size=4][b]Shout outs
[/b][/size][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/profile/7432547877542Al]RushellXYZ[/url] for making RshLib
[color=#D4D4D8]
[url=https://www.nexusmods.com/profile/rusiber]rusiber[/url] for making the New Gun Loader


[size=4][b]Known Issues[/b][/size][/color]
- [b](MP ONLY)[/b] These guns do not appear for clients who do not have the mod. Despite this, they still get damaged by most of the weapons (see above for exception).
- They're uncraftable. Use the console if you want to play around with them, or gamble by looking for traders.

Name: Infinite Durability
Description:
═══════════════════════════════════════
[b][size=5]✦ Infinity Durability ✦[/size][/b]
═══════════════════════════════════════
[heading]📖 Description[/heading]
[b]Tired of your weapons and armor breaking?
This mod makes all equipment completely indestructible.
Every weapon, tool, armor, backpack, and container lasts forever at 100% condition. No more repairing, no more searching for replacements.[/b]
═══════════════════════════════════════
[heading]⚙️ Installation[/heading]
[list=1]
[*]Install BepInEx[/*]
[*]Download InfiniteDurability.dll[/*]
[*]Place the file into BepInEx/plugins/[/*]
[*]Launch the game[/*]
[/list]═══════════════════════════════════════
[heading]🔥 What becomes infinite (by default)[/heading]
◆ Weapons – pistols, rifles, shotguns, melee
◆ Tools – pickaxes, shovels, machetes, wrenches, axes
◆ Armor – helmets, vests, protective gear
◆ Backpacks & storage containers
◆ Clothing – jackets, pants, hats, gloves, boots
═══════════════════════════════════════
[heading]🌿 What works normally (by default)[/heading]
◆ Food – spoils over time
◆ Medicine – bandages, pills, drugs get used up
◆ Batteries – drain normally
◆ Ammo – bullets and magazines are consumed
◆ Liquids – water, chemicals, fuel
═══════════════════════════════════════
[heading]🛠️ Configuration[/heading]
After first launch, the config file is created at: [b]BepInEx/config/infinity_durability.cfg[/b]
Open it with Notepad to customize everything.
Available settings:
[b][size=4][General][/size][/b]
Enabled = true – turn mod on/off
Debug = false – enable console logging
[size=4][b][Durability][/b][/size]
Tools = true – infinite tools
Weapons = true – infinite weapons
Armor = true – infinite armor
Backpacks = true – infinite backpacks
Containers = true – infinite containers
Clothing = true – infinite clothing
[b][size=4][Consumables][/size][/b]
Food = true – food decays or infinite
Medicine = true – medicine used or infinite
Batteries = true – batteries drain or infinite
Ammo = true – ammo consumed or infinite
[b][size=4][Exceptions][/size][/b]
Liquids = true – liquids normal or infinite
[Advanced]
Mult = 1 – durability multiplier (0 to 10)
[b][size=4]How to change settings:[/size][/b]
[list=1]
[*]Close the game[/*]
[*]Open infinity_durability.cfg in Notepad[/*]
[*]Change true to false or false to true[/*]
[*]Save the file[/*]
[*]Launch the game[/*]
[/list]Changes take effect after restart.
═══════════════════════════════════════
[heading]🔧 Troubleshooting[/heading]
If items still lose durability, enable Debug = true in config and check the BepInEx console. You will see messages showing which items are being blocked.
═══════════════════════════════════════
[heading]📋 Requirements[/heading]
◆ BepInEx 5.x or newer
◆ Casualties Unknown Demo
═══════════════════════════════════════
[heading]✓ Compatibility[/heading]
Works with existing saves. No known conflicts with other mods.
═══════════════════════════════════════
Author: Plushkaa

Name: DG-Lab EXP BodySync
Description:
[center][size=5][b]DG-Lab EXP BodySync[/b][/size]
BodySync-style DG-Lab feedback for [i]Casualties Unknown[/i][/center]

[line]

[size=4][b]Overview[/b][/size]

[b]DG-Lab EXP BodySync[/b] adds a BodySync-style DG-Lab layer to [i]Casualties Unknown[/i].

Instead of working as a simple damage trigger, it follows the character's body state more closely. Local injuries, body-part changes, pain, bleeding, fractures, dislocations, infection, shock, hypoxia, temperature, consciousness, and related conditions can all become part of the feedback logic.

The result is a more connected DG-Lab experience where feedback can follow both [b]where[/b] something happens and [b]what kind[/b] of condition the character is experiencing.

[line]

[size=4][b]What BodySync Does[/b][/size]

BodySync reads the game's body-state system and sends feedback through [b]DG-Lab Socket v2[/b]. Local effects can be routed by body part, while systemic conditions can be mixed into the background output.

For example, you can bind the head, upper torso, and arms to one DG-Lab channel, while assigning the abdomen and legs to another. Direct injuries can then lean toward the matching channel, while broader physical states may affect both.

This makes the feedback less like a single on/off reaction and more like a layered response to the character's current condition.

[line]

[size=4][b]Main Features[/b][/size]

[list]
[*]BodySync-style DG-Lab support for [i]Casualties Unknown[/i].[/*]
[*]DG-Lab Socket v2 connection support.[/*]
[*]Embedded Socket backend with in-game QR code generation.[/*]
[*]External Socket backend support for custom setups.[/*]
[*]Configurable A/B channel strength limits.[/*]
[*]Configurable body-part binding for local injury routing.[/*]
[*]Feedback based on injuries, pain, bleeding, fractures, dislocations, infection, shock, hypoxia, temperature, consciousness, and related states.[/*]
[*]In-game DG-Lab menu opened with [b]F10[/b].[/*]
[*]Status overlay, waveform monitor, and debug display.[/*]
[*]Offline status and waveform preview for checking the setup before connecting a device.[/*]
[/list]
[line]

[size=4][b]Getting Started[/b][/size]

Install the mod with [b]BepInEx 5[/b], then launch the game and press [b]F10[/b] to open the DG-Lab menu.

If you use the embedded backend, keep your phone and the PC running the game on the same local network. Select the correct LAN address in the menu, refresh the QR code, and scan it with the DG-Lab app.

Before testing, set low A/B strength limits and check the connection state, current strength, and waveform output with the status overlay or waveform monitor.

[line]

[size=4][b]Safety Note[/b][/size]

This mod maps in-game injuries and body states into simulated DG-Lab waveform and strength changes.

Start with low A/B strength limits. Keep the DG-Lab app or device stop controls within reach. Stop immediately if you feel pain, numbness, dizziness, panic, skin irritation, or anything unusual.

[line]

[center][size=4][b]中文说明[/b][/size][/center]

[b]DG-Lab EXP BodySync[/b] 是一个面向 [i]Casualties Unknown[/i] 的 BodySync 风格 DG-Lab 支持模组。

它并不是简单的“受伤就触发输出”。模组会读取角色的身体状态系统，将局部伤害、身体部位变化、疼痛、出血、骨折、脱臼、感染、休克、缺氧、体温、意识等相关状态纳入反馈逻辑。

BodySync 可以根据身体部位将局部效果路由到不同的 DG-Lab 通道，也可以把全身状态混合进背景反馈中。这样反馈不仅能反映“哪里出了问题”，也能反映角色当前处于怎样的整体身体状态。

[size=4][b]主要功能[/b][/size]

[list]
[*]为 [i]Casualties Unknown[/i] 添加 BodySync 风格 DG-Lab 支持。[/*]
[*]支持 DG-Lab Socket v2。[/*]
[*]内置 Socket 后端，可在游戏内生成二维码。[/*]
[*]支持外部 Socket 后端和自定义网络环境。[/*]
[*]可配置 A/B 通道强度上限。[/*]
[*]可配置身体部位绑定，用于局部伤害路由。[/*]
[*]根据伤害、疼痛、出血、骨折、脱臼、感染、休克、缺氧、体温、意识等状态生成反馈。[/*]
[*]按 [b]F10[/b] 打开游戏内 DG-Lab 菜单。[/*]
[*]提供状态悬浮窗、波形监视器和调试显示。[/*]
[*]未连接设备时也可以查看状态和波形，方便先检查设置。[/*]
[/list]
[size=4][b]快速开始[/b][/size]

使用 [b]BepInEx 5[/b] 安装模组后，启动游戏并按 [b]F10[/b] 打开 DG-Lab 菜单。

如果使用内置后端，请确保手机和运行游戏的电脑在同一局域网。然后在菜单中选择正确的局域网地址，刷新二维码，并使用 DG-Lab App 扫码连接。

测试前请先将 A/B 强度上限调低，并通过状态悬浮窗或波形监视器确认连接状态、当前强度和波形输出。

[size=4][b]安全提示[/b][/size]

本模组会根据游戏中的受伤和身体状态，让 DG-Lab 设备输出模拟对应体感的波形和强度变化。

首次使用请从较低的 A/B 强度上限开始，并确保 DG-Lab App 或设备停止控制随时可触达。如果出现疼痛、麻木、头晕、恐慌、皮肤不适或任何异常感受，请立即停止。

[line]

[size=4][b]Links / 链接[/b][/size]

Source code and documentation / 源码与文档：
[url=https://github.com/FurLC/DGLab-EXP-BodySync]GitHub Repository[/url]

Name: Item Spawner Menu.
Description:
Description
  这是一个为《Casualties Unknown Demo》制作的中文刷物品菜单 Mod，支持单机和联机使用。

  Mod 为游戏加入了一个更直观、更好看的中文物品生成界面，支持中文搜索、英文 ID 搜索、分类筛选、数量设置、物品耐久设置和生
  成预览，适合测试、娱乐、存档调试和联机房主管理使用。相比原本依赖控制台输入指令的方式，这个菜单更方便，也更适合中文玩
  家。

  联机方面，本 Mod 同时兼容两种授权方式：
  如果房主和房员都安装了本 Mod，房员可以直接申请刷物品权限，房主会收到确认弹窗，同意后房员即可获得管理员权限并自动继续执
  行生成或开启联机刷物品规则。
  如果房主没有安装本 Mod，客户端也可以自动回退到 KrokMP 原生的 admin 密码授权方式，不需要单独再换另一套插件。

  Installation instructions

  1. 先安装 BepInEx
  2. 将 ItemSpawnerMenuCN.dll 放入 BepInEx/plugins/
  3. 启动一次游戏，必要时让配置文件自动生成
  4. 进入游戏后按 F7 打开菜单

  联机说明：

  1. 如果想使用“房员申请 -> 房主弹窗确认授权”功能，房主和房员都需要安装本 Mod
  2. 如果房主没有安装本 Mod，也仍然可以通过 KrokMP 的 admin 密码方式授权
  3. 联机刷物品仍然依赖 KrokMP 的管理员权限和服务器规则设置

  Main features

  - F7 打开中文刷物品菜单
  - 支持中文物品名搜索、英文 ID 搜索、分类筛选
  - 支持设置生成数量
  - 支持设置物品耐久 / 状态
  - 支持选择生成位置，例如玩家脚下、鼠标位置、随机位置
  - 提供生成指令预览
  - 重做了整体 UI，界面更清晰、更美观
  - 左侧物品列表和右侧说明区都支持独立滚动
  - 优化了长物品名和长说明的显示，不会再把按钮或布局顶出界面
  - 支持单机直接生成物品
  - 支持联机下通过 KrokMP 管理员命令生成物品
  - 支持房员向房主申请联机刷物品权限
  - 支持房主确认后自动授予管理员权限
  - 支持当房主未安装本 Mod 时自动回退到 admin 密码授权方式

  Requirements

  - BepInEx
  - Casualties Unknown Demo
  - KrokMP / KrokoshaCasualtiesMP（联机功能需要）

  补充说明：

  - 单机使用本 Mod 不依赖 KrokMP
  - 联机刷物品功能需要 KrokMP 的联机环境
  - 房主确认弹窗功能要求房主和房员都安装本 Mod
  - 如果只有客户端安装本 Mod，则会使用 KrokMP 原生管理员密码授权逻辑
  - 联机中如果服务器未开启相关规则，仍需由有权限的一方开启联机刷物品权限

Name: Unknown Enough Items
Description:
[quote][b]Github:[url=https://github.com/MAakber/Unknown-Enough-Items]Github[/url][/b][/quote]
[b][color=#ff7700]Description[/color][/b]

Unknown Enough Items, or UEI, is a JEI-style helper mod for Casualties Unknown Demo. It adds an in-game item, liquid, and recipe browser beside the native inventory and backpack UI, without replacing the original crafting system.

UEI reads runtime game data directly, so it can show item sources, recipe results, usage recipes, generic ingredient candidates, and related crafting chains.

[color=#ff7700][b]Installation instructions[/b][/color]

1. Install BepInEx for Casualties Unknown Demo.
2. Download `UEI.build.dll`.
3. Put the file here:
[code]BepInEx/plugins/UEI/UEI.build.dll[/code]4. Launch the game.
5. Open the native inventory or radial backpack UI to show UEI.

[b][color=#ff7700]Main features[/color][/b]

[list]
[*]Browse runtime items and liquids.[/*]
[*]Search items and filter by category.[/*]
[*]Favorite entries and pin useful recipes.[/*]
[*]Left-click an entry to view source recipes.[/*]
[*]Right-click an entry to view usage recipes.[/*]
[*]Click recipe materials or results to jump through recipe chains.[/*]
[*]Jump to the original crafting panel and select the matching recipe.[/*]
[*]Hover an inventory item and press `U` to open its UEI usage panel.[/*]
[*]Chinese and English UI support.[/*]
[*]KrokMP multiplayer compatibility.[/*]
[*]Cheat mode respects multiplayer command/admin permissions and disables itself when unavailable.[/*]
[/list]
[b][color=#ff7700]Requirements[/color][/b]

- Casualties Unknown Demo
- BepInEx
- TextMeshPro runtime dependencies from the game
- KrokMP is optional and only required for multiplayer compatibility features

[color=#ff7700][b]Shout outs[/b][/color]

Inspired by JEI-style item and recipe browsers. Thanks to the Casualties Unknown community for testing, feedback, and multiplayer compatibility reports.
Author: Aakber

Name: MenuMod
Description:
新版已经自带游戏菜单
将会停止更新
---
Since game version 7.0.1 has added a very comprehensive menu function compared to 6.1, and MenuMod is not compatible with ScavLib versions after 0.5.0, MenuMod is currently only a archive file and is not updated or maintained.


[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]

[color=#D4D4D8][b]WARNING: Currently in the testing and rapid updating/iterating phase.[/b]
Please expect potential bugs and frequent updates. We highly recommend backing up your save files before playing. Feel free to report any issues or feedback in the comments![/color]

[b]MenuMod[/b] adds a fully featured, elegant, and functional in-game Pause and Settings Menu to the game. Activated by pressing your pause key (ESC by default), it safely freezes game time and provides a centralized interface to customize your gameplay experience.

[b]Supports Simplified Chinese and English only.[/b]

[size=4][b]Installation Instructions[/b][/size]

[list=1]
[*][color=#D4D4D8]Download and install [b]BepInEx 5[/b] and [b][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/83?tab=description]ScavLib API[/url] 0.4.x[/b][/color][/*]
[*][color=#D4D4D8]Download the MenuMod archive and extract it.[/color][/*]
[*][color=#D4D4D8]Move [b]MenuMod.dll[/b] into your game folder at [b]BepInEx/plugins/[/b].[/color][/*]
[*][color=#D4D4D8]Run the game, load a world, and press [b]ESC[/b] to open the Pause Menu![/color][/*]
[/list][size=4][b]Main Features[/b][/size]

[color=#D4D4D8][b]Pause Menu[/b][/color]

[list]
[*][color=#D4D4D8][b]Time Freeze:[/b] Automatically pauses game physics and timers (Time.timeScale = 0) when open. Can be toggled off in General Settings.[/color][/*]
[*][color=#D4D4D8][b]Run Timer:[/b] Displays your current run time directly in the pause menu.[/color][/*]
[*][color=#D4D4D8][b]In-Game Save:[/b] Save your progress at any time with a single click.[/color][/*]
[*][color=#D4D4D8][b]Safe Exit:[/b] "Save and Return to Main Menu" and "Quit to Desktop" (auto-saves before quitting).[/color][/*]
[*][color=#D4D4D8][b]Abandon Run:[/b] A dedicated "Abandon Run and Quit" button that exits [i]without[/i] saving, protected by an inline confirmation prompt to prevent accidents.[/color][/*]
[/list][b]Advanced Settings Tabs[/b]

[list=1]
[*][b]General Settings:[/b]
[list]
[*][b]Background Auto-Save:[/b] Toggle periodic background auto-saving while in-game.[/*]
[*][b]Custom Auto-Save Intervals:[/b] Choose between 1 min, 5 min, 10 min, 30 min, or 1 hour.[/*]
[*][b]Smart Auto-Save:[/b] Automatically skips saving if the player is dead or unconscious to prevent corrupted saves.[/*]
[*][b]ESC Auto-Pause Toggle:[/b] Choose whether pressing ESC should freeze the game world.[/*]
[*][b]Quick Save Hotkey:[/b] Bind a dedicated key (default: F6) for instant in-game saving without opening any menu.[/*]
[*][b]Run Timer (In-Settings):[/b] Your current run time is also displayed at the top of the General tab while in-game.[/*]
[*][b]Save Management:[/b] Open your save folder or keybind file directly from the menu. Includes a protected Delete Save button with an inline confirmation prompt.[/*]
[*][b]Run Parameters:[/b] Adjust loot rarity, trap rarity, per-layer loot decay, per-layer trap increase, radiation line toggle, and unchipped mode — all written directly to the game's PlayerPrefs and applied on the next layer.[/*]
[/list][/*]
[*][b]Video Settings:[/b]
[list]
[*][b]Resolution Control:[/b] Cycle through all monitor-supported resolutions.[/*]
[*][b]Fullscreen Modes:[/b] Switch between Exclusive Fullscreen, Windowed, and Borderless Window.[/*]
[*][b]Pending Apply System:[/b] Resolution, fullscreen mode, quality level, and render scale changes are staged and only applied when you click the corresponding Apply button — no accidental mid-session disruptions.[/*]
[*][b]Render Scale:[/b] Expose the hidden URP render scale slider (0.50× – 2.00×, step 0.05) for performance tuning or supersampling.[/*]
[*][b]Quality Preset:[/b] Cycle through Unity quality presets with a single Apply click.[/*]
[*][b]VSync Toggle:[/b] Enable or disable vertical sync instantly.[/*]
[*][b]FPS Limiter:[/b] Set a custom frame rate cap when VSync is off. Automatically disabled when VSync is on.[/*]
[*][b]Gamma Slider:[/b] Adjust brightness in real time, synced with the game camera's post-processing profile. Supports values above 1.0 via direct volume override for darker environments.[/*]
[*][b]Pixel Filter / Line of Sight / Reduce Visual FX:[/b] Toggle visual filters and effect intensity on the fly.[/*]
[*][b]Environment Effects:[/b] Independently suppress rain, fogs.[/*]
[*][b]Camera Zoom:[/b] Adjust the in-game orthographic zoom level in real time (0.05× – 2.00×, default ~0.25×). Resets with a single button.[/*]
[*][b]Scrollable Layout:[/b] The entire Video tab scrolls, so all options remain accessible regardless of window size.[/*]
[/list][/*]
[*][b]Audio Settings:[/b]
[list]
[*][b]Independent Volume Sliders:[/b] Fine-tune Music, Master (SFX), and Ambient volumes individually — displayed as clean percentages.[/*]
[*][b]Mute All:[/b] Instantly silence all game audio with a single toggle, without changing your volume settings.[/*]
[*][b]Smart Ambient Control:[/b] The Ambient slider is only available in-game where world audio is actually loaded.[/*]
[*][b]Now Playing:[/b] Displays the name of the currently playing music track while in-game.[/*]
[/list][/*]
[*][b]Keybind Rebinding:[/b]
[list]
[*][b]In-Game Rebinds:[/b] Interactively rebind all movement and action hotkeys (jump, speed multipliers, inventory, crafting, and more).[/*]
[*][b]Friendly Key Names:[/b] Displays human-readable labels (e.g. "LMB", "R.Shift", "L.Ctrl", "Num Enter").[/*]
[*][b]Failsafe Lock:[/b] The Pause/Menu key is locked and cannot be accidentally rebound.[/*]
[/list][/*]
[*][b]Language Settings:[/b]
[list]
[*][b]Separate Mod UI Language:[/b] Switch MenuMod's own interface between English and Simplified Chinese instantly — no scene reload required.[/*]
[*][b]Game Language Selector:[/b] Browse and apply all installed game language files from a scrollable list.[/*]
[*][b]Reload Confirmation:[/b] Game language changes prompt a confirmation dialog before reloading the scene.[/*]
[/list][/*]
[/list][size=4][b]Requirements[/b][/size]
[list]
[*][color=#D4D4D8][b]BepInEx 5.x[/b][/color][/*]
[*][color=#D4D4D8][b][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/83?tab=description]ScavLib API 0.4.x[/url][/b][/color][/*]
[/list][size=4][b]Shout Outs[/b][/size]
[list]
[*][color=#D4D4D8]Developed by [b]Kanisuko[/b] and [b]QinShenYu[/b].[/color][/*]
[/list]
Author: QinShenYu

Name: ScavLib API
Description:
[b][size=6]ScavLib — Casualties Unknown Mod API Library[/size][/b]

[b]Authors:[/b] Kanisuko / QinShenYu 
[b]Required by:[/b] Any mod built on ScavLib 
[b]Source (DLL repository): [url=https://github.com/Kanisuko/ScavLib-API-DLL-Repository]github.com/Kanisuko/ScavLib-API-DLL-Repository[/url] [/b]
[b][color=#ffffff]Source Code:  [url=https://github.com/Kanisuko/ScavLib-API]github.com/Kanisuko/ScavLib-API[/url][/color][/b]
[b]Wiki: [url=https://github.com/Kanisuko/ScavLib-API-DLL-Repository/wiki]github.com/Kanisuko/ScavLib-API-DLL-Repository/wiki[/url][/b]
[line]
[b][size=5]Description[/size][/b]

ScavLib is a foundational developer-focused API and utility library designed to simplify mod development for [b]Scav Prototype (a.k.a. Casualties Unknown)[/b]. It streamlines common tasks such as building in-game menus, managing configurations, registering console commands, handling custom events, interacting safely with the game state, and working with player vitals, skills, and items.

[quote][b]Note for players:[/b] This is a core dependency library. It does not add any content on its own, but is required by other mods to function.[/quote][line]
[b][size=5]Installation[/size][/b]
[list=1]
[*]Ensure you have [b]BepInEx 5[/b] installed for Scav Prototype.[/*]
[*]Download [font=Courier New]ScavLib.dll[/font].[/*]
[*]Place [font=Courier New]ScavLib.dll[/font] into your game directory under [font=Courier New]BepInEx/plugins/[/font].[/*]
[*]Launch the game. To verify it loaded correctly, open the developer console and type:
[code]scavlib status[/code]You should see ScavLib's version, authors, and all registered mods printed to the console.[/*]
[/list][line]
[b][size=5]Regarding multiplayer support[/size][/b]
[b]Multiplayer games are theoretically supported, both the client and server need to have ScavLib installed.[/b]
[line]
[b][size=5][b]Requirements[/b][/size][/b]
[list]
[*][b][b]BepInEx 5.x[/b] (64-bit version recommended)[/b][/*]
[*][b]Scav Prototype game client (Steam)[/b][/*]
[/list][line]
[b][size=5]For Developers[/size]

You can see wiki on [url=https://github.com/Kanisuko/ScavLib-API-DLL-Repository/wiki]Github wiki page[/url] or you can see source code on [url=https://github.com/Kanisuko/ScavLib-API]ScavLib API[/url], thanks.[/b]

[b]Of course, if you discover any new issues, we recommend that you submit an issue report to the DLL repository on GitHub.[/b]

[b](I sincerely apologize for the bugs that appeared, as I was the only tester and was unable to conduct comprehensive testing.)[/b]
[line]
[b][size=5][b]Shout-outs[/b][/size]

Developed by [b]Kanisuko[/b] and [b]QinShenYu[/b].[/b]
Author: QinShenYu and Kanisuko

Name: Cu-SaveManager
Description:
[b][u]SaveManager[/u][/b]

推荐选择生成世界的方法使用本mod的，KrokMP当前保存世界会固定保存到下一层级，而不是保存当前层级

Fixed-world multi-save for *Casualties: Unknown*—rollback brings back the same layer, terrain, and position. **Save & Exit** writes your run and returns to the main menu; your EXP dog does not die on exit. Timed auto-backups, manual slots, death rollback. Soft-compatible with QoL Unknown and KrokMP (host-driven rollback in multiplayer).
[b]
Installation[/b]

Install to:

`<GameFolder>/BepInEx/plugins/SaveManager/SaveManager.dll`

If you use a mod manager, create a `SaveManager` folder inside `plugins` and move this mod into it.
[b]
How to use[/b]

- Main menu: click **Save Manager** (panel is English / Chinese).
- **Saves**: snapshot the current run into slots; load or delete later.
- **Save & Exit**: save and quit to the menu without killing your EXP dog.
- **Rollback**: rewind to a recent slot; optional auto-rollback on death.
- **Settings**: timed backups, fixed-world engine (QoL or this mod), seeds, position mode, hotkeys.

CuHotbar merges its settings as an extra tab when SaveManager is installed.
[b]
Links[/b]

- GitHub: [[url=https://github.com/huanxin996/Cu-SaveManager]huanxin996/Cu-SaveManager[/url]]
- Details: see the GitHub README.

---

《未知伤亡》固定世界多存档模组——回档可复现同层地形与落点。**存档并退出**会写盘并回到主菜单，EXP 小狗不会因退出而自爆。支持定时自动备份、手动多槽、死亡回档；软兼容 QoL Unknown 与 KrokMP（多人由主机驱动回档）。

[b]安装[/b]

安装路径：

`<游戏目录>/BepInEx/plugins/SaveManager/SaveManager.dll`

若使用 mod 管理器，建议在 `plugins` 下新建 `SaveManager` 文件夹并放入本模组。
[b]
使用[/b]

- 主菜单点击 **存档管理**（面板支持中/英）。
- **存档**分页：把当前冒险快照到槽位，随时读取或删除。
- **存档并退出**：保存后回主菜单，EXP 小狗不会死。
- **回档**分页：回到最近槽位；可开启死亡自动回档与倒计时。
- **设置**分页：定时备份、固定世界引擎（QoL 或本 mod）、种子、位置模式、快捷键。

安装 SaveManager 后，CuHotbar 可把设置合并为额外分页。

[b]链接[/b]

- GitHub：[[url=https://github.com/huanxin996/Cu-SaveManager]huanxin996/Cu-SaveManager[/url]]
- 详细说明见 GitHub README。
Author: huanxin996

Name: Auto's Arsenal
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]just adds some guns, nothing more, nothing less.[/color][/size]

[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
[color=#d4d4d8]install [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/122]New Firearms[/url][/color]
[color=#d4d4d8]Install this[/color]
[color=#d4d4d8]insert the contents of "Auto's-Arsenal.zip" into their respective folders in the  "NewFirearms" folder[/color]
[color=#d4d4d8]done[/color]

[size=4][b]Main features[/b][/size]

Revolver: a six shooter that does a lot of damage, can fire pretty much as fast as you can click. uses .357 Magnum rounds

MP7: an SMG that fires rather fast, however doesn't deal much damage. uses small mags or SMG mags (From New Firearms).

M1918 Tankgewehr: Very heavy, one shot, huge damage. uses 13.2mm TuF rounds

Karabiner 98k: A good in-between of the Rifle and Anti-Tank Rifle, rather high amount of damage but needs to be racked manually. uses 5.56 rounds

AA-12: Fully automatic shotgun, a LOT of damage, a lot of ammo. uses Shotgun mags

[size=4][b]Requirements[/b][/size]
[url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/122]New Firearms[/url]
[url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/32]RshLib[/url]

[b][size=4]Shout-Outs[/size][/b]
[url=https://www.nexusmods.com/profile/rusiber][b][size=3]rusiber[/size][/b][/url], for making this possible (Pre 2.0)
[url=https://www.nexusmods.com/profile/7432547877542Al][b]RushellXYZ[/b][/url], for making this possible (post 2.0)
Author: AutogenMp4

Name: Guns Plus
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=3]This little mod introduces four new firearms that can be found in your struggles as a sort of complement to the vanilla firearms, filling in certain niches that I thought were either missing, or could be expanded upon. I made it mostly for myself, and as such are somewhat balanced in respect to their real-life counterparts.[/size][/color]

[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]First: Ensure you have BepInEx all sorted out. It's necessary for any mod here. To deal with this, download it from its repository [url=https://github.com/bepinex/bepinex]here[/url], extract it in your 'Casualties Unknown Demo' folder, and run the game once to let it generate all its associated folders and stuff.[/color]

[color=#D4D4D8]Second: Get RshLib, which is a prerequisite library that enables custom items, and the Gun Loader relies upon it. You may find it [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/32]here[/url], and just plop and extract this in the 'plugins' folder within the 'BepInEx' folder. [/color]

[color=#D4D4D8]Third: Get the New Gun Loader mod. You can find it [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/57?tab=description]here[/url], and just extract it in the same way as RshLib in the 'plugins' folder.[/color]

[color=#D4D4D8]Fourth: Download this mod and overwrite (or just add) its contents into the 'NewGun' folder by the Gun Loader mod.[/color]

[color=#D4D4D8]Fifth: Happy hunting![/color]

[size=4][b]Main features[/b][/size]
[b][color=#D4D4D8][size=3][u]Guns Featured:[/u][/size][/color][/b]

[list]
[*][color=#D4D4D8][size=3]Desert Tech MDRx Micron '[i]Interceptor[/i]': An exceptionally compact, yet powerful semi-automatic rifle that makes it a good all-rounder for any solo incursion. While this would be tiny in a regular human's hands, it fits perfectly for an expie to wield with little issue. Be sure to still consider its somewhat bulky nature however, as the polymer body does take up a good chunk of storage regardless.[/size][/color][/*]
[*][color=#D4D4D8][size=3]KRISS Vector '[i]Prototype[/i]' (Moniker shamelessly ripped from Gunsaw): A 9mm submachine gun with a lightweight stock and a unique design that lets it mitigate the emitted recoil significantly, so much so that you can use it one-handed without too much trouble. Its only limiting feature is that it shares its magazines with the 17-round pistol ones, which could fare a detriment in more 'prolonged' engagements.[/size][/color][/*]
[*][size=3]SIG MCX Raptor '[i]Rabid[/i]': A fast-firing automatic carbine, intended to just get as much lead out the barrel as fast as possible. While it's somewhat lightweight and packs quite a punch, its recoil is borderline uncontrollable under full blast even with the stock. It's still however, a great option if you happen to have way too much rifle ammunition sitting around that you want to burn through.[/size][/*]
[*][size=3]KelTec KSG '[i]Oppressor[/i]': A notoriously unusual pump-action shotgun, with the distinct ability to house a whopping fifteen shells in a relatively tight gun, split across two barrels. This lets you fire for much longer, and more accurately thanks to the choked design of the shotgun. It is however, a bit too large for an expie to comfortably wield, and as such is cumbersome to both store and use.[/size][/*]
[/list]
[size=4][b]Requirements[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=3]BepInEx[/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=3]RshLib[/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]New Gun Loader [/color]

[size=4][b]Shout outs[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]Big thanks to [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/profile/rusiber]rusiber[/url] who could make such gun mods possible and very easy to make.[/color]
Author: IKEA19
