Name: Multiplayer Sprite Replacer
Description:
[color=#fafafa][size=4]Multiplayer Sprite Replacer[/size][/color]
This is a fork of [b]Player sprite replacer[/b] by d0gederp, specifically modified to be compatible with [b]Krokosha Casualties Unknown Multiplayer[/b].
[quote][b]Support & Feedback:[/b] For bug reports and test/latest builds, join our [url=https://discord.gg/EkgMFcPskE]Discord server[/url]. [i](I am more active on Discord!)[/i][/quote]Main Features
[list]
[*][b]Instant Sprite Switching:[/b] Press [b]Numpad 0 through 9[/b] to instantly switch between different character sprites in-game.[/*]
[*][b]Custom Folders:[/b] The mod looks for your sprites in folders ranging from
[code]CustomSprites/st0[/code]up to
[code]CustomSprites/st9[/code][/*]
[*][b]Automatic Skin Syncing:[/b] Skins automatically sync to all users running this mod (provided the host also has it installed). No manual uploads are required—the mod streams your skin files directly to other players![/*]
[*][b]In-Game UI Manager:[/b] Use the newly added [b]MSR tab[/b] in the in-game settings menu to equip slots, reload skins, download remote skins via URL, and edit your keybinds.[/*]
[*][b]Live Auto-Refresh:[/b] The mod will automatically refresh your skin in-game the moment you alter the current slot's PNG files on your disk.[/*]
[*][b]Persistent Saving:[/b] Your last selected slot, recent URLs, downloaded skin URLs, and hidden/banned player settings are saved between sessions.[/*]
[/list]Requirements
You [b]MUST[/b] have the [url=https://github.com/Krokosha666/cas-unk-krokosha-multiplayer-coop]Krokosha Casualties Unknown Multiplayer[/url] mod installed in order to use this mod (though you are able to have the multiplayer mod itself disabled).
Installation Instructions
[b]If BepInEx is already installed:[/b]
[list=1]
[*]Open this repository's folder.[/*]
[*]Drag/copy its contents into your game's
[code]BepInEx/plugins[/code]folder.[/*]
[*]Start the game.[/*]
[/list][b]If BepInEx is not installed yet:[/b]
[list=1]
[*]Install BepInEx by following their [url=https://docs.bepinex.dev/articles/user_guide/installation/index.html]official instructions[/url].[/*]
[*]Once BepInEx is installed, follow the steps above.[/*]
[/list]Console Commands
Version 1.2.0 introduces the msr console command to give you granular control over your sprites and multiplayer experience:
[list]
[*]msr equip <slot>[size=2][font=Arial, Inter, "Inter Fallback", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif] Equips a local slot (e.g.,msr equip st1[/font][/size][size=2][font=Arial, Inter, "Inter Fallback", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif]).[/font][/size][/*]
[*]msr download <slot> <url>[b]:[/b] Downloads a remote skin to a specific slot (e.g. msr download st1 https://skin.cat-bot.de/d/423).[/*]
[*]msr reload[b][size=2][font=Arial, Inter, "Inter Fallback", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif]:[/font][/size][/b][size=2][font=Arial, Inter, "Inter Fallback", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif] Reloads the current slot from your local disk.[/font][/size][/*]
[*]msr ban <username>[b]:[/b] Locally hides a specific player's custom skin.[/*]
[*]msr unban <username>[b]:[/b] Restores a previously hidden player's custom skin.[/*]
[*]msr bans[b]:[/b] Displays a list of currently banned player skins.[/*]
[*]msr verbose <true/false>[b]:[/b] Toggles verbose logging on or off for debugging purposes.[/*]
[/list]Finding Sprites
Looking for custom sprites? Check out these links containing custom sprite databases:
[list]
[*][url=https://skin.cat-bot.de/]Cat-Bot Skin Database[/url][/*]
[*][url=https://github.com/Paili-16/Scav-Prototype-The-Characters-Skins]Scav-Prototype Characters Skins GitHub[/url][/*]
[/list]Known Issues
[list]
[*]None! (for now.)[/*]
[/list]Changelog - Version 1.2.0
[list]
[*][b]Updated[/b] compatibility for Krokosha Multiplayer 4.0.0.[/*]
[*][b]Added[/b]
[code]st0[/code]skin slot support with a default
[code]Keypad0[/code]keybind.[/*]
[*][b]Added[/b] the
[code]msr[/code]console command structure.[/*]
[*][b]Added[/b]
[code]msr equip <slot>[/code]to equip a local slot such as
[code]st1[/code][/*]
[*][b]Added[/b]
[code]msr download <slot> <url>[/code]for remote skins.[/*]
[*][b]Added[/b]
[code]msr reload[/code]to reload the current slot from disk.[/*]
[*][b]Added[/b]
[code]msr ban <username>[/code]and
[code]msr unban <username>[/code]to locally hide or restore another player's custom skin.[/*]
[*][b]Added[/b]
[code]msr bans[/code][code]msr list[/code]and
[code]msr verbose <true|false>[/code][/*]
[*][b]Added[/b] an MSR tab to the in-game settings menu.[/*]
[*][b]Added[/b] slot equip, reload, and URL download controls in the settings menu.[/*]
[*][b]Added[/b] a settings-menu URL textbox for remote skin downloads.[/*]
[*][b]Added[/b] in-game keybind editing for
[code]st0[/code]through
[code]st9[/code][/*]
[*][b]Added[/b] automatic refresh when the current slot's PNG files change on disk.[/*]
[*][b]Added[/b] persistent saving for the last selected slot, downloaded slot URLs, recent URLs, and banned players.[/*]
[*][b]Added[/b] a verbose logging setting for debugging.[/*]
[*][b]Fixed[/b] an issue where non-MSR players would sometimes receive mismatched
[code]st1[/code]limb sprites.[/*]
[/list]Credits & Shout outs
[list]
[*][b]d0gederp[/b] for creating the original mod! [i](Note: All donation points go to d0gederp. If d0gederp requests that this mod be taken down, I will do so immediately).[/i][/*]
[/list]
Author: zv7i

Name: Item Spawner
Description:
[quote][b]Github: [url=https://github.com/MAakber/ItemSpawner/releases/tag/v1]Github[/url][/b][/quote]
[b][color=#ff7700]Description[/color][/b]

Item Spawner is an in-game item spawning plugin for Casualties Unknown Demo V6.1.

It adds a draggable item spawner panel that lets you search registered game items, filter by category or favorites, and spawn items with configurable quantity, durability, and spawn mode.

This mod is intended for local testing, debugging, sandbox play, and single-player convenience.

[b][color=#ff7700]Compatibility[/color][/b]

Tested only on Casualties Unknown Demo V6.1.

Compatibility with other game versions is unknown.

[b][color=#ff7700]Installation instructions[/color][/b]

1. Install BepInEx for the game.
2. Download the mod archive.
3. Extract the archive into the game root folder.
4. Confirm the DLL is located at:
[code]BepInEx/plugins/ItemSpawner/ItemSpawner.build.dll[/code]5. Launch the game.
6. Press `LeftControl + I` to open or close the panel.

[b][color=#ff7700]Main features[/color][/b]

[list]
[*] Search and spawn registered in-game items.[/*]
[*] Category filter.[/*]
[*] Favorites filter.[/*]
[*] Persistent favorites.[/*]
[*] 中文 / English UI.[/*]
[*] Draggable and scalable panel.[/*]
[*] Passthrough mode, allowing player controls while the panel is open.[/*]
[*] Native item tooltip when hovering item icons.[/*]
[*] Spawn to inventory, at player position, or at mouse position.[/*]
[/list]
[b][color=#ff7700]Requirements[/color][/b]

[list]
[*] Casualties Unknown Demo V6.1[/*]
[*] BepInEx installed for the game[/*]
[/list]
[b] Shout outs[/b]

Thanks to the Casualties Unknown Demo community and BepInEx modding ecosystem.
Author: Aakber

Author: Kinatera

Name: Galaxy Gray Technology Company
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
添加了一些不平衡的物品，清单如下：
galaxybag：超级银河包，拥有0重量9999容量，单件上限9999以及负承重系数的背包，不可装备
galaxybelt:超级银河皮带，属性跟银河包一样，但是可以装备，装备位于原版通明装备相同
galaxylegpouch：超级银河腿包，属性跟银河包一样，但是可以装备，装备位于原版通明装备相同
galaxymaterialpouch：超级银河材料包，属性跟银河包一样，但是可以装备，装备位于原版通明装备相同
galaxypack：超级银河双肩包，属性跟银河包一样，但是可以装备，装备位于原版通明装备相同
galaxycanteen：拥有10000ml容量的水壶，可以喝，一次100ml
galaxyjug:拥有5000ml容量的水壶，可以喝，一次100ml，能够看见里面的液体
galaxybloodbag：跟水壶一样，可以输入液体了，最大速度是100ml/s
galaxylaserdrill：30格射程，100伤害，需要使用中型电池的激光挖掘工具
galaxybandage：能够缠绕一千圈，同时回复皮肤、肌肉、出血、骨折、扭伤的绷带
galaxymultitool：强悍，恐怖的多功能工具包，可用于捶打，切割，点火，加热……\n还能自动充能和修复，有了它你就可以扔掉其他的所有加工器了
galaxywaterball:可食用水球，+50水分，+5饱腹
galaxynutrientbar：营养棒，+50饱腹
=======================
Some unbalanced items have been added. The list is as follows:
galaxybag: Super Galaxy Backpack, with a weight of 0 and a capacity of 9999, a maximum single-item limit of 9999, and a negative load-bearing coefficient. It cannot be equipped.
galaxybelt: Super Galaxy Belt, with the same attributes as the Galaxy Backpack, but it can be equipped. The equipment is located in the same position as the original transparent equipment.
galaxylegpouch: Super Galaxy Leg Backpack, with the same attributes as the Galaxy Backpack, but it can be equipped. The equipment is located in the same position as the original transparent equipment.
galaxymaterialpouch: Super Galaxy Material Backpack, with the same attributes as the Galaxy Backpack, but it can be equipped. The equipment is located in the same position as the original transparent equipment.
galaxypack: Super Galaxy Duffle Bag, with the same attributes as the Galaxy Backpack, but it can be equipped. The equipment is located in the same position as the original transparent equipment.
galaxycanteen: A water bottle with a capacity of 10000ml, which can be consumed. It can be consumed in one 100ml portion.
galaxyjug: A water bottle with a capacity of 5000ml, which can be consumed. It can be consumed in one 100ml portion and the liquid inside can be seen.
galaxybloodbag: Like the water bottle, it can now input liquid. The maximum speed is 100ml/s.
galaxylaserdrill: 30-meter range, 100 damage, a laser excavation tool that requires a medium-sized battery.
galaxybandage: Can wrap around 1000 times and simultaneously restore skin, muscles, bleeding, fractures, and sprains.
galaxymultitool: A powerful and terrifying multi-functional toolkit that can be used for hammering, cutting, igniting, heating... etc. It can also automatically recharge and repair. With it, you can discard all other processing tools.
Galaxy Waterball: Edible water ball, +50 water content, +5 satiety
Galaxynutrientbar: Nutritional bar, +50 satiety

[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
0. [b]If you have previously installed my mod, please delete the old version files before updating.[/b]
1. Download and add RshLib.dll to BepInEx/Plugin
2. Download and Extract the files to BepInEx/Plugin

ex.If you want to add an Disabled items, you can move it to the "items" folder.
You can obtain additional information about the items in the Item list.
[size=4][b]Requirements[/b][/size]
BepInEx
RshLib
ICEnecoCustomItemAPI

[b][color=#fafafa][size=4]Future Goals[/size][/color][/b]
[list=1]
[*][b]Refine the underlying system[/b] – eventually make it a standalone item-creation API that connects with [b]RshLib[/b] (probably rename it by then).[/*]
[*][b]Build a small program for custom items[/b] – so you won't need to write JSON manually.[/*]
[*][b]Integrate with MossLib for localization[/b] – once that's done, I'll provide proper localizations.[/*]
[/list]
Author: ICEneco

Name: CatPatch
Description:
[size=6][b]Description[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]A fork of CatPatch originally made by GarytheCat that we lost in the great steam scourge. Hugging increases mood and has mood based dialogue.[/color]

Name: Killer's Guns
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
[color=#d4d4d8]Adds a handful of guns, using sprites I made for a ss14 fork called FarHorizons (SS14 sprites and Casualties Unknown's are, interestingly, very compatible with eachother)[/color]

Mostly a personal mod.
[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]Install New Gun Loader [/color]
Install this mod
Put the contents of Killer_Guns.zip into the NewGun folder
Enjoy :D
[size=4][b]Main features[/b][/size]
[color=#d4d4d8]This mod adds

Shotguns -
- Sentinel (24 round semiautomatic, has a 0.5s delay between shots)
The SS14 version of this is mag-fed but pump action. As funny as this would be, no shotgun magazines so you're spared.. for now.

- Combat Shotgun (12 round semiautomatic)
Holds more, with more recoil.

- Krammer5001 (8 round semiautomatic, low recoil)
Better shotgun, not much to say.

LMGs -
- M429 (Manually loaded like a shotgun, 100 rifle rounds. Does a bit more damage than a rifle.)
I would have LOVED to give this thing magazines, but, making items by json isn't a thing. Yet. Best I could do.

Rifles -
- Lecter Type-T (Low recoil)
Just a better rifle. Added stock makes the gun actually controllable.

- Lecter Type-F (Low recoil, higher damage than a rifle. 0.5s delay between shots)
An advanced Lecter, same concept. Shoots slower though.

Pistols -
- P91 (Machine pistol, extremely fast RoF but almost no accuracy)
Hold down left trigger and watch the utter obliteration of something two feet in front of you.

- N1984 (.44 Magnum, extremely high damage/recoil, uses pistol magazines and has a 0.5s delay between shots)[/color]
Solid sidearm if you can find it. Salad doesn't stand a chance against someone who can aim.

Railguns - 
- N2461 (Pistol / 2k damage per shot / High recoil / 1s delay between shots / Loud)
Just a good sidearm. Will deafen you.

- IFV-2461 (Rifle / 6k damage per shot / Ridiculous recoil / 3s delay between shots / Loud / Heavy)
The recoil generated by this weapon is high enough to perform gun-jumps, but the game is weird about it. If you aim too far up you will be launched upwards, and if you aim too far down you will be crushed into the ground. Consider this your warning before you accidentally end your run. Do gun-jumps at an angle.

Originally was going to use shotgun rounds to round out advanced weapons, but then I couldn't do magazine states which is part of the appeal of me doing high-tech guns. 

[size=4][b]Requirements[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]New Gun Loader [/color]
[url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/32]RshLib[/url]
[url=https://github.com/bepinex/bepinex/releases]BepInEx 5.4.23.5[/url]

[color=#D4D4D8][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/users/148474308]rusiber[/url] for making this possible via .json edits.[/color]

Description:
[size=4][b]This mod converts the game into true friendslop.[/b][/size]

[color=#ff7700][size=5][b]Installation:[/b][/size][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]Download Game: [url=https://store.steampowered.com/app/4576510]https://store.steampowered.com/app/4576510[/url]
Download BepInEx: [url=https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx/releases/download/v5.4.23.5/BepInEx_win_x64_5.4.23.5.zip]https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx/releases/download/v5.4.23.5/BepInEx_win_x64_5.4.23.5.zip[/url][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]Download Co-op Mod: [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/67?tab=files]https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/67?tab=files[/url][/color]

Click to show full guide: 
[spoiler]
[list=1]
[*]Download all the prerequisistes ^^^^^[/*]
[*]Go to the game root directory.
[list]
[*]In Steam, Right click on the game. [/*]
[*]Click [b]Manage > Browse local files [/b][/*]
[/list][/*]
[*]Unzip BepInEx.zip into the game root directory. [/*]
[*]Unzip KrokMP.zip, open mod folder and move the contents into the game root directory. [/*]
[*]Now it should look like this[img]https://github.com/Krokosha666/cas-unk-krokosha-multiplayer-coop/raw/main/.github/tut_1.png[/img]
[/*]
[*]Go back to steam and click [b]Play[/b].

[/list][/*]

[list]
[*](To go back to singleplayer you need to press the Deactivate MP Mod button in Settings > General!) [/*]
[/list][/*]
[*](optional) Upvote/Share/Support the mod. [/*]
[/list][/spoiler]

[color=#ff7700][size=5][b]Feature List:[/b][/size][/color]
Steam Lobbies
Real voice chat with in-game effects.
Middle Mouse Button to point at a location.
Right click to interact and heal other players.
Stay close to others to share body temperature.
Spectator mode when dead.
Sleeping is disabled.
Hunger and thirst is slowed down.
Carrying incapacitated players.
Unchipped option is individual.
Most of these features can be tweaked in the in-game console.
Also this mod can run as a dedicated server. (its not real headless)

There's no client prediction.
There's no network ownership.
There's no deterministic RNG.
There's no anticheat.
This mod only adds a simple co-op experience to the game.

Name: Razor blade
Description:
[b][size=4]Description[/size]
[/b]An alternative to The minigame
When feeling down or worse you can cut yourself with razor blade for a little mood gain and selfharm cooldown reset
Note: if you are playing in multiplayer you must cut yourself
Blade also usable when miserable
[b][color=#00ff00]MP Status[/color]:[/b] Supported!
Detailed descrpition of mechanics:
[spoiler]On limb use:
+8 pain
-4 skin
+0.02l/m bleed
-3% blade condition
Then it rolls random number between 0 and 25 and if its above current blade condition:
  +5 shrapnel to limb
  Destroy blade
  Talk UseBroken
  Play syringe broken sound
  [color=#1e84cc]SKIP[/color] logic below
Play harm string
If bleed amount above 0.2l/m:
  [color=#1e84cc]SKIP[/color] logic below
Add selfHarmWound to limb while below 95 skin
If playing in multiplayer:
  If healer not as same as patient:
    Talk UseNotMe
    [color=#1e84cc]SKIP[/color] logic below
  Do mood penalty, same as with selfharm
 If happiness above -5:
  If have a masochist chip:
    Talk UseGloomy
    [color=#3d85c6]SKIP[/color] logic below
  -4 Happiness
  Talk UseHappy
Elif happiness above -40:
  +1 Happiness
  Selfharm cooldown set to 120 if was below
  Talk UseGloomy
Elif happiness above -70:
  +2 Happiness
  Selfharm cooldown set to 120 if was below
  Talk UseDepressed
Else (below -70):
  +2 Happiness
  Selfharm cooldown set to 60 if was below
  Talk UseDepressed[/spoiler]

Dialoges:
[spoiler]Use when happy (> -5):
  OWCH!
  What the fuck did i do..
  euhh...
  Why am i doing this..
  Fuuck..
Use when gloomy (< - 5 && > -40):
  owh..
  ngh..
  That's not that bad actualy..
Use when depressed (< -40 && > -70):
  haha.. fuck..
  Fuck yeahh..
  This is.. ouuhh..
  Goooood..
Use when misereable (< -70):
  This hurts so good..
  I want to cut these funny strings on my hand..
  Hahahahaha..
  Yes.. YES..!
  Get this fucker.. this is what you deserve..
  I needed this more than any hug..
Blade broken:
  AAH!
  I shouldn't use that so much
  WAAH!?
MP, Not the one who uses it:
  That wasn't me
  I think someone is cutting me.
  Someone is cutting me!
  That hurt[/spoiler]



[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
If you mod your game for first time (dont have BepInEx):
[spoiler]Go to BepInEx download page
https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx/releases/tag/v
And download BepInEx_win_x64_5.4.23.5
Open steam, choose browse local file
Extract BepInEx contents into game folder's root (winhttp.dll should be in same folder as executable)
Open game once and close
Now folder BepInEx/plugins should be created

Additional instruction for Linux users:
  - Add  `WINEDLLOVERRIDES="winhttp=n,b"  %command%` into launch arguments[/spoiler]
Download and extract into BepInEx/plugins RshLib (if you haven't before)
You can verify that RshLib loaded by seeing "This is a modded beta build" on top
Download `Razor` and extract into BepInEx/plugins

Please report any bugs you find

Name: More powerful Chinese translation
Description:
[b][size=5]《维基中文》[/size][/b]
"更强大的中文翻译！"

[b][size=4]说明：[/size][/b]
[b]《维基中文》(更强大的翻译)[/b]
是一个扩展性中文翻译，
将大量的数值、冷花絮、及功能描述文本添加进了物体的描述之中。

数据来源通过wiki和解包，
因此称为"[b]维基中文[/b]"，简称"[b]维中[/b]"。

但实际上它并[b]不是100%准确的[/b]。

[b]数据过期、遗漏、错误[/b]等问题时有出现，因此维中组一直以来对此进行维护。

尽力达到最权威、最正确、最完好的状态。

维中有时也会出现[b]翻译错误[/b]的问题。
[b][i]这种直接向维中组反应就行， 不要去怪汉化组！[/i][/b]

[b]主要由   简中版   作为底板[/b]，及包含[b]内华达刃脊锁[/b]补丁的多人联机汉化，再由 [b]冷白喵qwq 及 维基制作组[/b] 在此基础上扩展的功能性维基翻译补丁。


[b]当前版本1.7.5(正式版2026-6-14)；[/b]

[b]已覆盖：[/b]
[b]类别 数量[/b]

物品 (main) 279
背景物块 (buildings) 约70 
状态效果 (moodles) 171
液体种类 (other中的液体定义) 74
生物种类 (buildings中的敌人生物) 8

以及 健康面板 等额外信息也标注了描述！

再次感谢简中版及内华达刃脊制作组。

[b]所有数据信息均来自[/b]https://scavprototype.wiki.gg 官方wiki 及 [b]维基中文制作组对游戏的代码分析[/b]，但依旧[b]不能保证100%的正确[/b]，因此可能会出现数据、描述的问题，请及时反馈 我们会在下个版本中修正。

[b]Github上的该项目：[/b]https://github.com/StreamWind114514/Casualties-Unknown-Simplified-Chinese-Wiki

(浏览器搜索 "scavprototype维基中文" 基本能出来

[b][i][u]该文件安装位置：[/u][/i][/b]
/CasualtiesUnknown_Data/Lang/WC.json

[b][u](注意：文件名最好手动修改为英文，例如"WC.json"，防止一些奇怪的问题)[/u][/b]

[b][size=4]注意事项📛[/size][/b]
如果您在装载该翻译文件后出现以下情况：

1.查看描述时可能会轻微卡顿
2.当一个容器内液体过多的时候，查看详细信息可能会导致截断或缺失
3.有时查看物品描述时频繁闪动

[b]原因解析：[/b]
第1种情况可能跟电脑配置有关，至少我本人在测试的时候是没有卡顿的

第2种纯液体描述文字太多了，但屏幕又有限，暂时没有可解决办法

[i]第3种可以先将物品捡起来放在背包 再扔出去，就可以正常显示了，当然也可以在背包里查看)[/i]


[b]如果存在其它严重问题，那么建议不要再使用并卸载[/b](防止后续问题)，这不是您的问题，也不是我的问题，而是游戏适配性并不高，有些人能正常用，有些人有问题。

[size=4][b]仓库下载地址：[/b][/size]
https://github.com/StreamWind114514/Casualties-Unknown-Simplified-Chinese-Wiki
内含使用教程

[size=4][b]补充：[/b][/size]
 不太习惯用n网，具体信息、最新版本 请前往https://github.com/StreamWind114514/Casualties-Unknown-Simplified-Chinese-Wiki
Author: miaosu1097

Name: Comprehensive revision
Description:
Description
本 DLL 补丁深度重写了《Casualties Unknown》的技能与生存系统。原版游戏技能超过 31 级或更高的等级会导致经验值溢出并卡死，角色成长上限低，大量属性（如智力）缺乏存在感。此模组彻底修复溢出问题，将所有属性上限安全扩展至 1000 级，并为力量、韧性、智力新增了全面且符合直觉的加成——高力量能强化装备效果，高韧性获得更强恢复和防御，高智力则加速全局经验获取。角色将随着等级提升感受到真正的数值碾压。
详细改动列表已随附在下载文件中。

Description
This DLL patch deeply rewrites the skill and survival systems of Casualties Unknown. In the original game, skills exceeding level 31 or higher cause experience overflow and freeze, with a low growth ceiling and many attributes (like Intelligence) lacking presence. This mod completely fixes the overflow issue, safely extending all stat caps to level 1000, and adds comprehensive, intuitive bonuses for Strength, Resilience, and Intelligence – high Strength enhances equipment effectiveness, high Resilience grants stronger recovery and defense, and high Intelligence accelerates global experience gain. As you level up, you will truly feel the numerical domination.
A detailed change log is included with the download.

Installation instructions
1. 打开游戏安装目录：
  Steam\steamapps\common\Casualties Unknown Demo\CasualtiesUnknown_Data\Managed
2. 备份原始 Assembly-CSharp.dll 文件（强烈建议）。
3. 将下载的 Assembly-CSharp.dll 复制到上述目录，覆盖原文件。
4. 启动游戏即可生效。

Installation instructions
1. Navigate to the game installation folder:
  Steam\steamapps\common\Casualties Unknown Demo\CasualtiesUnknown_Data\Managed
2. Back up the original Assembly-CSharp.dll (strongly recommended).
3. Copy the downloaded Assembly-CSharp.dll into the above folder, overwriting the original file.
4. Launch the game – the changes will take effect.

Main features
- 突破等级30+经验限制：所有技能上限扩展至 1000 级，经验值不再溢出，告别卡死 bug。
- 技能效果全面重做：
  - 力量：增强装备护甲效率。
  - 韧性：提升凝血、血液再生、伤口愈合、体温稳定、意识恢复等几乎所有身体恢复能力，并提供裸体减伤。
  - 智力：按等级指数级加速所有经验获取，让智力真正成为成长的核心。
- 修复官方未处理的溢出 bug：疼痛为负、反冲力自伤等问题已修正。
- 最小侵入改动：仅修改公式数值，未改变游戏核心架构。
- 支持原版存档，无需新开游戏。（大概吧？）

Main features
- Break through the level 30+ experience limit: all skill caps extended to level 1000, experience no longer overflows, goodbye freeze bug.
- Comprehensive skill effect rework:
  - Strength: boosts equipment armor efficiency.
  - Resilience: improves blood clotting, blood regeneration, wound healing, body temperature stability, consciousness recovery, and almost all other bodily recovery abilities, while also providing unarmored damage reduction.
  - Intelligence: exponentially accelerates all experience gain based on level, making Intelligence a true core growth stat.
- Fixed official overflow bugs: negative pain values and self-damage from recoil have been corrected.
- Minimal invasive changes: only formula values were modified; the core game architecture remains untouched.
- Supports existing save files, no new game required. (Probably?)

Requirements
- 目前仅针对 Steam Demo 版本 v0.61 制作和测试。其他版本可能不兼容。

Requirements
- Currently made and tested only for Steam Demo version v0.61. Other versions may be incompatible.

Shout outs
- 本模组的代码修改全程使用 DeepSeek 专家模式（AI）辅助分析、设计和编写。
- 详细的改动记录随附于下载文件中。任何玩家若有意将其制作为独立 Mod 发布，欢迎自由使用这些修改，无需另行授权。

Shout outs
- The code modifications for this mod were entirely assisted by DeepSeek's Expert Mode (AI) in analysis, design, and writing.
- A detailed change log is attached in the download. If any player wishes to turn these modifications into a standalone mod, feel free to use them without additional permission.

Name: Killer's Clothing and Armor
Description:
[b]Description[/b]
Mostly a personal mod, the point of it is to add a bunch of clothing that fills gaps the basegame has, or doesn't have outright. No crafting recipes sadly, as I am not a C# coder. The most I can do here is json edits, which a lovely little mod has allowed me to do, that will also be the dependency for this mod! All clothing is not color customizable for now (as adding details is impossible due to the entire thing needing to be purple) but I can add that ability if it's asked for.

[b]Installation instructions[/b]
Install (New Clothing) https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/43
Install this mod
Take my mod's files out of the default folder and put all the clothes into [BeepInEx/plugins/NewClothing]

Name: New Gun Loader (super beta)
Description:
[list]
[*][color=#666666][size=5]ve[/size][/color][color=#999999][size=5]r[/size][/color][color=#b6b6b6][size=5]s[/size][/color][color=#cccccc][size=5]i[/size][/color][color=#efefef][size=5]o[/size][/color][color=#ffffff][size=5]n[/size][/color] [color=#6aa84f][size=5]2.0.0[/size][/color][/*]
[/list]Major update: the mod has been rewritten for the current game version (7.0.1) and the new RshLib 3.0.0.
Compatibility
[list]
[*]Full rewrite for the new RshLib 3.0.0 API. Previous builds no longer loaded due to changes in how items are registered — this is now fixed.[/*]
[*]Verified against all current in-game weapon parameters.[/*]
[/list]Multiplayer (KrokMP)
[list]
[*]Custom guns now sync correctly in multiplayer — weapons are visible and functional for all players.[/*]
[*]Note: every player in the session must have the mod and identical gun configs installed.[/*]
[/list]Fire sound
[list]
[*]Fixed the long-standing issue — custom fire sounds now fully work. The sound plays natively on every shot (correct volume, positioning and fire rate).[/*]
[*]Added optional rack/unrack sounds: 
[code]rackSound[/code] and 
[code]unrackSound[/code].[/*]
[*]Reworked WAV loader — files with non-standard headers are now supported.[/*]
[/list]New config options (all optional)
[list]
[*][code]baseItem[/code] — base prefab the item is built from.[/*]
[*][code]tags[/code] — item tags.[/*]
[*][code]slotRotation[/code] — sprite rotation in the inventory slot.[/*]
[*][code]muzzle[/code] — muzzle flash: 
[code]pistol[/code], 
[code]shotgun[/code] or 
[code]none[/code].[/*]
[*][code]rackSound[/code] / 
[code]unrackSound[/code] — custom bolt sounds.[/*]
[*][code]startChambered[/code] — round in the chamber on spawn.[/*]
[*][code]startWithMag[/code] — spawn with a magazine.[/*]
[*][code]startRounds[/code] — rounds in the magazine on spawn.[/*]
[*][code]startSafe[/code] — spawn with the safety on.[/*]
[/list]Backwards compatibility
[list]
[*]Existing configs work unchanged — all new fields are optional.[/*]
[/list]

[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]New Gun Loader (Beta). Adds custom guns via subfolders and JSON config files. No coding required. Already includes the FN SCAR assault rifle. Custom fire sounds are currently not supported and will be fixed in a future update. [/color]

[img]https://i.ibb.co/YBgt82c1/Video-Project-5.gif[/img]

[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
[list=1]
[*][color=#D4D4D8]Install BepInEx 5 and RshLib.[/color][/*]
[*][color=#D4D4D8]Extract the mod into BepInEx/plugins.[/color][/*]
[/list][size=4][b]Adding a new gun:
[/b][/size]
[list=1]
[*][size=4]Go to BepInEx/plugins/NewGun/ and create a new folder (e.g., MyPistol).[/size][/*]
[*][size=4]Place four PNG sprites inside (weapon must face RIGHT):[/size]

[list]
[*][size=4]normal.png (default view, magazine in, bolt closed)[/size][/*]
[*][size=4]racked.png (bolt open after firing)[/size][/*]
[*][size=4]normal_nomag.png (magazine removed, bolt closed)[/size][/*]
[*][size=4]racked_nomag.png (magazine removed, bolt open)[/size][/*]
[/list][/*]
[*][size=4]Create config.json in the same folder. Copy the example from the FN_SCAR folder and edit values.[/size][/*]
[*][size=4]Launch the game, open console, type: spawn my_weapon cursor[/size][/*]
[/list][size=4][b]How to use config.json[/b][/size]

[code]{
  "itemId": "unique item ID (e.g., myscar.scar)",
  "fullName": "displayed weapon name in-game",
  "description": "in-game description text",
  "category": "inventory category (usually 'utility')",
  "weight": "item weight",
  "value": "trader value (integer)",
  "recognition": "stealth rating (higher = less visible)",
  "ammoType": "ammo type: Pistol, Rifle, Shotgun",
  "firingMode": "fire mode: Auto, SemiAuto, Pump",
  "feedType": "feed type: Mag, Direct, revolver",
  "magCapacity": "magazine capacity (rounds)",
  "knockBack": "recoil strength",
  "structureDamage": "damage to structures",
  "animalDamage": "damage to creatures",
  "loudness": "gunshot loudness",
  "desiredGasTime": "time between shots in seconds",
  "shotsPerFire": "projectiles per shot (e.g., 8 for shotgun)",
  "verticalSpread": "bullet spread",
  "conditionLossPerShot": "condition loss per shot (0 to 1)",
  "pixelsPerUnit": "sprite scale (higher = smaller in hand)",
  "fireSound": "custom fire sound file name without extension (currently unsupported)"
}[/code][size=4]
[b]Main features[/b][/size]
[list]
[*][color=#D4D4D8]Add custom guns without programming.[/color][/*]
[*][color=#D4D4D8]Four sprite states: normal, racked, no magazine, racked no magazine.[/color][/*]
[*][color=#D4D4D8]All weapon stats configured via JSON.[/color][/*]
[*][color=#D4D4D8]Supports Pistol, Rifle, Shotgun ammo types.[/color][/*]
[*][color=#D4D4D8]Auto, SemiAuto, and Pump firing modes.[/color][/*]
[/list][size=4][b]Requirements[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]BepInEx 5, RshLib. [/color]
Author: rusiber

Name: Player Sprite Replacer _Numpad_
Description:
[center][quote][b][size=4]ORIGINAL MOD - [/size][/b][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/15?tab=description][b][size=4]https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/15?tab=description[/size][/b][/url][/quote][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/15?tab=description]
[/url]
[left][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/15?tab=description][/url][/left]
[left][/left]
[/center]
[left][size=4][b]Description[/b][/size][/left]
[color=#D4D4D8]This is a modified fork of the original Player Sprite Replacer mod by Karlo Poljančić (dogederp), distributed under the MIT License.

You do NOT need the original mod. This version works completely standalone – just install it as described and it will function on its own.

The original mod allowed replacing the player sprite by manually swapping files. This version adds the ability to switch between multiple custom sprites directly while playing, using the NumPad keys 1 through 9 – no need to leave the game.

HOW IT WORKS:
Inside the CustomSprites folder, there are subfolders named st1, st2, ... st9. Each of these folders contains two subfolders: "head" and "body", which hold the corresponding sprite parts for that slot. The mod comes with pre-loaded sprites in these folders so you can test the functionality immediately. You can replace the contents of st1–st9 with your own sprites as long as you keep the head/body structure.

The code edits were done with the help of an AI neural network. I have no experience in C# programming, so the implementation may not be perfect, but it works. All credit for the core functionality and original assets belongs to Karlo Poljančić.

NOTE: If you don't have a NumPad but really want to use the mod, I can make a separate version with different key bindings. Let me know in the comments.[/color]

[size=4][b]Media
[img]https://i.ibb.co/PvzjkW0B/Video-Project-3.gif[/img]
[youtube]tRlZNJFllXo[/youtube]
Installation instructions [/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]1. Make sure BepInEx is installed for Casualties Unknown Demo.
2. Extract the contents of the ZIP archive into the folder:
  …\steamapps\common\Casualties Unknown Demo\BepInEx\plugins
3. The folder structure should look like:[/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]
[i]  BepInEx\plugins\body_sprite_replacer.dll
  BepInEx\plugins\CustomSprites\[/i][/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]
      ├── st1\
      │  ├── head\
      │  └── body\
      ├── st2\
      │  ├── head\
      │  └── body\
      └── ... (up to st9)
4. The mod already includes test sprites inside st1–st9, so you can try it out right away.
5. Launch the game.
6. While playing, press NumPad keys 1 through 9 to switch between the sprite sets instantly.[/color]

[size=4][b]Main features[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8][b]- Fully standalone – does not require the original mod to be installed.[/b][/color]
- Switch between 9 different sprite sets in real time using NumPad 1-9 keys.
- Each set is stored in a dedicated folder (st1 to st9) with "head" and "body" subfolders.
- Pre-loaded with test sprites so you can see the mod in action immediately.
- Easy customisation: just replace the images inside st1–st9/head and body with your own.
- No need to replace files manually or restart the game.
- Preserves the original sprite replacer functionality.
- Works with the Casualties Unknown Demo (Scav Prototype).
- If you lack a NumPad, a custom keybinding version can be provided upon request (ask in comments).

[size=4][b]Requirements[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]- Casualties Unknown Demo (Scav Prototype) installed via Steam.
- BepInEx mod loader configured for the game.
- (No other mods are required.)[/color]

[size=4][b]Shout outs[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]Thanks to Karlo Poljančić (dogederp) for creating the original Player Sprite Replacer mod and releasing it under the MIT License, which allowed me to make this modified version.

Also thanks to the AI tools that helped me edit the code despite my lack of C# knowledge.

Original game assets by Orsoniks.[/color]
Author: rusiber

Name: Cigarrets
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]Adds a pack of 10 cigarret that you can find/buy[/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]Use in inventory yo get a cigarret[/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]Then use cigarret to lit it and put it in your mouth slot[/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]Detailed description:[/color]
[spoiler][color=#D4D4D8]You must have a lighter in inventory or a campfire nearby to lit it
One cigarrete lasts 50 sec noramly
25 sec in rain
or 1 sec if wet (wet decays even if unlit)

The effects of 50 sec are following:
 2.4 mood
 3.5 sickness (actually 6.5 sickness, but you reduce 3 sickness in 50 sec)
 1.8 hemothorax (actually 4.8 hemothorax, for comparasion you see moodle at 40)
 Unable to harm yourself while smoking
 Decreases heart rate and gives adrenaline in some amount[/color][/spoiler]

MP Status: Compatible, both client and host must have it


[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
If you mod your game for first time (dont have BepInEx):
[spoiler]Go to BepInEx download page
https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx/releases/tag/v
And download BepInEx_win_x64_5.4.23.5
Open steam, choose browse local file
Extract BepInEx contents into game folder's root (winhttp.dll should be in same folder as executable)
Open game once and close
Now folder BepInEx/plugins should be created

Additional instruction for Linux users:
 - Add  `WINEDLLOVERRIDES="winhttp=n,b"  %command%` into launch arguments[/spoiler]
Download and extract into BepInEx/plugins RshLib.2.1.5 (if you haven't before)
  You can verify that RshLib loaded by seeing "This is a modded beta build" in top
Download `Cigarrets` and extract into BepInEx/plugins

Name: NEW LAYER MOD 7.0.1 (Crystal)
Description:
[b]Layer Unlocker[/b] - (Demo) that unlocks underground layers 5-9+. Each layer features a unique biome with custom terrain, entities, traps, structures, heaters, and weather effects. Created to study Unity world generation architecture using BepInEx and Harmony. Not affiliated with the game developer. NOT ALL CONTENT NOT ALL CONTENTNOT ALL CONTENT  HARDCORE HARDCORE

[b]Installation instructions[/b]
[list=1]
[*]Install [b]BepInEx 5.4[/b] for (download from BepInEx GitHub)[/*]
[*]Extract BepInEx into the game root folder (where 
[code]To the root folder of the game[/code] is located)[/*]
[*]Run the game [b]once[/b] to let BepInEx generate the 
[code]plugins[/code] folder[/*]
[*]Close the game[/*]
[*]Copy 
[code]LayerUnlocker.dll[/code] into 
[code]BepInEx/plugins/[/code][/*]
[*]Launch the game[/*]
[/list][b]Main features[/b]
[list]
[*][b]5+ new underground layers[/b] with unique terrain generation[/*]
[*][b]Custom biomes:[/b] Frozen Chasm, Fungal Pools, Crystalline Hollow, Abandoned Lab, Geothermal Vents[/*]
[*][b]Ion Heaters & Space Heaters[/b] - mass spawn on snow/ice surfaces[/*]
[*][b]New entities:[/b] plants, enemies, traps, traders, oil pipes[/*]
[*][b]15+ structure types[/b] distributed across all layers[/*]
[*][b]Performance optimized[/b] - no laggy elements, safe prefab loading[/*]
[*][b]Compatible[/b] with other mods not modifying 
[code]WorldGeneration[/code][/*]
[/list][b]Requirements[/b]
[list]
[*][b]Game:[/b] Casualties: Unknown (Demo), version 7.0.1 or higher[/*]
[*][b]BepInEx:[/b] 5.4.x [/*]
[*][b].NET Framework:[/b] 4.8 (usually pre-installed on Windows 10/11)[/*]
[*][b]No other mod dependencies[/b][/*]
[/list][b]Shout outs[/b]
[list]
[*][b]BepInEx team[/b] - for the modding framework[/*]
[*][b]Harmony team[/b] - for the patching library[/*]

Author: ReMiyamure

Name: Project Mechanism
Description:
[center][size=5][b]Mechanism Prototype Preview 1.0.8[/b][/size]
[i]A hostile mechanism preview build for Casualties: Unknown[/i][/center]

[size=4][b]Overview[/b][/size]

Mechanism Prototype Preview is an early BepInEx prototype mod for [i]Casualties: Unknown[/i].

It turns your Sawian into a hostile mechanism unit equipped with experimental built-in weapons, protocol tools, diagnostic UI changes, and prototype target/NPC systems. This is not a finished alternate campaign or polished gameplay overhaul yet. It is a preview build meant for footage, testing, and feedback on the core weapon/mechanism concept.

[size=4][b]Current Features[/b][/size]

[b]Mechanism Weapon Selector[/b]
The mechanism has its own built-in weapon selector separate from normal held items. Scroll the mouse wheel to select a mechanism weapon, then use left click to fire, charge, aim, or activate the selected system.

[b]Protocol Laser[/b]
Protocol Laser is a charge weapon with multiple release levels. Select Protocol Laser with the mouse wheel, then hold left click to charge. A quick tap fires a small finger shot; a longer hold releases a sustained palm beam; a full charge releases a much larger two-hand termination beam. Larger beams can keep applying damage while sustained, push through bodies, tear into blocks/buildings, and apply heavier trauma or dismember pressure.

[b]Beam Clash[/b]
Beam Clash is a debug-target interaction for testing opposing Protocol Laser beams. Spawn a debug target with
[code]mechanismbody cursor[/code], then use
[code]mechanismbody clash[/code]or the beam commands to make it fire back. If both beams meet, they can lock into a shared clash point with camera framing and beam-struggle audio. Spam click during the clash to push harder and overpower the opposing beam.

[b]Protocol Scan[/b]
Protocol Scan identifies debug targets before the full protocol flow. Select Protocol Scan with the mouse wheel and left click a target, or use
[code]mechanismbody scan[/code]for testing. Scan tells the mechanism whether a target is chipped, unchipped, unverified, cleared, or valid for protocol escalation.

[b]Protocol Command / Compliance[/b]
Protocol Command lets you order a scanned target to comply instead of immediately executing it. Select Protocol Command and left click after a successful scan, or use
[code]mechanismbody command[/code]. Depending on trust, fear, suspicion, pain, distance, and chip status, the target can submit, resist, flee, panic, become cleared, or become a valid protocol target.

[b]Protocol Evidence HUD[/b]
A diagnostic protocol panel shows scan readiness, aim/range failures, chip verification, trust-floor checks, and target behavior.

[b]Protocol Scan Pulses / Laser Legality Colors[/b]
Scan success/refusal produces a small colored world-space pulse, and Protocol Laser visuals distinguish unverified, cleared, and valid protocol targets.

[b]Head Turret[/b]
Head Turret fires fast head-mounted shots without needing a held gun. Select Head Turret with the mouse wheel and left click, or press [b]G[/b] for the direct debug key.

[b]Sound Cannon[/b]
Sound Cannon is a charge-and-release sonic blast. Select Sound Cannon and hold/release left click, or press [b]H[/b] for the direct debug key. It is a forceful area hit rather than a precise projectile, with pressure-wave distortion and color separation.

[b]Spike Hand[/b]
Spike Hand extends a blade from your arm. Select Spike Hand and hold/release left click, or press [b]J[/b] for the direct debug key. Stab a wall to pin yourself there until you release, which can be used to hang from surfaces or stop movement. Stab a body to impale it and keep it attached to the blade until click/release. While a target is pinned, keep aiming the arm to drag, lift, or turn the body with the spike.

[b]Rocket Hand[/b]
Rocket Hand fires an explosive rocket from the mechanism arm. Select Rocket Hand, hold left click to raise the arm and project a red laser aim line, then release to fire. Rockets travel at medium speed, leave a trail, explode on impact or timeout, damage bodies/buildings/blocks, and shove ragdolls with the blast.

[b]Offhand Grapple[/b]
Offhand Grapple fires a hook from your secondary arm. Select Grapple and left click, or press [b]K[/b] for the direct debug key. Hold after latching to pull yourself toward the latch point or drag against it, then release to retract.

[b]Jump Pad Punch[/b]
Jump Pad Punch is a launch-force melee hit. Select Jump Pad Punch and left click, or press [b]L[/b] for the direct debug key. It can throw you or targets upward and can sometimes trigger Black Flash.

[b]Black Flash[/b]
Black Flash is a high-impact strike with a brief impact-frame effect. Press [b]E[/b] for a guaranteed Black Flash punch. Jump Pad Punch also has a 1-in-6 chance to trigger it.

[b]Perception Module[/b]
Perception Module highlights threats and adds danger projections. Use
[code]mechanismperception 0[/code]through
[code]mechanismperception 3[/code]to change levels. At higher levels the mechanism can respond to incoming hazards more aggressively, including ducking or planking under horizontal turret fire and using head-turret recoil as an airborne emergency dodge when available.

[b]Mechanism Health Panel[/b]
The player identity and several stat labels have been adjusted toward the mechanism theme. The Install Bay/loadout work is where experimental built-in systems are being organized, and the health panel now uses a chip-style mechanism button.

[b]Debug Target Body[/b]
Debug Target Body spawns a passive cloned test body for demonstrating weapons, protocol systems, beam clashes, ragdoll recovery, speech reactions, and targetable limbs. Use
[code]mechanismbody cursor[/code]to spawn one at the cursor, or
[code]mechanismbody[/code]to remove spawned debug bodies.

[b]Gunsaw Sawian Test Bodies[/b]
Gunsaw Sawian Test Bodies are experimental Gunsaw-style debug bodies for visual and combat testing. Use commands such as
[code]gunsawbody base cursor[/code],
[code]gunsawbody all cursor[/code], or
[code]gunsawbody roza cursor armed[/code]. Some have imported sprites, tails, blood colors, and weapon profiles, making them useful for testing impales, rockets, sonic blasts, lasers, and ragdoll behavior.

[b]NPC 9mm Handling[/b]
NPC 9mm Handling lets debug bodies be armed for combat testing without inheriting normal player control. Use the armed Gunsaw/debug body commands or related mechanismbody testing commands to stage weapon interactions.

[b]Testing Tools[/b]
Includes commands for god mode, Gunsaw visual debugging, perception levels, protocol testing, heavy diagnostics, health UI tuning, headless perception tests, Gunsaw runtime prefab tests, and navigation descent self-tests. Most of the prototype's best scenes come from spawning a body, arming it, then combining scan/command/beam clash/spike/rocket/sound cannon interactions.

[size=4][b]Basic Controls[/b][/size]

[list]
[*]Scroll Wheel - select mechanism weapon[/*]
[*]Left Click - fire/use selected weapon[/*]
[*]E - guaranteed Black Flash[/*]
[/list]
[b]Direct debug keys still work for quick testing:[/b]

[list]
[*]G - Head Turret[/*]
[*]H - Sound Cannon[/*]
[*]J - Spike Hand[/*]
[*]K - Offhand Grapple[/*]
[*]L - Jump Pad Punch[/*]
[/list]
Mod keybinds are ignored while the in-game console is open.

[size=4][b]Console Commands[/b][/size]

[b]Spawn or remove the main debug target body:[/b]
[code]mechanismbody cursor[/code]
[b]Run without cursor to remove spawned debug bodies:[/b]
[code]mechanismbody[/code]
[b]Show or hide simple debug target thoughts:[/b]
[code]mechanismbody thoughts on
mechanismbody thoughts off[/code]
[b]Beam clash testing:[/b]
[code]mechanismbody clash
mechanismbody beam
mechanismbody beam big[/code]
[b]Protocol testing:[/b]
[code]mechanismbody scan
mechanismbody command
mechanismbody execute
mechanismbody status
mechanismbody chipped
mechanismbody unchipped
mechanismbody resetprotocol[/code]
[b]Heavy debug diagnostics:[/b]
[code]mechanismbody debug
mechanismbody debug on
mechanismbody debug off[/code]
[b]Perception module:[/b]
[code]mechanismperception 0
mechanismperception 1
mechanismperception 2
mechanismperception 3
mechanismperception status
mechanismperception debug[/code]
[b]Gunsaw-style debug bodies:[/b]
[code]gunsawbody base cursor
gunsawbody all cursor
gunsawbody roza cursor armed[/code]
[b]Gunsaw visual debugging:[/b]
[code]gunsawdebug dump
gunsawdebug tail
gunsawdebug rig on
gunsawdebug rig off
gunsawdebug autofit on
gunsawdebug autofit off[/code]
[b]Testing god mode:[/b]
[code]mechanismgod on
mechanismgod off
mechanismgod status[/code]
[size=4][b]Installation[/b][/size]

This mod requires BepInEx 5.

Extract the archive into your game folder so that the DLL ends up here:

[code]BepInEx/plugins/HeadTurret.dll[/code]
The included weapon sounds should end up here:

[code]BepInEx/plugins/HeadTurretSounds/[/code]
The included Gunsaw/Sawian visual assets should end up here:

[code]CasualtiesUnknownMods/Assets/GunsawExtracted/Sprites/[/code]
[size=4][b]Important Notes[/b][/size]

This is a prototype preview build, not a polished final release.

Expect rough edges, debug behavior, balance issues, unfinished systems, and possible weirdness. It is being shared for footage, testing, and feedback on the core weapon/mechanism concept.
Author: Sebastian

Name: Configurable Casualties
Description:
[size=6]WORKS ON 7.0[/size]
[size=4]should be compatible with coop but its preferrable that you and the one you are playing with have the same configs[/size]

[size=4]Makes the game much easier (or harder, if you want to make it so) without the need to constantly type console commands, aswell as includes some personal changes to the game[/size]
[size=4]includes a GUI for everything, heres the overview:[/size]

[list]
[*]ability to boost and lower health regen (multipliers for skin/muscle healing, the amount of blood you lose and the speed at which bleeding clots, grow limbs back over time, disable concussion or brain damage and MUCH, MUCH more.)[/*]
[*]ability to edit body parts that certain wearable armor covers, aswell as the amount of protection/insulation they give and the amount of damage they take[/*]
[*]ability to change the amount of hp a limb has, its damage resist, how fast is the bandaging on it and etc[/*]
[*]ability to make certain items regenerate their durability, basically making them last indefinitely, highly configurable which means you can make dressings and one-use items regen over time, such as crystals[/*]
[*]dirtyness now decays over time without the need to dip yourself in water or use a pod shower (can be disabled)[/*]
[*]ability to control the amount of wetness that decays over time[/*]
[*]ability to control body temperature and default it to the value you want, preventing hyperthermia/hypothermia[/*]
[*]ability to control immunity positive/negative values to either buff or debuff it[/*]
[*]ability to control mood and its gain[/*]
[*]ability to control liquids and what they do (you can make water work like morphine when injected and like oil when drank, highly customizable)[/*]
[*]ability to control items and their mechanics[/*]
[*]ability to control body metabolism[/*]
[/list]to change the values, press F9 in game, by default values are are unchanged

installation: install BepInEx into the game's main folder (i use the steam release), run the game once after installing it and then drop the contents of ConfigurableCasualties folder into the game's folder (where the .exe is)

[b][size=5]EVERYTHING ABOVE IS NOT FINAL!!! COMMENT MORE THINGS THAT I FORGOT ABOUT SO I CAN MAKE THEM CONFIGURABLE
if things dont work list them in the comments[/size][/b]
Author: knmc

Name: New Clothing
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
Adds 10 new clothing items in game
They can be founded in any color! Also modifies armwarmers and holiday hat to have random color as well
They also can be repainted in traders
[b][color=#00ff00]MP Status: Compatabile[/color][/b]
There are commands for it:
`nc_reloadregistry`: Unregisters all NewClothing items, and then registers all items from NewClothing/ folder. Can be done while in game, althoght, it will destroy all old items, howevar, if you are client host will quickly send packet to recreate localy misisng items
`nc_downloadfromhost`: Deletes local NewClothing folder and downloads it from host, afterwards, runs nc_reloadregistry
In other words: if you join server, with, lets say killer clothing, but you dont have it installed, you can run this command to load and register them.


[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]If you mod your game for first time (dont have BepInEx):[/color]
[spoiler][color=#D4D4D8]Go to BepInEx download page
https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx/releases/tag/v
And download BepInEx_win_x64_5.4.23.5
Open steam, choose browse local file
Extract BepInEx contents into game folder's root (winhttp.dll should be in same folder as executable)
Open game once and close
Now folder BepInEx/plugins should be created

Additional instruction for Linux users:
 - Add  `WINEDLLOVERRIDES="winhttp=n,b"  %command%` into launch arguments[/color][/spoiler]
[color=#D4D4D8]Download and extract into BepInEx/plugins RshLib.3.0.0 (if you haven't before)[/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]  You can verify that RshLib loaded by seeing "This is a modded beta build" in top[/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]Download `NewClothing` and extract into BepInEx/plugins[/color]
It's also recomended to download [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/194]Wearable Array[/url] too, it prevents wearables from going-off screen



[size=4][b]Main features[/b][/size]
Adds:
 - Shirt (different from torn shirt)
 - T-Shirt
 - Crop shirt
 - Crop t-shirt
 - Thigh highs
 - Jeans (have a little pocket store things)
 - Shorts (have a little pocket store things)
 - Socks
 - Boots
 - Long shirt

You can spawn them in any color, just add $<HEX CODE OF COLOR> In the end
Like this: spawn armwarmers$F09000

You also can add your own clothing by .json edits!
Doc:
[spoiler]{
    "baseItem": "string", // Advanced only, enter only vanilla items here, remove if you're unsure on what you are doing
    "notWearable": false, // i guess we are doing items now
    "notPaintable": false, // Allows usage of FF00FF
    "limbs": [ "string", ], // All limbs beside "desiredWearLimb" affected by clothing
    "fullname": "string", // Displayed name
    "description": "string", // Displayed description
    "category": "string", // "utility" droppable as utility item, "custom" only traders, "unobtainable" only console commands
    "decayMinutes": 0.0, // Set to 0 to not decay
    "scaleWeight": false,
    "weight": 0.0,
    "desiredWearLimb": "string", // Main limb it worn on, dismembrent bans wearing. If not wearable only defines file name
    "wearSlotId": "string", // Player cant put on 2 wearables with same slot id
    "wearableIsolation": 0.0, // Isolation from temperatures provided by wearable, multiply by 100 to get in %. Doesn't affected by "limbs"
    "wearableArmor": 0.0, // Armor provided to "desiredWearLimb" and "limbs", multiply by 100 to get in %
    "wearableHitDurabilityLossMultiplier": 0.0, // Multiplier of damage wearable takes
    "wearableVisualOffset": 0, // Lower values makes wearable be visually putted below ones with highers value
    "rippableAmount": 0, // Defines rippable quantity
    "value": 0,
    "recognition": 0,
    "decayInfo": 6, // 6 by default
    "isBulletproof": false, // Used by New Firearms 1.5.0+. No effect if no new firearms

    "container": false, // Conflicts with "bottle"
    "maxWeight": 0.0,
    "maxWeightPerItem": 0.0,
    "encumberanceMult": 0.0, // Weight of items in container multiplier by this value
    "itemsVisible": false,
    "tagRestriction": [ "string", ], // Leave empty/null to not have restrictions

    "weightReduction": false, // Requires "container"
    "weightReductionSelf": -0.0, // If operational, this value will get ADDED on top of current enumberance

    "maxBatterySize": 0, // not 0 makes clothing battery powered, 1 - small, 2 - medium, 3 - large

    "explodeAtZero": false, // Explode similar to gravbag when condition reaches below 0.5% and (if battery powered then also have battery)

    "bottle": false, // Confilicts with "container",
    "liquidCapacity": 0.0,
    "defaultLiquid": "string",
    "autoFill": "string",
    "fillmentSpritesPath": "string",
    "drinkAmount" 0.0, // mL to drink on use if notWearable

    "autoZoomBehaviour": false,
    "climbingClawsBehaviour": false, // doesnt drain condioton on walljumps
    "headlampBehaviour": false,
    "scubaGearBehaviour": false,
}[/spoiler]



[color=#D4D4D8][size=4][b]Shout out[/b][/size][/color]
Killer Tamashi
Author: RushellXYZ

Name: Meow Sound Swap
Description:
[url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/221][b][size=5]THIS MOD HAS ENTIRELY BEEN SUPERSEDED BY ULTIMATE SOUND SWAP[/size][/b] [/url]
Click here to go to it ^
(if you want the voyager sound, just take the voymeow1.wav from this mod with you)

Replaces several player vocal sounds with custom meowing clips:

- B key bark sounds -> meow clips
- Pain whimper sounds -> hiss clip
- Depressed growl -> custom growl clip

Requires BepInEx 5 x64.

## Installation

1. Install BepInEx 5 x64 for the game.
2. Download this mod and extract the zip into the game folder.
3. The final layout should look like this:

`CasualtiesUnknown.exe`
`BepInEx/plugins/VoySoundSwap.dll`
`BepInEx/plugins/VoySoundSwapSounds/voymeow1.wav`

Name: Prosthetics
Description:
[b]Prosthetics mod, allows you to replace a missing limb with a prosthetic, that changes gameplay, visuals both as in world items, sprites on your character and in Wound UI. (works with changeskin and spritereplacer mods)[/b]

[b][color=#00ff00]MP STATUS:[/color] Works if both host and client have the mod and requirements (there will be bugs, report them here pls)
[/b]
[b][color=#ff0000]Balancing[/color]: the balancing is WIP I would love to hear your opinion on what can be improved, or changed.[/b]

[b][color=#ff0000]ITS WIP[/color], For the future ideas go to the end of description, heres what's currently in the mod:[/b]

[b][color=#783f04]Wooden [/color]prosthetics:[/b]
[list]
[*]Get +25% damage from all sources;[/*]
[*]Deals 80% damage to environment;[/*]
[*]Slow you down if you have em as legs;[/*]
[*]Wooden arms cant hold anything besides containers (theese are hooks bro);[/*]
[*]Upon breaking without wrench you recieve glass shards (splinters) on your nearest normal limb;[/*]
[*]Can be healed via applying bio-chem, wood scraps, wood panels, sticks in medical ui.

[size=4]New sprites for mini games made by  Il_Disabile[/size][/*]
[/list][b][color=#999999]Scrap [/color]Prosthetics[/b]
[list]
[*][b]prty much the same as a normal limb[/b][/*]
[*]they dont bleed, infect or get a broken bone[/*]
[*]can be repaired with: scrap metal, panel, bundle of wires.[/*]
[/list][b][color=#1155cc]TITANIUM [/color]limbs:[/b]
Buffs are influenced by hp of the limbs and how wet they are, they can give you debuffs if limbs are damaged or wet.
[b]Arms[/b]:
[list]
[*]Deal more damage with claws, tools, melee weapons[/*]
[*][s]When you put something in the titanium arm slot it halves the weight of that item..[/s][/*]
[*]Act as hammering tools when you have em equipped.[/*]
[/list][b]Legs[/b]:
[list]
[*]Make you go faster and jump higher[/*]
[*]if you have 2 titanium legs it will prevent fall damage unless you are falling while being ragdolled[/*]
[/list][b]Also[/b]:
[list]
[*]Titanium limbs can be repaired with titanium sheets they restore both "skin" and "muscle"[/*]
[*]Titanium limbs cant be fully destroyed unless eaten by an elder.[/*]
[*]Extremely rare and expensive if you find them on traders.[/*]
[*]You cant take em off unless they have > 80% hp[/*]
[*]Have 2 mod slots each. 


[size=4]Epic Wound ui and ingame sprites were made by [/size] [b][color=#cc0000][size=6][font=Arial Black]HelperDeath [/font][/size][/color][/b]
[/*]
[/list][b][color=#ff7700]Copper Jaw prosthetic[/color][/b]:
[list]
[*]Can be apllied when you lose a jaw[/*]
[*]Gives 25% dmg resistance to the head[/*]
[*]Defends against shrapnel and dislocations[/*]
[*]Broken bone on head event will destroy it tho, no need to fix the "bone"[/*]
[*]Items in the mouth slot will not be dropped when you are unconscious[/*]
[*]You gain only half of the mood from food sources[/*]
[/list][color=#00ff00]Prosthetic [b]EYE[/b][/color]:

 — a one-shot surgical tool that opens an augment socket directly in a biological arm or leg. Now you can run Powergrip, Steady Hand, Multi-Hacking, or Powersteps without committing to a full prosthetic.

[list]
[*]Powered by small,medium batteries[/*]
[*]Restores sight if its powered[/*]
[*]Can be your flashlight if you hit F, and if you have both prosthetic eyes the light will be stronger! but at a cost of more energy consumption.[/*]
[*]You can take out the battery while its in your head via wound ui, or pull it out into inventory and do it there[/*]
[*]Battery in the prosthetic eye will take damage instead of the eye if it comes to that, if theres no battery the prosthetic eye may be broken same way a normal eye can.[/*]
[*]Prosthetic eyes can break. If a battery is loaded when it would break, the battery gets destroyed instead and the eye survives — so a charged eye is its own shield.[/*]
[/list]
[b]Bonesaw[/b]:
[b]Added:[/b] Two new bonesaws — a Makeshift Bonesaw you can craft, and a Medicinal Bonesaw that must be found in the world.
Both allow you to sever a limb regardless of its current state, and do so more efficiently than any other tool.

[b]Plastic fork[/b]: Allows  you to get rid of your "useless" biological eye out to make space for an upgrade.

[color=#9900ff][b]NEW CHALLENGE MODE:[/b][/color]
You start with wooden limbs and an empty prosthetic eye, but just to make it a little more fair you start with 13 int and a flimsy knife at your feet.

[b][color=#00ffff][size=5]NEW UI[/size][/color][/b]
[list]
[*]Press V to activate[/*]
[*]You can equip/unequip augments and mods via this interface.[/*]
[*]You can see the statuses of your augmentations and mods (battery charge, uses left ext.)[/*]
[/list][heading]Brain Mods[/heading]
[list]
[*][b]Pain Blocker[/b] — Halves all incoming pain. [i]Ejection: brain flash + vomiting.[/i][/*]
[*][b]Trap Detector[/b] — Red glow on beartraps, mines, coils, turrets, spikes. [i]Ejection: brain flash + vomiting.[/i][/*]
[*][b]Sonic Screamer[/b] — Active. 25-unit sonic burst sends nearby creatures fleeing for 2s. [i]3 uses, safe to eject.[/i][/*]
[*][b]Maso chip [/b]— Pain hurts 10% more, but mood rises the more you suffer. [i]Ejection: 5 brain damage, brain flash, 15 head pain.[/i][/*]
[*][b]Adrenaline Surge[/b] — Active. Stand up from any ragdoll, even mid-air. Hurts like hell. [i]3 uses, safe to eject.[/i][/*]
[*][b]Sandivistian[/b] — Active. Military reflex booster, slows perceived time. Severe sickness after 10s. [i]3 uses, can't eject while active, auto-breaks on last use.[/i][/*]
[*][i][b]Scanning Chip [/b]— hold an item, activate, 3 s scan reveals the recipe and permanently marks the item as recognized (saved across runs)
[/i]
[color=#a4c2f4]Notes:
- brain mods will now be in their own category of items
- brain mods can be found in new Neuromod boxes (1-3 spawn on each layer, you'll need to find em)
- Milkies are more likely to have one brain mod in their catalogue[/color][/*]
[/list]
[color=#ff0000][b]Augmenting Biological Limbs[/b][/color]

[list]
[*][color=#ffffff][b]Augment Implant Tool[/b] — a one-shot surgical tool that opens an augment socket directly in a biological arm or leg. Now you can run Powergrip, Steady Hand, Multi-Hacking, or Powersteps without committing to a full prosthetic.[/color][/*]
[*][color=#ffffff]Use it in the wound view on a Shoulder or Thigh.[/color][/*]
[*][color=#ffffff]The socket dies with the limb — if the limb gets cut off, the socket is gone.[/color][/*]
[/list]
[color=#9900ff][size=5][b]Limb Augments[/b] [/size][/color]
Battery-powered modifications you install into prosthetic limbs (or into a biological limb if you've used an Implant Tool — see below). All come with their own sprites and sound effects. Toggle them and check status from the cybernetics panel (V by default).
[list]
[*][b]Steady Hand[/b] — wrist gyroscope. Cuts gun recoil in half while powered, and shows a live ammo count next to your held item. Small or medium battery.[/*]
[*][b]Powergrip[/b] — power-assisted palm grip. Held items feel half as heavy, you hit harder, you throw farther, and you keep your grip even if you pass out. Small or medium battery.[/*]
[*][b]Multi-Hacking[/b] — skips lock-picking minigames, keypads, and blood terminals at a battery cost per use. Small battery can't crack blood terminals; medium can.[/*]
[*][b]Powersteps[/b] — servo pistons in the thigh. Run faster and jump higher while active: +12.5% with one leg, +25% with both. Small, medium, or large battery. One hotbar key fires both legs at once.[/*]
[/list][heading]Grappling Hook (Arm Prosthetic Mod)[/heading]
[list]
[*]Installs into a [b]scrap[/b] or [b]titanium[/b] arm prosthetic via wound ui or the aug interface panel (press V)[/*]
[*]Battery-powered — each fire drains charge; hook becomes inert when depleted[/*]
[*]Live condition % shown in the cybernetics panel [/*]
[*]1-second cooldown between shots so it can't be spammed.[/*]
[/list][line]
[b]Prosthetics[/b]
[list]
[*]They are craftable and visible as world items[/*]
[*]Visually: Seen on your character when applied both in UI and in game.[/*]
[*][color=#3d85c6][b]Wetness [/b][/color]debuffs, when you are wet it can debuff the prosthetic if its an arm you deal less dmg if a leg it slows you down— wet debuffs only kick in once a prosthetic's skin is damaged. The lower the skin HP, the harsher the wetness penalty on that limb.[/*]
[/list][b]How They Work[/b]
[list]
[*]Apply to any missing limb directly from your inventory[/*]
[*]Restores full limb function — no movement penalty (wooden exception)[/*]
[*]The wound view updates to show the prosthetic in place of the missing limb[/*]
[/list][b]Repair[/b]
[list]
[*]Use the correct materal to repair skin and muscle damage of a prosthetic[/*]
[*]Medical items (bandages, bruise kits, LRDs, etc.) do not work on prosthetics[/*]
[*][b]Welding titanium limbs[/b] — use a [b]plasma cutter[/b] or [b]mini laser drill[/b] in wound view to repair. Costs battery (Large 5%, Medium 20%, Small 30%). Flashbangs you for 3 seconds unless you're wearing a prosthetic eye, safety glasses, auto-zoom goggles, or a blindfold. In multiplayer, nearby unprotected buddies catch the flash too.[/*]
[*][b]Chain healing[/b] — one repair spreads to adjacent prosthetics of the same kind on the same arm/leg:  
[list]
[*][color=#783f04][b]Wood [/b][/color]→ biochem[/*]
[*][b][color=#cccccc]Scrap [/color][/b]→ bundle of wires[/*]
[*][b][color=#3c78d8]Titanium [/color][/b]→ plasma cutter / mini laser drill[/*]
[/list][/*]
[/list][b]Prosthetics Don't...[/b]
[list]
[*]Bleed or drip blood[/*]
[*]Get infected[/*]
[*]Cause pain[/*]
[*]Heal passively over time[/*]
[*]Get broken bones[/*]
[*]Cant get injected with venom by all kinds of vile creatures[/*]
[*]Can not be targeted by self-harm event[/*]
[*]Dune doesnt bite em, if you dont have any normal limbs He wont bite you even if you ask him.[/*]
[/list][b]Breaking[/b]
[list]
[*]If skin or muscle health reaches 0, most prosthetics breaks apart[/*]
[*]Any impact that would normally break a bone destroys it instead[/*]
[*]On destruction: drops material at your feet[/*]
[/list][b]Ripped Dressings and Old Rags[/b]:
- You can fight off wetness with ripped dressings and old rags by using them on yourself

KeyBinds:
You can change the three keybinds of my mod game settings in Controlls 

Main menu ui:
[list]
[*]its a button that alerts you if you need to update.[/*]
[*]When you click it a  pop up appears that gives you more info and a link to download page.[/*]
[/list]
[line]
[b]Installation[/b] Unpack into:
[code]Game/BepInEx/plugins/[/code][b]
[img]https://staticdelivery.nexusmods.com/mods/8391/images/40/40-1781212506-2020377369.png[/img]
Thats how your plugins folder will look with the mod installed correctly.

Requirements[/b] BepInEx 5.4 · RshLib 2.1.2. ( idk 2.1.3. doesnt work without mp mod)



[b]IDEAS (Future Content):[/b]

[b]Augmentations / Modifications
[/b]
[list]
[*][b]Shields, you can carry in hand or equip them to your prosthetic, they take the damage from the direction to themselves and prevent your bodyparts from getting cut or shrappnelled, but you recieve blunt damage through them instead, which is reduced. As a con: climbing debuff (covers Arm on which is equipped, Torso, Abdomen, Head, Thighs)[/b][/*]
[*][b]RTG [/b]or a nuclear battery that yo can attach to your chest via implant tool to make all prosthetics and their mods recharge passively all the time at the cost of having a permanent 2 radiation sickness all the time. Or you can carry it and when it charges batteries it emits radiation 0.1 rad per second when activated (mb you should leave it somewhere then come back or risk the exposure?).[/*]
[/list]
[b]Minigames:[/b]
Change the "Hand sprite" in minigames to the current prosthetic sprite.
I'm thinking about making a brain chip install/eject mini game. (if you fuck up it dmgs brain integrity)
Maybe: Prosthetic installation.
Maybe: Cybernetic installation (could be cool to have an insert eye minigame)

If you want to contact me, or stay updated abt the mod via discord you can do that on this server:  [url=https://discord.gg/aCBrFPYYjs]https://discord.gg/aCBrFPYYjs[/url]

P.S. BIG Thanks to everyone who supported and supports me, and YOU for scrolling down here ;)

Name: Re-Growth Serums
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]Tested and made on Steam version 6.1

Adds 2 Craftable and Findable Serums to regrow lost Eyes or Limbs!

It hurts regenerating eyes, and quite violent to your body for limbs though, so make sure you are prepared.

Fully works in Steam MP with latest Rshlib of 2.0.0
Also basically compatible out of the box with [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/YOU1ARE0IC][/url][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/profile/YOU1ARE0IC]YOU1ARE0IC[/url]'s wonderful [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/scavprototype/mods/40]Prosthetics[/url] mod[/color]

[size=4][b]Installation instructions[/b][/size]
[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]Just install like other Item mods that use RshLib, right into your "/BepInEx/plugins" folder
Should have regrowthserums_data folder, and ReGrowthSerums.dll next to the RshLib.dll[/color][/size]

[size=4][b]Main features[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8][b][u][i]Eye Growth Serum:[/i][/u][/b]
- Regrows one eye per use[/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]- Used like a Neural Booster
- Similar side effects as if using a second NeuralBooster (Much much lighter though, mostly just some pain, minor head tissue damage, drop in hunger, and jump in body temp)

- Can even use after losing both eyes from the NeuralBooster! (Weakens the boosters effects though, and causes new and stronger side effects, you got a bigger brain so...)
- Rough effects If used after having used any Neural Booster: 
50 sickness
10 brain damage
Vomit
Undo part of the effect of the booster by 10% (Boosters Increase by 25%, so getting one eye back would result in the booster only boosting stats by 15%, and both eyes would be only a 5% boost.)

-Also, same mindwipe and hollow effect if used under the effects of brain grow sickness.[/color]
[color=#D4D4D8]
[b][i][u]Limb Re-Growth Serum:[/u][/i][/b][/color]
- Used like an L.R.D. on the health panel. (But Sir, how can I apply to the missing limb?)
- Use on an existing limb! Regrows an adjacent limb! (If you got no arms, use on your chest and a new stubby bicep will grow, just the bicep though, need multiple usages to regrow a whole arm or leg)
- Very violent, so does a bunch of pain and tissue damage to the host limb, breaks their bones, and leaves open and internal wounds on both limbs. (so be prepared to patch it up)
- Fresh new limb starts with 0 usability, you need to let it heal/regrow after.
- Some strong disinfectant is also applied with the usage, but not enough to fully prevent infection if you have low immunity

- Restrictions: Cannot use on a very damaged limb, you need to have at least 80 skin and muscle health on the donor limb. (Broken bones are fine!)

[size=4][b]Requirements[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=3]RshLib and its requirements[/size][/color]

[size=4][b]Shout outs[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8]RushellXYZ for their RshLib and their other mods with their source code so I could see how it was done.[/color]

Author: RushellXYZ

Name: RshLib
Description:
[size=4][font=Arial][url=https://github.com/rushellxyz/rshlib]GitHub[/url] repository[/font][/size]

[b][size=4][font=Arial]Installation instruction[/font][/size][/b]
Download `RshLib.3.1.0` and put RshLib.dll into BepInEx/plugins
You can ensure that RshLib is loaded by seeing "This is a modded beta" in top of screen

[size=4][b]If you're installing mods for first time (dont have BepInEx)[/b][/size]
Go to BepInEx download page
https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx/releases/tag/v5.4.23.5
And download BepInEx_win_x64_5.4.23.5
Open steam, choose browse local file
Extract BepInEx contents into game folder's root (winhttp.dll should be in same folder as executable)
Open game once and close
Now folder BepInEx/plugins should be created

Additional instruction for Linux users:
[spoiler]Add  `WINEDLLOVERRIDES="winhttp=n,b"  %command%` into launch arguments[/spoiler]
[b][size=4]Multiplayer support![/size][/b]
Both client and server should have RshLib and all other mods

[b][size=4]Known bugs[/size][/b]
None


[b][size=4]For developers[/size][/b]
[spoiler]Why are you even need RshLib?
In a nutshell: If two different mods try to implement code for custom items, only one will work. RshLib implements this code and other mods now tells RshLib to add they're item into that code

Building example
Put RshLib.dll into BepInEx/plugins/
In RshLibExample.csproj replace all /home/rushell/Documents/CU/ to your path to game
then `dotnet build`
Put RshLibExample.dll from bin/Debug/netstandard2.1/ to BepInEx/plugins/
And put neuraldestroyer.png to BepInEx/plugins/ too

Writing plugin for custom item:
There's source code of example, you might wanna check it
Firstly add reference to RshLib.dll into csproj
Add com.rushellxyz.rshlib to BepInExDependency
Create new ItemInfo, you can see how it works in game's code
Give your item fullname, description
ALWAYS call SetTags() for every ItemInfo
And call RshLib.Plugin.RegisterItem(itemId, new RshItem
{
  sprite = Sprite,
  info = ItemInfo
})
There's also onSpawn option in case if you wanna add component to item and baseItem if you wanna fix to shitty colliders

P.S. The thumbnail is supposed to be like a gears, but im not an artist to draw >< if someone could upload something better i will make it a thumbnail[/spoiler]

Name: Radiatiated Synth mode
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]
You can satiate your hunger and thirst only through exposure to radiation, eating batteries and drinking oil.

You start with 10 str 10 res 4 int
Radiation and batteries give you both the same amount of hunger and thirst.
Oil gives you thirst only, it makes you a little happier and you can gain weight if you drink it too much.
[b]Update [/b]
antirad takes 20 hunger away per dosage and takes your weight away.
Bleach heals sickness and makes you a lil happy.
Bandages, bruise kits no longer heal your muscles or skin, just stops bleeding
Scraps heal your skin, Wires heal your muscles
Scrap panel works like an adhesive bandage stops bleeding and gives you skin.

[code]Game/BepInEx/plugins[/code][/*]

[code]radmode[/code][/*]
[/list]

Name: Time Limit Unknown
Description:
[size=4][b]Description[/b][/size]

[i]Note:  To my knowledge, Time Limit: Unknown is fully compatible with the latest Steam Demo / Beta release (v6.x)[/i]

[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]I created Time Limit: Unknown, to fix a simple problem I had with the built-in Time Limit in Casualties: Unknown.[/color][/size]

[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]Although you can toggle the Time Limit On / Off using the built-in difficulty settings, there is no way to configure the actual Time Limit itself. This mod aims to fix that problem by allowing you to adjust the Time Limit using a configuration file.[/color][/size]

[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]Do you want to double the Time Limit, and set it to something like 2 Hours? You can do that.[/color][/size]

[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]Trying to speed run? You want to make the Time Limit even less forgiving, like 20 or 30 minutes? You can do that. [/color][/size]

[size=3][color=#D4D4D8]Do you absolutely hate yourself? Do you hate having fun? Do you want the Rad Line to start immediately? You can do that. Just set it to 0 or 1.[/color][/size]



[b][size=4]Requirements[/size][/b]

You will need BepInEx / Harmony in order for Time Limit: Unknown. If you don't know how to install or use BepInEx with this game, see the installation instructions.



[size=4][b]Installation and Usage Instructions
[/b][/size]
[color=#D4D4D8][size=3]Full Installation Instructions:[/size][/color]
[spoiler][color=#D4D4D8][size=3][i]Note for Linux users:  You will likely need to use something like Wine or Proton to run the game when using a Linux based Operating System. Modded or not.
[/i][/size][/color]
[list=1]
[*]Download BepInEx from the official repository:  [url=https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx/releases/download/v5.4.23.5/BepInEx_win_x64_5.4.23.5.zip]https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx/releases/download/v5.4.23.5/BepInEx_win_x64_5.4.23.5.zip[/url] ([url=https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx/releases]https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx/releases[/url]). Make sure to specifically download the win_x64 version.[/*]
[*]Go to the folder / directory where the Casualties: Unknown game is located / installed (specifically, the folder containing CasualtiesUnknown.exe).[/*]
[*]Extract / Copy all of the contents in the BepInEx archive directly into the folder (the one containing CasualtiesUnknown.exe)[/*]
[*]Launch the game once in order for BepInEx to generate any necessary files, then close the game. A BepInEx folder should now exist under the game's folder / directory.[/*]
[*]Download the Time Limit: Unknown mod (TimeLimitUnknown.dll)[/*]
[*]Go to [Game Directory] > BepInEx > plugins, and place TimeLimitUnknown.dll in the plugins folder.[/*]
[*]Launch the game (again) in order to generate the configuration file for Time Limit: Unknown, then close the game (again)[/*]
[*]If done correctly, the configuration file for Time Limit: Unknown (com.chaofanj.timelimitunknown) should now exist under [Game Directory] > BepInEx > config, and you can now change the Time Limit using the provided configuration file.[/*]
[/list][/spoiler]

Mod Only Installation Instructions (If you are already using BepInEx / other mods with Casualties: Unknown: 
[spoiler][list=1]
[*]Download the Time Limit: Unknown mod (TimeLimitUnknown.dll)[/*]
[*]Go to [Game Directory] > BepInEx > plugins, and place TimeLimitUnknown.dll in the plugins folder. [/*]
[*]Launch the game in order to generate the configuration file for Time Limit: Unknown, then close the game.[/*]
[*]The configuration file for Time Limit: Unknown (com.chaofanj.timelimitunknown) should now exist under [Game Directory] > BepInEx > config, and you can now change the Time Limit using the provided configuration file. [/*]
[/list][/spoiler]

[size=3]How to use Time Limit: Unknown:[/size]
[spoiler][list]
[*]If you have not already done so, you must load the game with the Time Limit: Unknown mod installed, then close the game. This generates the configuration file for the mod.[/*]
[*]To set / change the Time Limit, go to [Game Directory] > BepInEx > config and open Time Limit: Unknown's configuration file (com.chaofanj.timelimitunknown.cfg), and set the TimeLimit value to whatever you want (in seconds), save the changes to the configuration file, then launch the game.[/*]
[*]The Time Limit value is loaded / set when the game first starts up. If you want to change the Time Limit to something else, you will need to close the game, change the TimeLimit value, then launch the game again[/*]
[/list][/spoiler]



[b][size=4]Compatibility[/size][/b]

[size=3]Due to the simple nature of this mod, it should generally work with any Casualties: Unknown mods, unless said mod specifically alters the Time Limit value.[/size]

[size=3]Time Limit: Unknown has also been tested with the QoL: Unknown mod and should work fine, since Time Limit: Unknown only alters the Time Limit.[/size]

[size=3]This has not been tested with Casualties: Together multiplayer mod ([url=https://github.com/Krokosha666/cas-unk-krokosha-multiplayer-coop]https://github.com/Krokosha666/cas-unk-krokosha-multiplayer-coop)[/url]. I would assume it would work, as long as each player has the mod, and the value in the configuration for each player is the exact same (but still, needs testing).[/size]



[size=4][b]Tools / Programs used:[/b][/size]

[color=#D4D4D8][size=3][b]Visual Studio (2026)[/b][/size][/color]
[list]
[*][color=#D4D4D8][size=3]Necessary to write any necessary code, and compile the mod DLL.[/size][/color][/*]
[/list][color=#D4D4D8][size=3][b]ILSpy[/b][/size][/color]
[list]
[*][color=#D4D4D8][size=3]Needed to check / decompile Casualties: Unknown's source code, and to figure out what specifically controls setting the Time Limit.[/size][/color][/*]
[/list][color=#D4D4D8][size=3][b]KoboldCPP + Qwen3-Nemotron-235B-A22B-GenRM.i1-IQ2_M (Large Language Model)[/b][/size][/color]
[list]
[*][color=#D4D4D8]...Yes, I (mostly) vibe coded this, don't judge me. I don't have the time (or brain cells) to fully learn how to program in C#. I still had to find the necessary values using ILSpy myself, and "hand hold" the AI model. I also manually checked, and cleaned up the code myself.[/color][/*]
[*][color=#D4D4D8]Fun fact: The LLM in question was run entirely on local hardware, no ChatGPT / OpenAI, or any other models were used.[/color][/*]
[/list]
